199422.description: Allies are healed for $199423s1 when you cast Blessing of Protection or Blessing of Sacrifice on them.

199483.name: Camouflage
199483.description: You and your pet blend into the surroundings and gain stealth for 1 min. While camouflaged, you will heal for 2% of maximum health every 1 sec.

199484.name: Psychic Link
199484.description:
Your direct damage spells inflict $s1% of their damage on all other targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch within $199486A2 yards.

Does not apply to damage from Shadowy Apparitions, Shadow Word: Pain, and Vampiric Touch.

199530.name: Stomp
199530.description: When you cast Barbed Shot, your pet stomps the ground, dealing $201754s1 Physical damage to all nearby enemies.

199532.name: Killer Cobra
199532.description: While Bestial Wrath is active, Cobra Shot resets the cooldown on Kill Command.

199736.name: Find Treasure
199736.description: You can sense nearby treasure, making it appear on the minimap. Lasts until canceled.

199921.name: Trailblazer
199921.description: Your movement speed is increased by $s2% anytime you have not attacked for ${$s1/1000} sec.

200025.name: Beacon of Virtue
200025.description:
Apply a Beacon of Light to your target and 4 injured allies within 30 yds for 9 sec.

All affected allies will be healed for 10% of the amount of your other healing done.

200072.name: Torrent
200072.description: Riptide's initial heal is increased $s1% and has a $s2% increased critical strike chance.

200076.name: Deluge
200076.description: Healing Wave and Chain Heal heal for an additional $s1% on targets affected by your Healing Rain or Riptide.

200128.name: Trail of Light
200128.description: $s1% of healing done by Flash Heal is replicated to the previous target you healed with those spells.

200183.name: Apotheosis
200183.description: [Miracle Worker: Gain a charge / Reset the cooldown] of your Holy Words, and enter a pure Holy form for 20 sec, increasing the cooldown reductions to your Holy Words by 200% and reducing their cost by 50%.

200199.name: Censure
200199.description: Holy Word: Chastise stuns the target for $200200d and is not broken by damage.

200209.name: Guardian Angel
200209.description:
When Guardian Spirit saves the target from death, it does not expire.

When Guardian Spirit expires without saving the target from death, reduce its remaining cooldown to $s1 seconds.

200390.name: Cultivation
200390.description: When Rejuvenation heals a target below $s1% health, they are instantly healed for $200389s1.

200430.name: Protection of Tyr
200430.description: Aura Mastery also increases all healing received by party or raid members within $211210A1 yards by $s1%.

200652.name: Tyr's Deliverance
200652.description:
Releases the Light within yourself, healing 5 injured allies instantly and an injured ally every 1 sec within 40 yds for (35.1% of Spell Power).

Allies healed also receive 10% increased healing from your Holy Light, Flash of Light, and Holy Shock spells for 12 sec.

200733.name: Airborne Irritant
200733.description: Blind has $s1% reduced cooldown, $s2% reduced duration, and applies to all nearby enemies.

200758.name: Gloomblade
200758.description:
Punctures your target with your shadow-infused blade for (123% of Attack Power) Shadow damage, bypassing armor. [Improved Backstab: Critical strikes apply Find Weakness for 10 sec]

Awards 1 combo points.

200829.name: Plea
200829.description: A quick, efficient plea to heal an ally for (300% of Spell Power).

200854.name: Gory Fur
200854.description: Mangle has a $h% chance to reduce the Rage cost of your next Ironfur by $s1%.

201467.name: Fury of the Illidari
201467.description: Throws two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing (7 * (38% + 38%)) Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies.

201664.name: Demoralizing Roar
201664.description: Demoralizes all enemies within 10 yards, reducing the damage they do by 20% for 8 sec.

201900.name: Hot Hand
201900.description:
Melee auto-attacks with Flametongue Weapon active have a $h% chance to reduce the cooldown of Lava Lash by ${100*(1-(100/(100+$m2)))}% and increase the damage of Lava Lash by $s3% for $215785d.

May not occur during an active Hot Hand.

202021.name: Predator
202021.description:
Tiger's Fury lasts ${$s1/1000} additional seconds.

Your combo point-generating abilities' direct damage is increased by $449864s2% of your Haste.

202031.name: Sabertooth
202031.description:
Ferocious Bite deals $s1% increased damage.

For each Combo Point spent, Ferocious Bite's primary target takes $s2% increased damage from your Cat Form bleed and other periodic abilities for $391722d.

202095.name: Indomitable
202095.description: Your maximum health is increased by $s3% and every ${$s2/10} Rage you spend heals you for ${$s1/10}% of your maximum health.

202137.name: Sigil of Silence
202137.description:
Place a Sigil of Silence at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Silences all enemies affected by the sigil for 2 sec.

202138.name: Sigil of Chains
202138.description:
Place a Sigil of Chains at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

All enemies affected by the sigil are pulled to its center and are snared, reducing movement speed by 70% for 6 sec.

202162.name: Avert Harm
202162.description: Guard the 4 closest players within 15 yards for 15 sec, allowing you to Stagger 20% of damage they take.

202163.name: Bounding Stride
202163.description: Reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by ${$m1/-1000} sec and Heroic Leap also increases your movement speed by $202164s1% for $202164d.

202168.name: Impending Victory
202168.description:
Instantly attack the target, causing (59% of Attack Power) damage and healing you for 30% of your maximum health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Impending Victory and makes it cost no Rage.

202246.name: Overrun
202246.description: Charge to an enemy, stunning them for 3 sec and knocking back their allies within 15 yards.

202316.name: Fervor of Battle
202316.description: If Cleave or Whirlwind hits $s1 or more targets you also Slam your primary target. This Slam deals $s2% additional damage.

202335.name: Double Barrel
202335.description: Your next Keg Smash deals 50% additional damage, and stuns all targets it hits for 3 sec.

202342.name: Shooting Stars
202342.description: Moonfire and Sunfire damage over time has a chance to call down a falling star, dealing $202497s1 Astral damage and generating ${$202497m2/10} Astral Power.

202345.name: Starlord
202345.description:
Starsurge and Starfall grant you $s1% Haste for $279709d or until you enter a new Eclipse.

Stacks up to $279709u times. Gaining a stack does not refresh the duration.

202370.name: Mighty Ox Kick
202370.description: You perform a Mighty Ox Kick, hurling your enemy a distance behind you.

202424.name: Chrysalis
202424.description: Reduces the cooldown of Life Cocoon by ${$m1/-1000} sec.

202430.name: Nature's Balance
202430.description:
While in combat you generate ${$s1/10} Astral Power every $t1 sec.

While out of combat your Astral Power rebalances to $s2 instead of depleting to empty.

202560.name: Best Served Cold
202560.description: Your dodges and parries make your Revenge cost no Rage $s3% more frequently and increase the damage your free Revenges deal by $s1%. Revenge increases the damage of your next Thunder Clap by $1234772s1%.

202603.name: Into the Fray
202603.description: You gain $202602s1% Haste for each enemy or ally within $s1 yards, up to ${$202602s1*$202602u}% Haste.

202719.name: Arcane Torrent
202719.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and generate 15 Fury.

202743.name: Booming Voice
202743.description: Demoralizing Shout also generates ${$m1/10} Rage and increases damage you deal to affected targets by $s2%.

202770.name: Fury of Elune
202770.description:
Balance,  Guardian
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy that follows the enemy, dealing up to [8 * 2 * (18.34% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 8 sec within its area. Damage reduced on secondary targets.

Generates 40 Astral Power over its duration.

202918.name: Light of the Sun
202918.description: Reduces the remaining cooldown on Solar Beam by $m1 sec when it interrupts the primary target.

203173.name: Death Chain
203173.description: Chains 3 enemies together, dealing (29.484% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing 20% of all damage taken to also be received by the others in the chain. Lasts for 10 sec.

203177.name: Heavy Repercussions
203177.description: Shield Slam generates ${$s2/10} more Rage and extends the duration of Shield Block by ${$m1/100}.1 sec.

203201.name: Crackling Thunder
203201.description: Thunder Clap's radius is increased by $s1% and it reduces affected target's movement speed by an additional $s2%.

203286.name: Greater Pyroblast
203286.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that deals up to 30% of the target's total health in Fire damage.

203415.name: Fury of the Eagle
203415.description: Furiously strikes all enemies in front of you, dealing ((237.5% of Attack Power) * 9) Physical damage over 3 sec. Critical strike chance increased by 50% against any target below 20% health. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

203524.name: Neltharion's Fury
203524.description: Enter a defensive posture, critically blocking all attacks while a stream of shadowflame erupts from Scale of the Earth-Warder, dealing (6 * (18.9% of Attack Power)) Shadowflame over 3 sec to all enemies in front of you. You can use defensive abilities while this is active.

203550.name: Blind Fury
203550.description: Eye Beam generates ${$s3/5} Fury every second, has $s1% increased duration, and deals $s2% increased damage.

203720.name: Demon Spikes
203720.description: Surge with fel power, increasing your Armor by (75 * Agility / 100) [Demon Spikes: and your Parry chance by 8%, for 12 sec].

203953.name: Brambles
203953.description:
Sharp brambles protect you, absorbing and reflecting up to $<shield> damage from each attack.

While Barkskin is active, the brambles also deal $213709s1 Nature damage to all nearby enemies every $22812t3 sec.

203962.name: Blood Frenzy
203962.description: Thrash also generates ${$203961s1/10} Rage each time it deals damage, on up to $s1 targets.

203964.name: Galactic Guardian
203964.description:
Your damage has a $s1% chance to trigger a free automatic Moonfire on that target.

$@spellicon8921 $@spellname8921:
When this occurs, the next Moonfire you cast generates ${$213708m1/10} Rage, and deals $213708s3% increased direct damage.

$@spellicon1252871 $@spellname1252871:
When this occurs, you gain $s2 $Lcharge:charges; of Lunar Wrath. Each $s3 Rage you spend while Red Moon is active consumes a stack to deal $1253609s1 additional Arcane damage to its target and heal you for $1253609s2.

203965.name: Survival of the Fittest
203965.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Barkskin and Survival Instincts by $s1%.

204018.name: Blessing of Spellwarding
204018.description:
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to magical damage and harmful effects for 10 sec.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

Shares a cooldown with Blessing of Protection.

204019.name: Blessed Hammer
204019.description:
Throws a Blessed Hammer that spirals outward, dealing (25% of Attack Power) Holy damage to enemies and reducing the next damage they deal to you by (Attack Power * 30 / 100).

Generates 1 Holy Power.

204021.name: Fiery Brand
204021.description: Brand yourself and an enemy target with demonic symbols, reducing the damage you take by 40% and instantly dealing (416% of Attack Power) Fire damage [Fiery Brand: and [(32.2% of Attack Power) * 12] Fire damage over 12 sec] to the enemy.

204023.name: Crusader's Judgment
204023.description: Judgment now has ${1+$s1} charges, and Grand Crusader now also reduces the cooldown of Judgment by ${$s2/1000} sec.

204053.name: Rend and Tear
204053.description: Each stack of Thrash reduces the target's damage to you by $s3% and increases your damage to them by $s1%.

204054.name: Consecrated Ground
204054.description: Your Consecration is $s1% larger, and enemies within it have $s2% reduced movement speed.

204066.name: Lunar Beam
204066.description:
Summons a beam of lunar light at your target's location, dealing (40% of Attack Power) Arcane damage each second to your target and (40% of Attack Power) to up to 5 other enemies within the beam. 

Lunar Beam also increases your mastery by (14 * $mas)%, and heals you for [(280% of Attack Power) * 8] over 8 sec.

204074.name: Righteous Protector
204074.description: Avenging Wrath and Sentinel have $s1% reduced cooldown and $s2% reduced duration.

204077.name: Final Stand
204077.description: During Divine Shield, all targets within $s1 yds are taunted.

204089.name: Bullseye
204089.description: When your abilities damage a target below $s1% health, you gain $204090s1% increased critical strike chance for $204090d, stacking up to $204090u times.

204147.name: Windburst
204147.description: Focuses the power of Wind through Thas'dorah, dealing 272% Physical damage to your target, and leaving behind a trail of wind for 5 sec that increases the movement speed of allies by 50%.

204157.name: Throw Glaive
204157.description: Throw a demonic glaive at the target, dealing (21.151% of Attack Power) Physical damage. The glaive can ricochet to [Bouncing Glaives: 1 additional enemies / an additional enemy] within 10 yards. Generates high threat.

204268.name: Voodoo Mastery
204268.description:
Your Hex target is slowed by $378080s1% during Hex and for $378080d after it ends.

Reduces the cooldown of Hex by ${($m1/1000)*-1} sec.

204331.name: Counterstrike Totem
204331.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec.

Whenever enemies within (20 * 1 * 1) yards of the totem deal direct damage, the totem will deal 100% of the damage dealt back to attacker.

204336.name: Grounding Totem
204336.description: Summons a totem at your feet that will redirect all harmful spells cast within 30 yards on a nearby party or raid member to itself. Will not redirect area of effect spells. Lasts 3 sec.

204596.name: Sigil of Flame
204596.description:
Place a Sigil of Flame at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Deals (80% of Attack Power) Fire damage, and an additional (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 8 sec, to all enemies affected by the sigil.

Generates 25 Fury.

204909.name: Soul Rending
204909.description:
Leech increased by $s1%.

Gain an additional $s2% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

205021.name: Ray of Frost
205021.description:
Channel an icy beam at the enemy for 4 sec, dealing (450% of Spell Power) Frost damage every 0.50 sec.

Applies 8 stacks of Freezing over its duration.

205022.name: Arcane Familiar
205022.description: Casting Arcane Intellect summons a Familiar that attacks your enemies and increases your maximum mana by $210126s1% for $210126d.

205025.name: Presence of Mind
205025.description: Causes your next 2 Arcane Blasts to be instant cast.

205026.name: Firestarter
205026.description: Your Fireball and Pyroblast spells always deal a critical strike when the target is above $s1% health.

205028.name: Resonance
205028.description: Arcane Barrage deals $s1% increased damage per target it hits beyond the first.

205029.name: Flame On
205029.description: Fire Blast gains $s1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by ${-$s2/1000}.1 sec.

205030.name: Frozen Touch
205030.description: Frostbolt grants you Fingers of Frost $s1% more often and Brain Freeze $s2% more often.

205065.name: Void Torrent
205065.description:
Raise your dagger into the sky, channeling a torrent of void energy into the target for (220% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 4 sec. Insanity does not drain during this channel.

Requires Voidform.

205148.name: Reverse Entropy
205148.description: Your spells have a chance to grant you $266030s1% Haste for $266030d.

205154.name: Mecha-Bond Imprint Matrix
205154.description: Allows you to tame pets in the Mechanical family.

205180.name: Summon Darkglare
205180.description:
Summons a Darkglare from the Twisting Nether that increases the damage of your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 20% while active.

The Darkglare will serve you for 20 sec, blasting its target for (487.044% of Spell Power) Shadow damage, increased by 10% for every damage over time effect you have active on their current target.

205223.name: Consumption
205223.description: Strikes all enemies in front of you with a hungering attack that deals 87% Physical damage and heals you for 100% of that damage.

205273.name: Wake of Ashes
205273.description:
Lash out with the Ashbringer, dealing (174.3% of Attack Power)% Radiant damage to all enemies within 12 yd in front of you, and reducing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

Demon and Undead enemies are stunned for 6 sec if struck by the Wake of Ashes.

205364.name: Dominate Mind
205364.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec while still controlling your own mind. Does not work versus Demonic, Mechanical, or Undead beings or players. This spell shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

205406.name: Sheilun's Gift
205406.description: Draws in all nearby clouds of mist generated by Sheilun, healing the target for (50% of Spell Power) per cloud absorbed.

205411.name: Desperate Instincts
205411.description:
Blur now reduces damage taken by an additional ${$abs($m3)}%.

Additionally, damage taken below $s1% Health is reduced by $s2%.

205495.name: Stormkeeper
205495.description: Raises The Fist of Ra-den to the sky and absorbs all nearby electric energy, causing your next 3 casts of Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning to be instant and deal 200% increased damage.

205545.name: Odyn's Fury
205545.description: Unleashes the fiery power Odyn bestowed the Warswords, dealing (91% + 91%) Fire damage and an additional (84% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 14 yards.

205604.name: Reverse Magic
205604.description: Removes all harmful magical effects from yourself and all nearby allies within 10 yards, and sends them back to their original caster if possible.

205629.name: Demonic Trample
205629.description:
Transform to demon form, moving at 175% increased speed for 3 sec, knocking down all enemies in your path and dealing (16% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

During Demonic Trample you are unaffected by snares but cannot cast spells or use your normal attacks. Shares charges with Infernal Strike.

205630.name: Illidan's Grasp
205630.description:
You strangle the target with demonic magic, stunning them in place and dealing (1120% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 5 sec while the target is grasped. Can move while channeling.

Use Illidan's Grasp again to toss the target to a location within 20 yards.

205636.name: Force of Nature
205636.description:
Summons a stand of 3 Treants for 10 sec which immediately taunt and attack enemies in the targeted area.

Generates 20 Astral Power.

205723.name: Red Thirst
205723.description: Reduces the cooldown on Vampiric Blood by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec per $s2 Runic Power spent.

205727.name: Anti-Magic Barrier
205727.description: Reduces the cooldown of Anti-Magic Shell by ${$s1/-1000} sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed by $s2%.

205800.name: Oppressor
205800.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

206315.name: Massacre
206315.description: $?a317320[Condemn][Execute] is usable on targets below $s2% health and its cooldown is reduced by ${$s3/1000}.1 sec.

206416.name: First Blood
206416.description: Blade Dance deals $<firstbloodDmg> Chaos damage to the first target struck.

206476.name: Exergy
206476.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase your damage by $208628s1% for $208628d.

206572.name: Dragon Charge
206572.description: Run at high speed at a distance in front of you. All enemies in your path will take (70% of Attack Power) Physical damage and be knocked back.

206803.name: Rain from Above
206803.description: You fly into the air out of harm's way. While floating, you gain access to Fel Lance allowing you to deal damage to enemies below.

206930.name: Heart Strike
206930.description: Instantly strike the target and 1 other nearby enemy, causing (157.334% of Attack Power) Physical damage, and reducing enemies' movement speed by 20% for 8 sec [Heart Strike: Generates 5 bonus Runic Power] [Heartbreaker: plus 2 Runic Power per additional enemy struck].

206967.name: Will of the Necropolis
206967.description: Damage taken below $s3% Health is reduced by $s2%.

206974.name: Foul Bulwark
206974.description: Each charge of Bone Shield increases your maximum health by $<increase>%.

207017.name: Alpha Challenge
207017.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207018.name: Murderous Intent
207018.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207025.name: Admonishment
207025.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207028.name: Inquisition
207028.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207029.name: Tormentor
207029.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207057.name: Shattering Blade
207057.description:
When Frost Strike damages an enemy with $51714u stacks of Razorice it will consume them to deal an additional $s1% damage.

Frostbane consumes the Razorice on your main target to deal an additional $s2% damage.

207061.name: Murderous Efficiency
207061.description: Consuming the Killing Machine effect has a $s1% chance to grant you $207062s1 Rune.

207068.name: Titan's Thunder
207068.description: Discharge a massive jolt of electricity from Titanstrike into all your pets and Dire Beasts, causing them to deal up to (Ranged Attack Power * 1.15 * 0.5 * 1) Nature damage to their target every 1 sec. for 8 sec. [Barbed Shot: Also causes the next pet frenzy caused by Barbed Shot to deal (42% of Attack Power) additional Nature damage on each of the 5 attacks]

207104.name: Runic Attenuation
207104.description: Auto attacks have a chance to generate ${$221322s1/10} Runic Power.

207142.name: Avalanche
207142.description: Casting Howling Blast with Rime active causes jagged icicles to fall on enemies nearby your target, applying Razorice and dealing $207150s1 Frost damage.

207167.name: Blinding Sleet
207167.description:
Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.

207200.name: Permafrost
207200.description: Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to $s1% of the damage dealt.

207230.name: Frostscythe
207230.description:
A sweeping attack that strikes all enemies in front of you for (40% of Attack Power) Frost damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. 

Consumes Killing Machine to have its critical strikes deal 4 times the normal damage.

207269.name: Ebon Fever
207269.description: Plagues deal $s3% more damage over time in ${100+$s1}% of their duration.

207272.name: Infected Claws
207272.description: The infected claws of your ghouls have a chance to sicken the foe, dealing $1241786o Shadow damage over $1241786d. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

207317.name: Epidemic
207317.description:
Causes each of your Virulent Plagues to flare up, dealing (62.5522% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to the infected enemy and (25.0212% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to foes nearby.

Extends the duration of Dread Plague and Virulent Plague by 1.5 sec.

207347.name: Aura of Pain
207347.description: $?c3[Soul Immolation grants ${$s2*$1241937d} additional Fury over its duration.][Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by $s1%.]

207383.name: Abundance
207383.description: For each Rejuvenation you have active, Regrowth's cost is reduced by $207640s1% and critical effect chance is increased by $207640s2%, up to a maximum of ${$207640s2*$207640u}%.

207387.name: Painbringer
207387.description: Consuming a Soul Fragment reduces all damage you take by $s1% for $212988d.

207401.name: Ancestral Vigor
207401.description: Targets you heal with Healing Wave, Chain Heal, or Riptide's initial heal gain $s2% increased health for $207400d.

207407.name: Soul Carver
207407.description: Carve into the soul of your target, dealing [(463.5% of Attack Power) + (463.5% of Attack Power)] Fire damage and an additional (300% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 3 sec.  Immediately shatters 3 Soul Fragments from the target and 1 additional Soul Fragment  every 1 sec.

207548.name: Agonizing Flames
207548.description: Immolation Aura increases your movement speed by $s1% and its duration is increased by $s2%.

207684.name: Sigil of Misery
207684.description:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

207697.name: Feast of Souls
207697.description: Soul Cleave heals for an additional $207693s1.

207739.name: Burning Alive
207739.description: Every $207771t3 sec, Fiery Brand spreads to one nearby enemy.

207777.name: Dismantle
207777.description: Disarm the enemy, preventing the use of any weapons or shield for 5 sec.

207778.name: Downpour
207778.description: A burst of water at your Healing Rain's location heals up to 5 injured allies within 12 yards for (323.4% of Spell Power).

207946.name: Light's Wrath
207946.description: Draws upon the power of Light's Wrath, dealing (175% of Spell Power) Radiant damage to the target, increased by 10% per ally affected by your Atonement.

208065.name: Light of T'uure
208065.description: Applies Light of the Naaru to the target, healing for (100% of Spell Power) and increasing your healing done to that target by 25% for 10 sec.

208154.name: Warpaint
208154.description: You take $s1% reduced damage while Enrage is active.

208253.name: Essence of G'Hanir
208253.description: Release the natural power within G'Hanir to increase the frequency that all of your heal over time effects heal allies by 100% for 8 sec.

208652.name: Dire Beast: Hawk
208652.description: Summons a hawk to circle the target area, attacking all targets within 10 yards over the next 10 sec.

209202.name: Eye of Tyr
209202.description: Releases a blinding flash from Truthguard, causing (56.7% of Attack Power) Holy damage to all nearby enemies within 8 yds and reducing all damage they deal to you by 25% for 9 sec.

209258.name: Last Resort
209258.description:
Sustaining fatal damage instead transforms you to Metamorphosis form.

This may occur once every $209261d.

209389.name: Bulwark of Order
209389.description: Avenger's Shield also shields you for $209388d, absorbing $s1% as much damage as it dealt, up to $s2% of your maximum health.

209525.name: Soothing Mist
209525.description:
Heals the target for (900% of Spell Power) over 20 sec.

While channeling, Effuse and Enveloping Mist are instant cast, and will heal the soothed target without breaking the Soothing Mist channel.

209577.name: Warbreaker
209577.description: Stomp the ground, causing a ring of corrupted spikes to erupt upwards, dealing 119% Shadow damage and applying the Colossus Smash effect to all nearby enemies.

209749.name: Faerie Swarm
209749.description: Swarms the target with Faeries, disarming the enemy, preventing the use of any weapons or shield and reducing movement speed by 30% for 5 sec.

209997.name: Play Dead
209997.description: Playing Dead, tricking enemies into ignoring them. Lasts up to 6 min.

210000.name: Wake Up
210000.description: Tell your pet to wake up.

210053.name: Mount Form
210053.description:
Shapeshift into a mountable ground travel form, increasing movement speed by 40%. Also protects the caster from Polymorph effects. Only usable outdoors.

The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of movement impairing effects.

210065.name: Track Beasts
210065.description: Shows the location of all nearby beasts on the minimap.

210128.name: Zombify
210128.description:
Reanimates a nearby corpse, summoning a zombie for 20 sec that slowly moves towards your target. 

If your zombie reaches its target, it explodes after 3.0 sec. The explosion stuns all enemies within 8 yards for 3 sec and deals 10% of their health in Shadow damage.

210256.name: Blessing of Sanctuary
210256.description: Instantly removes all stun, silence, fear and horror effects from the friendly target and reduces the duration of future such effects by 60% for 5 sec.

210476.name: Master of Escape
210476.description: Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

210689.name: Lightning Rod
210689.description:
$?s454009[Tempest, ][]$?s137040[Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake][Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning] make your target a Lightning Rod for $197209d.
 
Lightning Rods take $s2% of all damage you deal with $?s454009[Tempest, Lightning Bolt,][Lightning Bolt] and Chain Lightning.

210706.name: Gore
210706.description: Thrash, Swipe, Moonfire, and Maul have a $s1% chance to reset the cooldown on Mangle, and to cause it to generate an additional ${$93622m1/10} Rage.

210722.name: Ashamane's Frenzy
210722.description:
Unleash Ashamane's Frenzy, clawing your target 15 times over 3 sec for ((5.124% of Attack Power) * 15) Physical damage and an additional ((5.124% of Attack Power) * 3 * 15) Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 3 combo points.

210726.name: Mark of Aluneth
210726.description: Creates a runic prison at the target's location, slowing enemy movement speed by 70%, inflicting [(40% of Spell Power) * 6] Arcane damage over 6 sec, and then detonating for Arcane damage equal to 15% of your maximum mana.

210853.name: Elemental Assault
210853.description: Stormstrike damage is increased by $s1%, and Stormstrike and Lava Lash have a $m3% chance to generate $m2 $Lstack:stacks; of Maelstrom Weapon.

210873.name: Hex
210873.description: Transforms the enemy into a compy for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

211522.name: Psyfiend
211522.description:
Summons a Psyfiend with [Total Health * (0.04)] health for 12 sec beside you to attack the target at range with Psyflay.

 Psyflay
Deals up to 1% of the target's total health in Shadow damage every 1 sec. Also slows their movement speed by 50% and reduces healing received by 50%.

211714.name: Thal'kiel's Consumption
211714.description: Thal'kiel drains 8% of the life from your demon servants and unleashes a blast of Shadow damage at your current target equal to the life he stole.

212036.name: Mass Resurrection
212036.description: Brings all dead party members back to life with 35% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

212040.name: Revitalize
212040.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana. Not castable in combat.

212048.name: Ancestral Vision
212048.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana.  Cannot be cast when in combat.

212051.name: Reawaken
212051.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

212056.name: Absolution
212056.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana.  Cannot be cast when in combat.

212084.name: Fel Devastation
212084.description: Unleash the fel within you, damaging enemies directly in front of you for [(41.1% of Attack Power) * (10)] Fire damage over 2 sec. [Fel Devastation: Causing damage also heals you for up to [(360% of Attack Power) * 10] health]

212182.name: Smoke Bomb
212182.description: Creates a cloud of thick smoke in an 8 yard radius around the Rogue for 5 sec. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the smoke cloud.

212205.name: Create: Crimson Vial
212205.description:
Create a Crimson Vial to share with allies. Maximum of 3 can be carried at once. 

 Crimson Vial
Drink an alchemical concoction that heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec.

212295.name: Nether Ward
212295.description: Surrounds the caster with a shield that lasts 3 sec, reflecting all harmful spells cast on you.

212431.name: Explosive Shot
212431.description: Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing (582% of Attack Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

212459.name: Call Fel Lord
212459.description: Summon a fel lord to guard the location for 15 sec. Any enemy that comes within 6 yards will suffer [(Spell Power * 2) * 1 * 1 * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage, and players struck will be stunned for 1 sec.

212552.name: Wraith Walk
212552.description:
Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

212638.name: Tracker's Net
212638.description: Hurl a net at your enemy, rooting them for 6 sec. While within the net, the target's chance to hit is reduced by 80%. Any damage will break the net.

212640.name: Mending Bandage
212640.description:
Instantly clears all bleeds, poisons, and diseases from the target, and heals for 18% damage over 6 sec.

Being attacked will stop you from using Mending Bandage.

212653.name: Shimmer
212653.description: Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

213010.name: Charred Warblades
213010.description: You heal for $s1% of all Fire damage you deal.

213410.name: Demonic
213410.description: Eye Beam causes you to enter demon form for ${$s1/1000} sec after it finishes dealing damage.

213634.name: Purify Disease
213634.description: Removes all Disease effects from a friendly target.

213644.name: Cleanse Toxins
213644.description: Cleanses a friendly target, removing all Poison and Disease effects.

213764.name: Swipe
213764.description:
Balance,  Guardian,  Restoration
Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

 Feral
Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

Awards 1 combo point.

213871.name: Bodyguard
213871.description:
Protect an ally, causing 40% of all Physical damage they take to be transfered to you. When the target takes Physical damage, your Shield Slam cooldown has a 30% chance to be reset. Bodyguard is cancelled if the target is further than 20 yards from you. Lasts 1 min.

Only one target can be Bodyguarded at a time.

214634.name: Ebonbolt
214634.description: Deals (321.75% of Spell Power) Shadowfrost damage and causes Brain Freeze.

215279.name: Chaos Bolt
215279.description: Unleashes a devastating blast of chaos, causing (200% of Spell Power) Chaos damage. Chaos Bolt always critically strikes and your critical strike chance increases its damage.

215537.name: Trauma
215537.description: Slam, Whirlwind, and Execute now cause the target to bleed for 20% additional damage over 6 sec. Multiple uses accumulate increased damage.

215568.name: Fresh Meat
215568.description: Bloodthirst always Enrages you the first time you strike a target and it has a $s1% increased chance to trigger Enrage.

215652.name: Shield of Virtue
215652.description: When activated, your next Avenger's Shield will interrupt and silence all enemies within 8 yds of the target.

215768.name: Blaze of Light
215768.description: The damage of Smite and Penance is increased by $m1%, and Penance increases or decreases your target's movement speed by $s2% for $355851d.

215769.name: Spirit of Redemption
215769.description: The Priest becomes the Spirit of Redemption for 6 sec. The Spirit of Redemption cannot move, attack, be attacked or targeted by any spells or effects. While in this form the Priest can cast any healing spell free of cost.

216698.name: Reap Souls
216698.description:
Consume all Tormented Souls collected by Ulthalesh, increasing your damage by 10% and doubling the effect of all of Ulthalesh's other traits for 5 sec per soul consumed.

Ulthalesh collects Tormented Souls from each target you kill and occasionally escaped souls it previously collected.

217200.name: Barbed Shot
217200.description:
Fire a shot that tears through your enemy, causing them to bleed for [(77.9% of Attack Power) * 5] damage over 12 sec. If Barbed Shot is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Barbed Shot.

Generates (5 * 8 / 2) Focus over 8 sec.

217832.name: Imprison
217832.description: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

218164.name: Detox
218164.description: Removes all Poison and Disease effects from the target.

218612.name: Feed the Demon
218612.description: Every $s1 Fury spent reduces the remaining cooldown of Demon Spikes by ${$s2/1000}.2 sec.

219272.name: Demon Skin
219272.description:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of ${$s1/10}.1% of maximum health every $t1 sec, and may now absorb an additional $s2% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by $m4%.

219786.name: Ossuary
219786.description:
While you have at least $s1 Bone Shield charges, the cost of Death Strike is reduced by ${$219788m1/-10} Runic Power.

Additionally, your maximum Runic Power is increased by ${$m2/10}.

220143.name: Apocalypse
220143.description: Strikes the enemy, dealing 306% Physical damage and bursting up to 6 Festering Wounds on the target, summoning a member of your Army of the Dead for 20 sec for each burst Festering Wound.

221536.name: Heartbreaker
221536.description: Your Heart Strike generates ${$210738s1/10} additional Runic Power per target hit.

221562.name: Asphyxiate
221562.description: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

223817.name: Divine Purpose
223817.description: Holy Power spending abilities have a $s1% chance to make your next Holy Power spending ability free and deal $223819s2% increased damage and healing.

227174.name: Fallout
227174.description: Immolation Aura's initial burst has a chance to shatter Soul Fragments from enemies.

227847.name: Bladestorm
227847.description:
Fury
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for [5 * (271.635% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage over 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

Generates 5 Rage on each strike.

 Arms
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for [7 * (271.635% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage over 6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

228049.name: Guardian of the Forgotten Queen
228049.description: Empowers the friendly target with the spirit of the forgotten queen, causing the target to be immune to all damage for until canceled.

228260.name: Voidform
228260.description:
Bombards your target with a Void Volley and twists your Shadowform with void magic, increasing your spell damage by 20% for 20 sec. 

This spell is replaced with Void Volley while Voidform is active.

 Void Volley
Releases a volley of pure void energy, firing 10 bolts at your target and 1 bolt at all enemies within 10 yards of your target for (106.049% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

Generates 10 Insanity.

228477.name: Soul Cleave
228477.description:
Viciously strike an enemy and all other enemies in front of you for (208% of Attack Power) Physical damage and heal yourself for (240% of Attack Power). Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Consumes up to 2 Soul Fragments, increasing damage by 20% per fragment consumed.

228920.name: Ravager
228920.description:
Arms
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting [6 * (119.517% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to all enemies over 12 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Cleave and Whirlwind deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active

 Protection
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting [6 * (119.517% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to all enemies over 12 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Revenge and Thunder Clap deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active.

Generates 10 Rage each time it deals damage.

229533.name: Track Mechanicals
229533.description: Shows the location of all nearby mechanicals on the minimap.

231032.name: Improved Regrowth
231032.description: Regrowth's initial heal has a $s1% increased chance for a critical effect if the target is already affected by Regrowth.

231040.name: Lingering Healing
231040.description:
Rejuvenation's duration is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec.

Regrowth's duration is increased by ${$s2/1000} sec when cast on yourself.

231063.name: Merciless Claws
231063.description: Shred deals $s2% increased damage and $?s202028[Brutal Slash][Swipe] deals $s1% increased damage against bleeding targets.

231548.name: The Beast Within
231548.description: Reduce the cooldown of Bestial Wrath by ${$m1/-1000} sec.

231564.name: Arcing Cleave
231564.description: For each Arcane Charge, Arcane Barrage hits $s1 additional nearby $Ltarget:targets; for $s2% damage.

231644.name: Greater Judgment
231644.description: Judgment deems the target unworthy, preventing the next $<shield> damage dealt by the target.

231663.name: Greater Judgment
231663.description:
Judgment causes the target to take $s1% increased damage from your next Holy Power ability.

Multiple applications may overlap.

231682.name: Sanctuary
231682.description: Smite prevents the next $<shield> damage dealt by the enemy.

231691.name: Improved Sprint
231691.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by ${$m1/-1000} sec.

232633.name: Arcane Torrent
232633.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 3% of your mana.

232698.name: Shadowform
232698.description: Assume a Shadowform, increasing your spell damage dealt by 10%.

232893.name: Felblade
232893.description:
Charge to your target and deal (122.94% of Attack Power)% Fire damage.

 [Fracture: Generates 15 Fury.] [Demonic Wards: Generates 15 Fury.]Generates 15 Fury.

233759.name: Grapple Weapon
233759.description: You fire off a rope spear, grappling the target's weapons and shield, returning them to you for 5 sec.

234153.name: Drain Life
234153.description: Drains life from the target, causing 25 Shadow damage over 5 sec, and healing you for 500% of the damage done.

234299.name: Fist of Justice
234299.description: Hammer of Justice's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

234876.name: Death's Embrace
234876.description: Agony, $?a445465[Wither][Corruption], Unstable Affliction, Seed of Corruption, and $?s198590[Drain Soul][Shadow Bolt] deal up to $s1% increased damage on targets below $m2% health. Damage increase is higher against lower health targets.

235219.name: Cold Snap
235219.description: Resets the cooldown of your Ice Barrier, Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, Ice Cold, and Ice Block.

235313.name: Blazing Barrier
235313.description:
Shields you in flame, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage [Molten Skin: and reducing Physical damage taken by 0%] for 1 min.

Melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take (14.375% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

235450.name: Prismatic Barrier
235450.description:
Shields you with an arcane force, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage and reducing magic damage taken by 15% for 1 min.

The duration of harmful Magic effects against you is reduced by 25%.

235484.name: Improved Between the Eyes
235484.description: Critical strikes with Between the Eyes deal ${$s1/100+2}.1 times normal damage.

235587.name: Miracle Worker
235587.description: Holy Word: Serenity$?a?a1246517[ gains][ and Holy Word: Sanctify gain] an additional charge.

236068.name: Moment of Clarity
236068.description: Omen of Clarity now triggers $s2% more often, can accumulate up to ${$s135700u+$s1} charges, and increases the damage of your next Shred or $?s202028[Brutal Slash][Swipe] by $s4%.

236077.name: Disarm
236077.description: Disarm the enemy's weapons and shield for 5 sec. Disarmed creatures deal significantly reduced damage.

236273.name: Duel
236273.description: You challenge the target to a duel. While challenged, all damage you and the target deal to all targets other than each other is reduced by 50%. Lasts 12 sec.

236279.name: Devastator
236279.description: Your auto-attacks deal an additional $236282s1 Physical damage and have a $s2% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Shield Slam.

236457.name: Slipstream
236457.description: Arcane Missiles and Evocation can now be channeled while moving.

236716.name: Strength of the Wild
236716.description: Maul the target for 8% of the target's maximum health in Physical damage.

238049.name: Scintillating Moonlight
238049.description: Moonfire reduces damage dealt to you by ${$s1/1}%.

238100.name: Angel's Mercy
238100.description: Reduces the cooldown of Desperate Prayer by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

238135.name: Eternal Barrier
238135.description: Power Word: Shield absorbs $s1% additional damage and lasts ${$s2/1000} sec longer.

238136.name: Cosmic Ripple
238136.description: When Holy Word: Serenity $?a1246517[finishes its][or Holy Word: Sanctify finish their] cooldown, you emit a burst of light that heals up to $s1 injured targets within $243241A1 yards for $243241s1.

238558.name: Misery
238558.description: Vampiric Touch also applies Shadow Word: Pain to the target. Shadow Word: Pain lasts an additional ${$s2/1000} sec.

242155.name: Hybrid Kinship
242155.description: Learn the secrets of taming Feathermanes.

245687.name: Dark Shadow
245687.description: Shadow Dance increases all ability damage by $s2%, and Shadowstrike and Shuriken Storm damage by an additional $s1%.

247454.name: Spirit Bomb
247454.description: Consume up to 5 Soul Fragments then explode, dealing (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased by 20 / Soulcrush: 28 / Untethered Rage: 25% per fragment consumed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

252216.name: Tiger Dash
252216.description: Shift into Cat Form and increase your movement speed by 200%, reducing gradually over 5 sec.

253593.name: Inexorable Assault
253593.description:
Gain Inexorable Assault every $t1 sec, stacking up to $253595u times.

$?s207230[Obliterate and Frostscythe consume][Obliterate consumes] up to $s1 stacks, dealing an additional $253597s1 Frost damage for each stack consumed.

255544.name: Poison Bomb
255544.description: Envenom has a $<chance>% chance per combo point spent to smash a vial of poison at the target's location, creating a pool of acidic death that deals ${$255546s1*$s2} Nature damage over $255545d to all enemies within it.

255647.name: Light's Judgment
255647.description: Call down a strike of Holy energy, dealing [Attack Power * 4.2 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Holy damage to enemies within 10 yards after 3 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

255654.name: Bull Rush
255654.description: Charge forward for 1 sec, knocking enemies down for 1.5 sec.

255661.name: Cantrips
255661.description: Conjure up an Eldritch Grimoire, allowing you mail access for 1.5 min.

255937.name: Wake of Ashes
255937.description:
Lash out at your enemies, dealing (321.86% of Attack Power) Radiant damage to all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, and applying Truth's Wake, burning the targets for an additional [(65.28% of Attack Power) * (2.73077)] damage over 9 sec.

Demon and Undead enemies are also stunned for 5 sec.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

256165.name: Blinding Powder
256165.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blind by $s1% and increases its range by $s2 yds.

256170.name: Loaded Dice
256170.description: Activating Adrenaline Rush improves the result of your next Roll the Bones by one level.

256188.name: Retractable Hook
256188.description: Reduces the cooldown of Grappling Hook by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

256948.name: Spatial Rift
256948.description: Tear a rift in space. Reactivate this ability to teleport through the rift.

257044.name: Rapid Fire
257044.description:
Shoot a stream of 7 / Double Tap: 13 / Quick Draw: 10 shots at your target over 2 sec, dealing a total of [7 / Double Tap: 12.6 / Quick Draw: 10 * (72.6% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage. Usable while moving.

Each shot generates 3 / Double Tap: 5 / Quick Draw: 6 Focus.

257284.name: Hunter's Mark
257284.description:
Apply Hunter's Mark to the target, causing the target to always be seen and tracked by the Hunter.

Hunter's Mark increases the target's damage taken by 3%. Can only be applied to a target at a time.

257505.name: Shot in the Dark
257505.description: After using Vanish or Shadow Dance, your next Cheap Shot is free and ignores its cooldown.

257620.name: Multi-Shot
257620.description: Fires several missiles, hitting your current target and all enemies within 10 yards for (181.6% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. [Lethal Shots: Multi-Shot has a 30% chance to reduce the cooldown of Rapid Fire by 5.0 sec]

257621.name: Trick Shots
257621.description: When Multi-Shot hits $s2 or more targets, your next Aimed Shot or Rapid Fire will ricochet and hit up to $s1 additional targets for $s4% of normal damage.

258860.name: Essence Break
258860.description: Slash all enemies in front of you for (311% of Attack Power) Chaos damage, causing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance to deal (198% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to them for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

258881.name: Trail of Ruin
258881.description: The final slash of Blade Dance inflicts an additional $258883o1 Chaos damage over $258883d.

258887.name: Cycle of Hatred
258887.description: Activating Eye Beam reduces the cooldown of your next Eye Beam by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec, stacking up to $s2 sec.

258920.name: Immolation Aura
258920.description:
Havoc
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

 Devourer
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

 Vengeance
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

Generates 20 Fury over 6 sec.

259489.name: Kill Command
259489.description:
Give the command to kill, causing your pet to savagely deal (300% of Attack Power) Physical damage to the enemy.

Generates 15 / Invigorating Pulse: 20 / Flanker's Advantage: 20 Focus.

259495.name: Wildfire Bomb
259495.description:
Hurl a bomb at the target, exploding for (157.95% of Attack Power) Fire damage in a cone and coating enemies in wildfire, scorching them for (125.928% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Deals 80% increased damage to your primary target.

260240.name: Precise Shots
260240.description:
Aimed Shot causes your next Arcane Shot or Multi-Shot to deal $260242s1% more damage and cost $260242s3% less Focus.

Precise Shots benefits $?a466932[Black Arrow][Kill Shot]'s damage at $s2% effectiveness.

260243.name: Volley
260243.description: Rain a volley of arrows down over 6 sec, dealing up to [(140% of Attack Power) * 12] Physical damage to any enemy in the area, and gain the effects of Trick Shots for as long as Volley is active.

260248.name: Bloodseeker
260248.description: You and your pet gain $260249s1% attack speed for every bleeding enemy within $s2 yds.

260285.name: Tip of the Spear
260285.description: Kill Command increases the direct damage of your other abilities by $s1%, stacking up to $260286u times.

260309.name: Master Marksman
260309.description: Your ranged ability critical strikes cause the target to bleed for an additional $s1% of the damage dealt over $269576d.

260364.name: Arcane Pulse
260364.description: Deals (Attack Power * 1.5) Arcane damage to nearby enemies and reduces their movement speed by 80%. Lasts 8 sec.

260404.name: Calling the Shots
260404.description: Trueshot's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/1000*-1} sec.

260643.name: Skullsplitter
260643.description:
Bash an enemy's skull, dealing (202.488% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Skullsplitter causes your Rend and Deep Wounds on the target to bleed out 100% faster for 10 sec.

Generates (150 / 10) Rage.

260708.name: Sweeping Strikes
260708.description: Your next 12 damaging single-target abilities hit 1 additional target within 8 yds for 75% damage. Lasts 30 sec.

260878.name: Spirit Wolf
260878.description: While transformed into a Ghost Wolf, you gain $260881s1% increased movement speed and $260881s2% damage reduction every $260882t1 sec, stacking up to $260881u times.

261917.name: Sharp Reflexes
261917.description: Blackout Kick reduces the cooldown of Rising Sun Kick and Fists of Fury by ${$100784m3/1000}.1 sec.

262150.name: Dreadnaught
262150.description: Overpower causes a seismic wave, dealing $315961s1 damage to all enemies in a $315961A1 yd line. Deals reduced damage beyond $315961s2 targets.

262161.name: Warbreaker
262161.description: Smash the ground and shatter the armor of all enemies within 10 yds, dealing (306.263% of Attack Power) Physical damage and increasing damage you deal to them by 30% for 10 sec.

262231.name: War Machine
262231.description:
Your auto-attacks generate $?c1[$s2]?$c2[$s3][$s4]% more Rage.

Killing an enemy instantly generates ${$262232s1/10} Rage and increases your movement speed by $262232s2% for $262232d.

262647.name: Forceful Winds
262647.description: Windfury has a $s2% additional chance to trigger and its damage is increased by $s1%.

263165.name: Void Torrent
263165.description:
Channel a torrent of void energy into the target, dealing (713.055% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 3 sec and tearing open an Entropic Rift.

 Entropic Rift
Mind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 sec. Enemies caught in its path suffer (60% of Spell Power) Shadow damage every 1 sec while within its reach.

Generates 24 Insanity over the duration.

263642.name: Fracture
263642.description:
Rapidly slash your target for [(103.5% of Attack Power)% + (207% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage, and shatter 2 Lesser Soul Fragments from them.

Generates 25 Fury.

264000.name: Creeping Death
264000.description: Your Agony, $?a445465[Wither][Corruption], and Unstable Affliction deal damage $s1% faster.

264078.name: Dreadlash
264078.description: When your Dreadstalkers charge into battle, their Dreadbite attack now hits all targets within $271971A1 yards and deals $s1% more damage.

264130.name: Power Siphon
264130.description: Instantly sacrifice up to 2 Wild Imps, generating 2 charges of Demonic Core that cause Demonbolt to deal 30% additional damage.

264332.name: Guerrilla Tactics
264332.description: Wildfire Bomb now has ${$s1+1} charges, and the initial explosion deals $s2% increased damage.

264348.name: Tiger Tail Sweep
264348.description: Increases the range of Leg Sweep by $s1 yds.

264735.name: Survival of the Fittest
264735.description: Reduces all damage you and your pet take by 30% for 6 sec.

265046.name: Static Charge
265046.description: Reduces the cooldown of Capacitor Totem by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

265187.name: Summon Demonic Tyrant
265187.description:
Summon a Demonic Tyrant that damages your target for 15 sec. 

Damage dealt by Demonic Tyrant is increased by 10% for each Wild Imp and Dreadstalker active. [Soulbound Tyrant: Generates 0 Soul Shards.]

265221.name: Fireblood
265221.description: Removes all poison, disease, curse, magic, and bleed effects and increases your primary stat by (84 * 3) and an additional 84 for each effect removed. Lasts 8 sec.

266086.name: Rain of Chaos
266086.description: While your initial Infernal is active, every Soul Shard you spend has a $s1% chance to summon an additional Infernal that lasts $335236d.

266134.name: Internal Combustion
266134.description: Chaos Bolt consumes up to $s1 sec of $?a445465[Wither's][Immolate's] damage over time effect on your target, instantly dealing that much damage.

266921.name: Born To Be Wild
266921.description: The cooldown of $?c3[Aspect of the Eagle, ][]Aspect of the Cheetah, and Aspect of the Turtle are reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

267116.name: Animal Companion
267116.description: Your Call Pet additionally summons the pet from the bonus slot in your stable. This pet will obey your Kill Command, but cannot use pet family abilities.

267214.name: Sacrificed Souls
267214.description: Shadow Bolt and Demonbolt deal $s1% additional damage per demon you have summoned.

267216.name: Inner Demons
267216.description: You passively summon a Wild Imp to fight for you every $t1 sec.

268175.name: Void Reaver
268175.description: Frailty now also reduces all damage you take from afflicted targets by $s2%.

269513.name: Death from Above
269513.description:
Finishing move that empowers your weapons with energy to perform a deadly attack.

You leap into the air and [Envenom] [Dispatch / Eviscerate] your target on the way back down, with such force that it has a 15% stronger effect.

269650.name: Pyroclasm
269650.description:
Consuming Hot Streak has a $s1% chance to make your next non-instant Pyroblast or Flamestrike cast within $269651d deal $269651s1% additional damage.

Maximum $269651u stacks.

269737.name: Alpha Predator
269737.description: Kill Command now has ${$s1+1} charges, and deals $s2% increased damage.

270233.name: Freezing Rain
270233.description:
Frozen Orb makes Blizzard instant cast.

Blizzard damage increased by $s2%.

270581.name: Natural Mending
270581.description: Exhilaration's cooldown is reduced by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

271877.name: Blade Rush
271877.description:
Charge to your target with your blades out, dealing [(375.3% of Attack Power)% * 230 / 100] Physical damage to the target and (375.3% of Attack Power)% to all other nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8% targets.

While Blade Flurry is active, damage to non-primary targets is increased by 100%.

Generates 25 Energy over 5 sec.

272026.name: Dancing Steel
272026.description: Blade Flurry strikes $s3 additional enemies and its duration is increased by ${$s2/1000} sec.

272651.name: Command Pet
272651.description:
Commands your pet to perform its unique ability. This ability will transform based on the specialization of your active pet. 

Ferocity: Primal Rage
Tenacity: Fortitude of the Bear
Cunning: Master's Call

273221.name: Aftershock
273221.description: Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake have a $s1% chance to refund all Maelstrom spent.

273946.name: Hemostasis
273946.description: Each enemy hit by Blood Boil increases the damage and healing done by your next Death Strike by $273947s1%, stacking up to $273947u times.

273952.name: Grip of the Dead
273952.description: $?s152280[Defile][Death and Decay] reduces the movement speed of enemies within its area by $s1%, decaying by $s2% every sec.

273953.name: Voracious
273953.description: Death Strike's healing is increased by $s2% and grants you $274009s1% Leech for $274009d.

274281.name: New Moon
274281.description:
Deals (258.4% of Spell Power) Astral damage to the target and empowers New Moon to become Half Moon. 

Generates 10 Astral Power.

274586.name: Invigorating Mists
274586.description:
Vivify heals all allies with your Renewing Mist active for $425804s1.

Sheilun's Gift's healing is increased by $s2% on its primary target.

274738.name: Ancestral Call
274738.description: Invoke the spirits of your ancestors, granting you 225 of one of your two highest secondary stat for 15 sec.

274837.name: Feral Frenzy
274837.description:
Unleash a furious frenzy, clawing your target 5 times for [(16.3% of Attack Power) * 5] Physical damage and an additional [5 * (32.67% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 5 combo points.

274902.name: Photosynthesis
274902.description: Your periodic heals on targets with Lifebloom have a $s2% chance to cause it to bloom.

274909.name: Rising Mist
274909.description: Rising Sun Kick extends your Renewing Mist and Enveloping Mist effects by $s1 sec, up to $s2% of their original duration.

275334.name: Punish
275334.description: Shield Slam deals $s1% increased damage and reduces enemies' damage against you by $275335s1% for $275335d. Multiple punishments may overlap.

275336.name: Storm Surge
275336.description: Avatar increases the damage of Thunder Clap by $107574s9% and reduces its cooldown by $107574s10%.

275338.name: Menace
275338.description: Intimidating Shout will cause all nearby enemies except your target to flee in fear for $316595d instead of cowering.

275339.name: Rumbling Earth
275339.description: Shockwave's range increased by $s3 yards and when it strikes at least $s1 targets its cooldown is reduced by $s2 sec.

275773.name: Judgment
275773.description: Judges the target, dealing (123.75% of Spell Power) Holy damage [Greater Judgment: and preventing [(Shadow spell power * 483 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] damage dealt by the target]. [Judgment: Generates 1 Holy Power.]

275779.name: Judgment
275779.description: Judges the target, dealing (190% of Spell Power) Holy damage [Greater Judgment: and causing them to take 20% increased damage from your next Holy Power ability].

276023.name: Harbinger of Doom
276023.description:
Sudden Doom triggers $s2% more often and can accumulate up to ${$m1+1} charges.

Summoning a Lesser Ghoul with Scourge Strike reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by ${$s3/1000}.1 sec.

276079.name: Death's Reach
276079.description:
Increases the range of Death Grip by $s1 yds.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Death Grip.

277953.name: Night Terrors
277953.description: Shuriken Storm reduces enemies' movement speed by $206760s1% for $206760d.

278326.name: Consume Magic
278326.description: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target [Swallowed Anger: and granting you 20 Fury].

279302.name: Frostwyrm's Fury
279302.description: Summons a frostwyrm who breathes on all enemies within 40 yd in front of you, dealing (370.75% of Attack Power) Frost damage, stunning enemies for 3 sec, and slowing movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

279620.name: Twin Moons
279620.description: Moonfire deals $s2% increased damage and also hits another nearby enemy within $s1 yds of the target.

279876.name: Opportunity
279876.description:
Sinister Strike has a $s1% chance to hit an additional time and grant Opportunity.

$@spellicon195627 $@spellname195627
Your next Pistol Shot costs $195627s1% less Energy and deals $195627s2% increased damage.

280197.name: Spiritual Focus
280197.description: The cooldown of $?s152173[Serenity][Zenith] is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

280373.name: Redoubt
280373.description: Armor granted by Shield of the Righteous is increased by up to $s1%, based on your missing health.

280392.name: Meat Cleaver
280392.description: Whirlwind $?s436707[and Thunder Clap deal][deals] $s1% additional damage when $?s436707[they hit][it hits] $s2 or more targets.

280515.name: Bob and Weave
280515.description: Increases the duration of |CFFffffffStagger|R by ${$s1/10}.1 sec, causing |CFFffffffStaggered|R damage to be dealt to you more gradually.

280716.name: Leeching Poison
280716.description: Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you ${$108211s1}.1% Leech.

280719.name: Secret Technique
280719.description:
Finishing move that creates shadow clones of yourself. You and your shadow clones each perform a piercing attack on all enemies near your target, dealing Physical damage to the primary target and reduced damage to other targets.
   1 point  : [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 3] total damage
   2 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 2 * 3] total damage
   3 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 3 * 3] total damage
   4 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 4 * 3] total damage
   5 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 5 * 3] total damage
[   6 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 6 * 3] total damage]
[   7 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 7 * 3] total damage]

281001.name: Massacre
281001.description: $?a317320[Condemn][Execute] is usable on targets below $s2% health.

281238.name: Obliteration
281238.description:
During Pillar of Frost, Frost Strike$?s194913[, Glacial Advance,][] and Howling Blast always grant Killing Machine and have a $s2% chance to generate a Rune.

Additionally during Pillar of Frost, Empower Rune Weapon causes your next Obliterate or Frostscythe to cost no Runes.

281482.name: Reverberate
281482.description: Arcane Pulse has a $s1% chance to repeat its explosion at $s2% effectiveness.

281954.name: Pterrordax Swoop
281954.description: Reduces your falling speed for 2 min.

285381.name: Primal Wrath
285381.description:
Finishing move that deals instant damage and applies Rip to all enemies within 10 yards. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 2] plus Rip for (2 * 2) sec
   2 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 3] plus Rip for (2 * 3) sec
   3 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 4] plus Rip for (2 * 4) sec
   4 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 5] plus Rip for (2 * 5) sec
   5 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 6] plus Rip for (2 * 6) sec

287712.name: Haymaker
287712.description: Wind up, then unleash your might upon your foe, dealing [Attack Power * 0.75 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage, stunning for 3 sec, and knocking them back substantially.

288613.name: Trueshot
288613.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 15 sec.

 Aimed Shot
Cooldown recovers 40% faster.

 Rapid Fire
Cooldown recovers 60% faster.
[
Applies Spotter's Mark.]

288733.name: Intangibility
288733.description: Dispersion heals you for an additional $<intangheal>% of your maximum health over its duration and its cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

288848.name: Necromancer's Cunning
288848.description: When your Lesser Ghouls expire, they explode in viscera, dealing $<damage> Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

289237.name: Master Shapeshifter
289237.description:
Your abilities are amplified based on your current shapeshift form, granting an additional effect.

Wrath, Starfire, and Starsurge deal $s2% additional damage and generate $411146s1 Mana.

$@spellicon197491|CFFFFFFFFBear Form|R
Ironfur grants $s1% additional armor and generates $411144s1 Mana.

$@spellicon202155 |CFFFFFFFFCat Form|R
Rip, Ferocious Bite, and Maim deal $s3% additional damage and generate $411143s1 Mana when cast with $s4 combo points.

289666.name: Greater Heal
289666.description: An exceptional spell that heals an ally for 40% of their maximum health, ignoring healing reduction effects.

289874.name: Ride the Lightning
289874.description: Stormstrike and Lava Lash unleash a Chain Lightning at $s2% effectiveness that deals $s1% reduced damage with each jump.

290608.name: Crusader's Direhorn
290608.description: Summons a Crusader's Direhorn, which serves as a mount.

291944.name: Regeneratin'
291944.description: Regenerate 50% of your maximum health over 6 sec, interrupted by direct damage.

292752.name: Embrace of the Loa
292752.description:
Choose your Loa by making an offering at Loa Shrines around the world. 

Each Loa offers unique powers. Guards in Dazar'alor will tell you where Shrines can be found.

301768.name: Verdant Heart
301768.description: Frenzied Regeneration and Barkskin increase all healing received by $s1%.

305394.name: Unbound Freedom
305394.description: Blessing of Freedom increases movement speed by $m1%, and you gain Blessing of Freedom when cast on a friendly target.

305483.name: Lightning Lasso
305483.description: Grips the target in lightning, stunning and dealing (3850% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 5 sec while the target is lassoed. Can move while channeling.

312411.name: Bag of Tricks
312411.description: Pull your chosen trick from the bag and use it on target enemy or ally. Enemies take [Attack Power * 2.52 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] damage and are snared by 80% for 4 sec, while allies are healed for [Attack Power * 3.78 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] and move 20% faster for 4 sec.

312425.name: Rummage Your Bag
312425.description: Change the contents of your Bag of Tricks. Now where did you put that...?

315341.name: Between the Eyes
315341.description:
Finishing move that blasts your target with your pistol, dealing Physical damage and increasing your damage dealt by 4%. Multiple instances of this bonus can overlap.
   1 point : [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power)] damage, 4 sec
   2 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 2] damage, 6 sec
   3 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 3] damage, 8 sec
   4 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 4] damage, 10 sec
   5 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 5] damage, 12 sec
[   6 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 6] damage, 14 sec]
[   7 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 7] damage, 16 sec]

315496.name: Slice and Dice
315496.description:
Finishing move that consumes combo points to increase attack speed by 50%. Lasts longer per combo point.
   1 point  : 12 seconds
   2 points: 18 seconds
   3 points: 24 seconds
   4 points: 30 seconds
   5 points: 36 seconds
[   6 points: 42 seconds]
[   7 points: 48 seconds]

315584.name: Instant Poison
315584.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts (7.4% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

315720.name: Onslaught
315720.description:
Brutally attack an enemy for (413.868% of Attack Power) Physical damage [Tenderize: and become Enraged for 4 sec / .]

Generates (300 / 10) Rage.

315924.name: Hand of the Protector
315924.description: When you cast Word of Glory on someone other than yourself, its healing is increased by up to $s1% based on the target's missing health.

316239.name: Rune Strike
316239.description: Strike the target for (60% of Attack Power) Physical damage. This attack cannot be dodged, blocked, or parried.

316402.name: Improved Execute
316402.description: Execute no longer costs Rage and now generates ${$s3/10} Rage.

316405.name: Improved Execute
316405.description: Execute no longer has a cooldown and if your foe survives, $163201s2% of the Rage spent is refunded.

316440.name: Martial Prowess
316440.description: Overpower and Slam increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 5%, stacking up to 3 times.

316803.name: Runic Overflow
316803.description: Increases Frost Strike and Glacial Advance damage by $s1%.

316916.name: Cleaving Strikes
316916.description:
$?a137006[Frostscythe deals $s3% increased damage during Remorseless Winter.][]$?a137008[Heart Strike hits up to $s1][]$?a137007[Scourge Strike and Festering Strike deal $s4% increased damage.][]$?a137008[ additional enemies while you remain in Death and Decay.

When leaving your Death and Decay you retain its bonus effects for ${$s2/1000} sec.][]

317133.name: Improved Vampiric Blood
317133.description: Vampiric Blood's healing and absorb amount is increased by $s1% and duration by ${$s3/1000} sec.

317138.name: Strength of Will
317138.description: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional $s1%.

317610.name: Relish in Blood
317610.description: While Crimson Scourge is active, your next Death and Decay heals you for $317614s1 health per Bone Shield charge and you immediately gain ${$317614s2/10} Runic Power.

318038.name: Flametongue Weapon
318038.description:
Enhancement
Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, causing each of your attacks to deal (3.96% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage.

 Elemental
Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, increasing the damage of your Fire spells by 5.0%.

319066.name: Improved Wound Poison
319066.description: Wound Poison can now stack $s1 additional times.

319175.name: Black Powder
319175.description:
Finishing move that launches explosive Black Powder at all nearby enemies dealing Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. [Shadowed Finishers: All nearby targets with your Find Weakness suffer an additional 30% damage as Shadow]

   1 point  : [(18.5% of Attack Power)] damage
   2 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 2] damage
   3 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 3] damage
   4 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 4] damage
   5 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 5] damage
[   6 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 6] damage]
[   7 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 7] damage]

319836.name: Fire Blast
319836.description: Blasts the enemy for (82.8% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

319930.name: Stormblast
319930.description:
Stormstrike has an additional charge.

Stormsurge now also causes your next Stormstrike to deal $s1% additional damage as Nature damage, stacking up to $470466u times.

319949.name: Improved Backstab
319949.description:
$?s200758[Gloomblade][Backstab] has $s2% increased critical strike chance.

While behind your target, Backstab critical strikes grant Find Weakness for $s1 sec.

319951.name: Improved Shuriken Storm
319951.description:
Shuriken Storm has $s2% increased critical strike chance.

Shuriken Storm critical strikes grant Find Weakness for $s1 sec.

320313.name: Swallowed Anger
320313.description: Consume Magic generates $1277738s1 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.

320331.name: Infernal Armor
320331.description: $?c3[Soul Immolation][Immolation Aura] increases your armor by $s1% and causes melee attackers to suffer ${$320334s1/$s3} $@spelldesc395020 damage.

320361.name: Improved Disrupt
320361.description: Increases the range of Disrupt to ${$s2+$s1} yds.

320374.name: Burning Hatred
320374.description: Immolation Aura generates an additional ${$258922s2*$258920d} Fury over $258920d.

320387.name: Perfectly Balanced Glaive
320387.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fracture by ${$s2/-1000} sec and Throw Glaive by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

320413.name: Critical Chaos
320413.description: The chance that Chaos Strike will refund $193840s1 Fury is increased by $s2% of your critical strike chance.

320416.name: Blazing Path
320416.description: $?a212613[Infernal Strike]?s195072[Fel Rush][Shift] gains an additional charge.

320418.name: Improved Sigil of Misery
320418.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of $?s202138[Chains][Misery] by $?s202138[${$s2/-1000}][${$s1/-1000}] sec.

320635.name: Vengeful Bonds
320635.description: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by $198813s1% for $198813d.

320747.name: Surge of Earth
320747.description: Consume up to 3 charges of Earth Shield to heal up to 3 allies near your Earth Shield target for [(250% of Spell Power) / 3 * (1 + Versatility)] per charge consumed.

321014.name: Pack Tactics
321014.description:
Barbed Shot now instantly grants $1282660s1 Focus.

Passive Focus generation increased by $s1%.

321136.name: Shining Light
321136.description: Every $s1 Shields of the Righteous make your next Word of Glory cost no Holy Power. Maximum $327510U stacks.

321291.name: Death and Madness
321291.description:
If a target dies within $322098d after being struck by Shadow Word: Death, generate ${$321973s1/100} Insanity.

When Shadow Word: Death fails to kill a target below $s2% health, its cooldown is reset. Cannot occur more than once every $390628d.

321297.name: Eyes of the Beast
321297.description: Take direct control of your pet and see through its eyes for 1 min.

321387.name: Enlightened
321387.description:
Arcane damage dealt is increased based on your current mana, up to $1217242s2% at full mana.$?a1243926[][

Mana Regen is increased based on your current mana, up to $1217242s3% when out of mana.]

321420.name: Improved Clearcasting
321420.description: Clearcasting can stack up to $s1 additional times.

321460.name: Deadeye
321460.description: $?a466932[Black Arrow][Kill Shot] now has ${$m1+1} charges and has its cooldown reduced by ${$m2/-1000}.1 sec.

321507.name: Touch of the Magi
321507.description:
Applies Touch of the Magi to your current target, accumulating 20% of the damage you deal to the target for 12 sec, and then exploding for that amount of Arcane damage to the target and reduced damage to all nearby enemies.

Generates 4 Arcane Charges.

321526.name: Mana Adept
321526.description: Arcane Barrage grants you ${$s1/100}.1% of your maximum mana per Arcane Charge spent.

321708.name: Improved Blazing Barrier
321708.description: Blazing Barrier's damage is increased by $s1% and it now cauterizes your wounds, healing you for $s2% of the damage it absorbs.

321745.name: Improved Prismatic Barrier
321745.description: Prismatic Barrier further reduces magical damage taken by an additional $s1% and duration of harmful Magic effects by $s2%.

322101.name: Expel Harm
322101.description: Expel negative chi from your body, healing for (120% of Spell Power) and dealing 10% of the amount healed as Nature damage to an enemy within 20 yards. [Expel Harm: Draws in the positive chi of all your Healing Spheres to increase the healing of Expel Harm] [Reverse Harm: Generates [(120% of Spell Power) + 30] Chi.]

322109.name: Touch of Death
322109.description:
You exploit the enemy target's weakest point, instantly dealing damage equal to 100% of your maximum health to [Improved Touch of Death: creatures if they have less health than you / them.
