Only usable on creatures that have less health than you] [Deals damage equal to 35% of your maximum health against players and stronger creatures under 15% health / .] [Touch of Death: Reduces delayed Stagger damage by 200% of damage dealt] [Spawns 3 Chi Spheres, granting 1 Chi when you walk through them] [Increases the Monk's Physical damage by 15% for 10 sec]

322113.name: Improved Touch of Death
322113.description: Touch of Death can now be used on targets with less than $s1% health remaining, dealing $s2% of your maximum health in damage.

322115.name: Light's Promise
322115.description: Power Word: Radiance gains an additional charge.

322118.name: Invoke Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent
322118.description:
Summons an effigy of Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent for 25 sec. Yu'lon will heal injured allies with Soothing Breath, healing the target and up to 2 allies for (210% of Spell Power) over 4.5 sec. 

Enveloping Mist costs 50% less mana while Yu'lon is active.

322120.name: Shuffle
322120.description:
Niuzao's teachings allow you to shuffle during combat, increasing the effectiveness of your |CFFffffffStagger|R by $s1%.

Shuffle is granted by attacking enemies with your Keg Smash, Blackout Kick, and Spinning Crane Kick.

$@spellicon115069 $@spellname115069: $@spelldesc115069

322507.name: Celestial Brew
322507.description: A swig of strong brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 0 damage.

322729.name: Spinning Crane Kick
322729.description: Spin while kicking in the air, dealing [4 * (10% of Attack Power)] Physical damage over 1.5 sec to enemies within 8 yds. [Spinning Crane Kick: Dealing damage with Spinning Crane Kick grants Shuffle for 1 sec, and your Healing Spheres travel towards you]

322740.name: Mighty Stomp
322740.description: While active, Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox can be recast to cause Niuzao to stomp mightily and knock nearby enemies into the air.

322960.name: Fortifying Brew: Determination
322960.description:
Fortifying Brew increases |CFFffffffStagger|R effectiveness by $s1% while active.

Combines with other Fortifying Brew effects.

325028.name: Death Chakram
325028.description:
Throw a deadly chakram at your current target that will rapidly deal (31.6% of Attack Power) Shadow damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby. Enemies struck by Death Chakram take 10% more Physical damage from you and your pet for 10 sec.

Each time the chakram deals damage, its damage is increased by 15% and you generate 3 Focus.

325093.name: Light Brewing
325093.description: Reduces the cooldown of Purifying Brew, Celestial Brew, and Celestial Infusion by $s1%.

325153.name: Exploding Keg
325153.description:
Hurls a flaming keg at the target location, dealing (380% of Attack Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies, causing your attacks against them to deal (30% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage, and causing their melee attacks to deal 100% reduced damage for the next 3 sec.

Resets the cooldown of Keg Smash.

325197.name: Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane
325197.description:
Summon an effigy of Chi-Ji for 25 sec that kicks up 3 Gust of Mists when you Blackout Kick, Rising Sun Kick, or Spinning Crane Kick, healing up to 2 allies for [(0.1% of Spell Power) * 50 / 100].

Chi-Ji's presence makes you immune to movement impairing effects, makes Enveloping Mist instant cast, and reduces the mana cost of Enveloping Mist by 20%.

325201.name: Dance of Chi-Ji
325201.description: Spending Chi has a chance to make your next Spinning Crane Kick cost no Chi.

326732.name: Empyrean Power
326732.description: $?s404542[Crusading Strikes has a $s2%][Crusader Strike has a $s1%] chance to make your next Divine Storm free and deal $326733s1% additional damage.

326734.name: Healing Hands
326734.description:
The cooldown of Lay on Hands is reduced up to $s1%, based on the target's missing health.

Word of Glory's healing is increased by up to $m3% on yourself, based on your missing health.

326853.name: Ruinous Bulwark
326853.description: Fel Devastation heals for an additional $s1%, and $s2% of its healing is converted into an absorb shield for $326863d.

327163.name: Primordial Wave
327163.description:
Restoration
Blast your target with a Primordial Wave, dealing (65% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and apply Flame Shock to an enemy, or heal an ally for (65% of Spell Power) and apply Riptide to them.

Your next Healing Wave will also hit all targets affected by your Riptide for 60% of normal healing.

 Elemental
Blast your target with a Primordial Wave, dealing (65% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and apply Flame Shock to an enemy, or heal an ally for (65% of Spell Power).

Your next Lava Burst will also hit all targets affected by your Flame Shock for 80% of normal damage.

 Enhancement
Blast your target with a Primordial Wave, dealing (65% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and apply Flame Shock to an enemy, or heal an ally for (65% of Spell Power).

Your next Lightning Bolt will also hit all targets affected by your Flame Shock for 150% of normal damage.

327541.name: Aetherial Kindling
327541.description: Casting Starfall extends the duration of active Moonfires and Sunfires by ${$s1}.1 sec, up to $s2 sec.

327993.name: Improved Barkskin
327993.description: Barkskin's duration is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec.

328085.name: Blindside
328085.description: Ambush and Mutilate have a $s1% chance to make your next Ambush free and usable without Stealth. Chance increased to $s2% if the target is under $s3% health.

328670.name: Hasty Provocation
328670.description: Provoked targets move towards you at $s1% increased speed.

328725.name: Mortal Dance
328725.description: Blade Dance now reduces targets' healing received by $356608s1% for $356608d.

328930.name: Fae Transfusion
328930.description:
Transfer the life force of up to 4 enemies in the targeted area, dealing [((117.5% of Spell Power) * 3 / 0.5) + (117.5% of Spell Power)] Nature damage evenly split to each enemy target over 3 sec. [ Enhancement: Fully channeling Fae Transfusion generates 3 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon]

Pressing Fae Transfusion again within 20 sec will release 60% of all damage from Fae Transfusion, healing up to 4 allies within 20 yds.

329042.name: Emerald Slumber
329042.description:
Embrace the Emerald Dream, causing you to enter a deep slumber for 8 sec. While sleeping, all other cooldowns recover 400% faster, and allies within 40 yds are healed for 0 every 1 sec.

Direct damage taken may awaken you.

333889.name: Fel Domination
333889.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

333919.name: Echo of the Elements
333919.description: $?s137039[Riptide and Lava Burst have][Lava Burst has] an additional charge.

334033.name: Molten Assault
334033.description: Lava Lash cooldown reduced by ${$m1/-1000}.1 sec, and if Lava Lash is used against a target affected by your Flame Shock, Flame Shock will be spread to up to $s2 nearby enemies.

334046.name: Lashing Flames
334046.description: Lava Lash and Sundering increases the damage of Flame Shock on its target by $334168s1% for $334168d.

334275.name: Curse of Exhaustion
334275.description:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

334308.name: Chaining Storms
334308.description: Chain Lightning now jumps to $s2 additional targets and deals $s1% increased damage.

334779.name: Collateral Damage
334779.description: When an ability used during Sweeping Strikes damages a second target, your next Cleave or Whirlwind deals $334783s1% increased damage, stacking up to $334783u times.

335077.name: Frenzy
335077.description: Rampage increases your haste by $s1% for $335082d. Multiple instances of this effect may overlap.

335467.name: Shadow Word: Madness
335467.description:
A word of madness haunts the target's mind, dealing (227.5% of Spell Power) Shadow damage instantly plus an additional 9 Shadow damage over 6 sec. Heals you for 30% of damage dealt.

When reapplied to a target, all remaining damage is added to the new effect.

336639.name: Charred Flesh
336639.description: Immolation Aura damage increases the duration of your Fiery Brand and Sigil of Flame by ${$s1/1000}.2 sec.

341167.name: Mental Agility
341167.description: Reduces the mana cost of $?a137033[Purify Disease][Purify] and Mass Dispel by $s1% and Dispel Magic by $s2%.

341240.name: Improved Voidform
341240.description: Voidform generates $s1 Insanity and increases your spell damage by an additonal $s2%.

341491.name: Shadowy Apparitions
341491.description: Shadow Word: Madness conjures Shadowy Apparitions that float towards all targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch for $413231s1 Shadow damage.

341997.name: Renewed Faith
341997.description: Your healing on allies with your Renew is increased by $s1%.

342231.name: Arcane Echo
342231.description: Direct damage you deal to enemies affected by $?s461264[Nether Flux][Touch of the Magi], causes an explosion that deals $?s461264[${$342232s1*$s3}][$342232s1] Arcane damage to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond $s1 targets.

342245.name: Alter Time
342245.description: Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 sec. Effect negated by long distance or death.

342249.name: Master of Time
342249.description: Reduces the cooldown of $?a1244090[Temporal Realignment][Alter Time] by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

342344.name: From the Ashes
342344.description:
Fire Blast damage increased by $s2%. 

Your direct damage spells reduce the cooldown of Fire Blast by ${$s1/-1000}.2 sec.

342601.name: Ritual of Doom
342601.description: Begins a ritual that sacrifices a random participant to summon a doomguard. Requires the caster and 4 additional party members to complete the ritual.

343014.name: Revel in Pain
343014.description:
${$s1/10}.1% of your Fire damage shields you, up to a maximum of ${$MHP*$s2/100}.

Shield and maximum values are doubled while Fiery Brand is active.

343127.name: Teleport
343127.description: Teleports you to a major city.

343140.name: Portal
343140.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to a Major City.

343160.name: Premeditation
343160.description: After entering Stealth, your next combo point generating ability generates full combo points.

343183.name: Improved Frost Nova
343183.description: Frost Nova duration is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec.

343207.name: Focused Cleave
343207.description: Soul Cleave deals $s1% increased damage to your primary target.

343230.name: Mote of Flame
343230.description: All Fire damage dealt increased by $s1%.

343242.name: Wilderness Medicine
343242.description: Mend Pet heals for an additional ${$m1*$136d/$136t1}% of your pet's health over its duration, and has a $s2% chance to dispel a magic effect each time it heals your pet.

343244.name: Disruptive Rounds
343244.description: When $?c3[Muzzle][Counter Shot] interrupts a cast, gain $459976s1 Focus.

343247.name: Improved Traps
343247.description: The cooldown of Tar Trap and Freezing Trap is reduced by ${$m1/-1000}.1 sec.

343248.name: Deathblow
343248.description:
$?c2[Aimed Shot][Kill Command] has a $?c1[$s2]?c2[$s1][$s3]% chance to grant Deathblow.

$@spellicon378770 $@spellname378770
The cooldown of $?a466932[Black Arrow][Kill Shot] is reset. $@spellaura378770

343294.name: Soul Reaper
343294.description:
Rupture the soul of your enemy, dealing (450% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and causing the foe to take 20% increased damage from your diseases and minions for 8 sec.

Only usable on enemies below 35% maximum health.

Consumes up to 2 available charges to cast Putrefy.

343311.name: Furious Gaze
343311.description: When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional $343312s1% for $343312d.

343527.name: Execution Sentence
343527.description:
Unleash a heavenly blast around the target, dealing (505.312% of Attack Power) Holy damage to all enemies nearby, and call down a hammer that slowly falls from the sky upon the target. 

After 10 sec, they suffer 20% of the Holy damage you dealt to all targets affected by the initial blast during that time.

343647.name: Solstice
343647.description: During the first $343648d of every Eclipse, Shooting Stars fall $s1% more often.

343655.name: Celestial Harmony
343655.description:
When activated, Yu'lon and Chi-Ji apply Chi Cocoons to $406139s3 targets within $406139r yds, absorbing $<newshield> damage for $406139d.

Chi-Ji grants $s4 stacks of Teachings of the Monastery when invoked.

Yu'lon reduces the cast speed of Enveloping Mist by $322118s6%.

344357.name: Stormflurry
344357.description: Stormstrike has a $s1% chance to strike the target an additional time for $s2% of normal damage. This effect can chain off of itself.

344359.name: Ancient Arts
344359.description: Reduces the cooldown of Paralysis by ${$abs($s0/1000)} sec and the cooldown of Leg Sweep by ${$s2/-1000} sec.

344572.name: Bestial Wrath
344572.description: Sends you and your pet into a rage, instantly dealing (800% of Attack Power) Physical damage to its target, and increasing all damage you both deal by 20% for 15 sec. Removes all crowd control effects from your pet. [Scent of Blood: Activating Bestial Wrath grants 0 charges of Barbed Shot]

344859.name: Demon's Bite
344859.description:
Quickly attack for (105.05% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Generates 20 to 30 Fury.

344862.name: Chaos Strike
344862.description: Slice your target for [(69.432% of Attack Power) + (109.12% of Attack Power)] Chaos damage. Chaos Strike has a [Min(20, 100)]% chance to refund 20 Fury.

344865.name: Fel Rush
344865.description: Rush forward, incinerating anything in your path for (43.4673% of Attack Power) Chaos damage.

345208.name: Infected Wounds
345208.description: Mangle and Maul cause an Infected Wound in the target, reducing their movement speed by $345209s1% for $345209d.

347461.name: Unbound Chaos
347461.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase the damage of your next Fel Rush or Felblade by $s2%. Lasts $347462d.

351338.name: Quell
351338.description: Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.

352278.name: Ice Wall
352278.description: Conjures an Ice Wall 30 yards long that obstructs line of sight. The wall has 30% of your maximum health and lasts up to 15 sec.

353082.name: Ring of Fire
353082.description: Summons a Ring of Fire for 8 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are disoriented and burn for 3% of their total health over 3 sec.

353128.name: Arcanosphere
353128.description: Builds a sphere of Arcane energy, gaining power over 4 sec. Upon release, the sphere passes through any barriers, knocking enemies back and dealing up to [(735% of Spell Power) * 4] Arcane damage.

353294.name: Shadow Rift
353294.description:
Conjure a Shadow Rift at the target location lasting 2 sec. Enemy players within the rift when it expires are teleported to your Demonic Circle.

Must be within 40 yds of your Demonic Circle to cast.

353753.name: Bonds of Fel
353753.description: Encircle enemy players with Bonds of Fel. If any affected player leaves the 8 yd radius they explode, dealing (728% of Spell Power) Fire damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

354540.name: Nimble Brew
354540.description: Douse allies in the targeted area with Nimble Brew, preventing the next full loss of control effect within 8 sec.

354654.name: Grove Protection
354654.description: Summon a grove to protect allies in the area for 10 sec, reducing damage taken by 50% from enemies outside the grove.

354831.name: Wailing Arrow
354831.description: Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing (277.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to your target and an additional (112.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Targets struck by a Wailing Arrow are silenced for 5 sec.

355580.name: Static Field Totem
355580.description: Summons a totem with 4% of your health at the target location for 6 sec that forms a circuit of electricity that enemies cannot pass through.

355630.name: Windveil
355630.description: Interrupting a spell with Wind Shear reduces all spell damage taken by $355634s1% for $355634d.

355897.name: Inner Light
355897.description:
[Inner Light: Embrace the light, reducing the mana cost of healing spells by 10% /  Inner Light: Healing spells cost 10% less mana.

Inner Shadow: Spell damage and Atonement healing increased by 10%.

Activate to swap from one effect to the other, incurring a 6 sec cooldown.]

355913.name: Emerald Blossom
355913.description: Grow a bulb from the Emerald Dream at an ally's location. After 1.5 sec, heal up to 3 injured allies within 10 yds for (323% of Spell Power).

355936.name: Dream Breath
355936.description:
Inhale, gathering the power of the Dream. Release to exhale, healing yourself and 5 injured allies in a 40 yd cone in front of you for [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * (8 + 0)].

I:   Heals (184.32% of Spell Power) instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (8 + 0)] over (16 + 0) sec.

II:  Heals [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * 2] instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (6 + 0)] over (12 + 0) sec.

III: Heals [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * 4] instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (4 + 0)] over (8 + 0) sec.

356367.name: Death's Echo
356367.description: Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have $s1 additional charge.

356707.name: Wild Kingdom
356707.description: Call in help from one of your dismissed Cunning pets for 10 sec. Your current pet is dismissed to rest and heal 30% of maximum health.

356719.name: Chimaeral Sting
356719.description:
Stings the target, dealing (150% of Attack Power) Nature damage and initiating a series of venoms. Each lasts 3 sec and applies the next effect after the previous one ends.

 Scorpid Venom:
90% reduced movement speed.

 Spider Venom:
Silenced.

 Viper Venom:
20% reduced damage and healing.

356995.name: Disintegrate
356995.description: Tear into an enemy with a blast of blue magic, inflicting (475.53% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage over 3 sec, and slowing their movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

357170.name: Time Dilation
357170.description: Stretch time around an ally for the next 8 sec, causing 50% of damage they would take to instead be dealt over 8 sec.

357208.name: Fire Breath
357208.description:
Inhale, stoking your inner flame. Release to exhale, burning enemies in a cone in front of you for [((163.409% of Spell Power)) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * (10 + 0 + 0))] Fire damage, reduced beyond 5 targets. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 2 sec]

Empowering causes more of the damage to be dealt immediately instead of over time.

I:   Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (10 + 0 + 0)] over (20 + 0 + 0) sec.

II:  Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * 3)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (7 + 0 + 0)] over (14 + 0 + 0) sec.

III: Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * 6)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (4 + 0 + 0)] over (8 + 0 + 0) sec.

357210.name: Deep Breath
357210.description:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, spewing molten cinders dealing (400% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage to enemies in your path.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 5 sec]

357211.name: Pyre
357211.description: Lob a ball of flame, dealing (400.277% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your target and all enemies within 8 yds.

357214.name: Wing Buffet
357214.description: With a powerful flap of your wings, knock away enemies in front of you.

358267.name: Hover
358267.description:
Launch yourself and gain 30% increased movement speed for (6 + 0) sec.

Allows Evoker spells to be cast while moving and is castable while casting. Does not affect empowered spells.

358385.name: Landslide
358385.description: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

358733.name: Glide
358733.description:
Reduces your falling speed.

You can activate this ability with the jump key while falling.

359053.name: Smoke Bomb
359053.description: Creates a cloud of thick smoke in an 8 yard radius around the Rogue for 5 sec. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the smoke cloud.

359073.name: Eternity Surge
359073.description:
Focus your energies to release a salvo of pure magic, dealing [(1088.47% of Spell Power)] Spellfrost damage to an enemy. Damages additional enemies within 25 yds when empowered.

I:   Damages [Eternity's Span: 2 enemies enemy].

II:  Damages [Eternity's Span: 4 enemies / 2 enemies].

III: Damages [Eternity's Span: 6 enemies / 3 enemies].

359793.name: Fluttering Seedlings
359793.description:
Emerald Blossom sends out $s1 flying $Lseedling:seedlings; when it bursts, plus up to $s3 additional seedlings if Emerald Blossom heals fewer than $355916s2 allies.

Seedlings each heal an ally up to $s2 yds away for $361361s1.

359816.name: Dream Flight
359816.description:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, healing all allies in your path for (500% of Spell Power) immediately, and (1000% of Spell Power) over 15 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

Damage taken while you are flying is absorbed, up to 100% of your maximum health.

360194.name: Deathmark
360194.description:
Carve a deathmark into an enemy, dealing (320% of Attack Power) Bleed damage and restoring (10 * 8) Energy to you over 16 sec. Damage dealt to the target by your Garrote, Rupture, and Lethal Poisons is increased by 100%.

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to the target, apply it twice.

360806.name: Sleep Walk
360806.description: Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.

360823.name: Naturalize
360823.description: Cleanses harmful effects from the target, removing all Magic and Poison effects.

360827.name: Blistering Scales
360827.description:
Protect an ally with 15 explosive dragonscales, increasing their Armor by 20% of your own.

Melee attacks against the target cause 1 scale to explode, dealing [$INT * 0.3 * (1 + Versatility) * Percent Damage] Volcanic damage to enemies near them. This damage can only occur every few sec.

Blistering Scales can only be placed on one target at a time. Casts on your enemy's target if they have one.

360995.name: Verdant Embrace
360995.description: Fly to an ally and heal them for (1058% of Spell Power), or heal yourself for the same amount.

361021.name: Sense Power
361021.description: Gauge the magical energy of your allies, showing you when they are using an exceptionally powerful ability.

361178.name: Mass Return
361178.description: Brings all dead party members back to life with 35% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

361469.name: Living Flame
361469.description:
Send a flickering flame towards your target, [ Preservation: healing an ally for (600% of Spell Power) or dealing (232.001% of Spell Power) Fire damage to an enemy / 

 Devastation,  Augmentation
dealing (232.001% of Spell Power) Fire damage to an enemy or healing an ally for (600% of Spell Power)]

362874.name: Temporal Compression
362874.description: Each cast of a Bronze spell causes your next empower spell to reach maximum level in $s1% less time, stacking up to $362877u times.

362969.name: Azure Strike
362969.description: Project intense energy onto 2 enemies, dealing (163.185% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage to them.

363534.name: Rewind
363534.description:
Rewind 30% of damage taken in the last 5 seconds by all allies within 40 yds. Always heals for at least (Spell Power * 0.4 * 5).

Healing increased by 200% when not in a raid.

363916.name: Obsidian Scales
363916.description: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% [Renewing Blaze: and causing you to be healed over 8 sec equal to the damage it prevented]. Lasts 12 sec.

364342.name: Blessing of the Bronze
364342.description: Weave the threads of time, reducing the cooldown of a major movement ability for all party and raid members by 15% for 1 hour.

364343.name: Echo
364343.description: Wrap an ally with temporal energy, healing them for (240% of Spell Power) and causing your next healing spell to cast an additional time on that ally at [ceil(70 / Time Lord: 105 / Golden Opportunity: 77)]% of normal healing. Essence spells cannot be Echoed.

365350.name: Arcane Surge
365350.description:
Expend all of your current mana to annihilate your enemy target and nearby enemies for up to [(372% of Spell Power) * 2] Arcane damage based on Mana spent. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

For the next 15 sec, your Mana regeneration is increased by 425% and spell damage is increased by 35%.

Generates Clearcasting.

365585.name: Expunge
365585.description: Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.

365937.name: Ruby Embers
365937.description: Living Flame deals $361500o2 damage over $361500d to enemies, or restores $361509o2 health to allies over $361509d. Stacks $361509u times.

366155.name: Reversion
366155.description:
Reverse an ally's injuries, [Golden Hour: instantly healing them for 15% of damage taken in the last 5 sec and an additional / healing them for] (256.5% of Spell Power) over 12 sec.

When Reversion critically heals, its duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

368275.name: Binding Heals
368275.description: $s1% of Flash Heal healing on other targets also heals you.

368412.name: Time of Need
368412.description:
When you or an ally fall below $s1% health, a version of yourself enters your timeline and heals them for $<amount>. Your alternate self continues healing for $368415d before returning to their timeline.

May only occur once every $s2 sec.

368838.name: Heavy Wingbeats
368838.description: Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-60000} min.

368970.name: Tail Swipe
368970.description: Lash out with your tail, knocking enemies within 8 yds into the air.

369089.name: Volatility
369089.description: Pyre has a $s1% chance to flare up and explode again on a nearby target.

369297.name: Essence Burst
369297.description: Living Flame has a $s1% chance, and Reversion has a $s2% chance to make your next Essence ability free.$?s375722[ Stacks $359618u times.][]

369459.name: Source of Magic
369459.description: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

369536.name: Soar
369536.description: Muster your strength and launch into the air.

369846.name: Feed the Flames
369846.description:
After casting $411288s2 Pyres, your next Pyre will explode into a Firestorm.

$@spellicon368847 $@spellname368847
$@spelldesc368847

369913.name: Natural Convergence
369913.description: Disintegrate channels $s1% faster$?c3[ and Eruption's cast time is reduced by $s3%][].

369939.name: Leaping Flames
369939.description: Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.

369990.name: Ancient Flame
369990.description: Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by $375583s1%.

370062.name: Field of Dreams
370062.description: Every other Emerald Blossom has a $s1% chance for one of your Fluttering Seedlings to grow into a new Emerald Blossom.

370388.name: Swoop Up
370388.description: Grab an enemy and fly with them to the target location.

370455.name: Charged Blast
370455.description: Your Blue damage increases the damage of your next Pyre by $370454s1%, stacking $370454u times.

370537.name: Stasis
370537.description: Causes your next 3 helpful spells to be duplicated and stored in a time lock. You may reactivate Stasis any time within 30 sec to quickly unleash their magic.

370553.name: Tip the Scales
370553.description: Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.

370586.name: Elune's Favored
370586.description: While in Bear Form, you are healed for $s1% of all Arcane damage done.

370626.name: Gift of the Naaru
370626.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

370665.name: Rescue
370665.description: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

370695.name: Fury of Nature
370695.description: While in Bear Form, you deal $s1% increased Arcane damage.

370781.name: Imminent Destruction
370781.description: Deep Breath reduces the Essence costs of your next $s1 Disintegrates and Pyres by $411055s1. Stacks up to $411055U times.

370819.name: Scorching Embers
370819.description: Enemies affected by Fire Breath's damage over time effect take $s1% increased damage from your Red spells.

370821.name: Scintillation
370821.description: Disintegrate has a $s2% chance each time it deals damage to launch a level 1 Eternity Surge at $s1% power.

370837.name: Engulfing Blaze
370837.description: Living Flame deals $s2% increased damage and healing and its cast time is reduced by ${$s1/-1000}.1 sec.

370839.name: Power Swell
370839.description: Casting an empower spell increases your Essence regeneration rate by $376850s1% for $376850d.

370845.name: Spellweaver's Dominance
370845.description: Your damaging critical strikes deal ${$s1+200}% damage instead of the usual 200%.

370867.name: Iridescence
370867.description: Casting an empower spell increases the damage of your next $386353u spells of the same color by $386353s1% within $386353d.

370888.name: Twin Guardian
370888.description: Rescue increases movement speed by $370889s2% and allows spells to be cast while moving for $370889d.

370960.name: Emerald Communion
370960.description:
Commune with the Emerald Dream, restoring 20% health and 2% mana every 1 sec for 5 sec. Overhealing is transferred to an injured ally within 40 yds.

Castable while stunned, disoriented, incapacitated, or silenced.

370965.name: The Hunt
370965.description: Charge to your target, striking them for (664.5% of Attack Power) Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting (429% of Attack Power) Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

371032.name: Terror of the Skies
371032.description: $?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath] stuns enemies for $372245d.

371034.name: Lay Waste
371034.description: Deep Breath's damage is increased by $s1%.

371038.name: Honed Aggression
371038.description: The critical strike chance of your spells is increased by $s1%.

371257.name: Renewing Breath
371257.description: Dream Breath healing is increased by $s1%.

371426.name: Life-Giver's Flame
371426.description: Fire Breath and Deep Breath heal $s3 nearby injured allies for $s1% of damage done to up to $s2 targets, split evenly among them.

371806.name: Recall
371806.description: You may reactivate $?s359816[Dream Flight and ][]$?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath] within $s1 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.

371905.name: After the Wildfire
371905.description: Every $s2 Rage you spend causes a burst of restorative energy, healing up to $s3 allies within $371982A1 yds for $371982s1.

372048.name: Oppressing Roar
372048.description: Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec. [Overawe: Removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy]

372119.name: Dream of Cenarius
372119.description: When you take non-periodic damage, you have a chance to cause your next Regrowth to heal for an additional $372152s4%, and to be instant, free, and castable in all forms for $372152d.

372233.name: Energy Loop
372233.description: Disintegrate deals $s2% more damage and generates ${$372234s1*4} mana over its duration.

372307.name: Burning Vehemence
372307.description:
Increases the damage of Holy Fire by $s1%.

Holy Fire deals $s3% of its initial damage to all nearby enemies within $400370A1 yards of your target. Damage reduced beyond $400370s2 targets.

372370.name: Gales of Song
372370.description: While channeling Divine Hymn, place $s2 stacks of Prayer of Mending on up to $s3 allies within its range every ${$64843d/$64843s5}.1 sec.

372469.name: Scarlet Adaptation
372469.description: Store $s1% of your effective healing, up to $<cap>. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.

372567.name: Twin Moonfire
372567.description: Moonfire deals $s2% increased damage and also hits another nearby enemy within $279620s1 yds of the target.

372616.name: Empyreal Blaze
372616.description:
Holy Word: Chastise causes your next $s1 casts of Holy Fire to be instant, cost no mana, and incur no cooldown.

Refreshing Holy Fire on a target now extends its duration by $14914d.

372618.name: Vulnerable Flesh
372618.description: Maul and Raze deal $s1% increased damage.

372943.name: Untamed Savagery
372943.description: Increases the damage and radius of Thrash by $s1%.

372945.name: Reinvigoration
372945.description: Frenzied Regeneration heals over ${$s1/1000}.1 additional sec and casts Rejuvenation and Regrowth on you at $s3% effectiveness.

372969.name: Holy Ray
372969.description: Each successive Penance bolt during a channel deals $s1% increased damage and healing.

372972.name: Dark Indulgence
372972.description: Mind Blast has a $s1% chance to grant Power of the Dark Side and deals $s2% additional damage.

372991.name: Pain Transformation
372991.description: Pain Suppression also heals your target for $372994s1% of their maximum health and applies Atonement.

373003.name: Revel in Darkness
373003.description: Shadow Word: Pain deals $s1% additional damage and spreads to $s2 additional $Ltarget:targets; when you cast Penance to its target.

373035.name: Protector of the Frail
373035.description:
Pain Suppression gains an additional charge.

Power Word: Shield reduces the cooldown of Pain Suppression by ${$abs($s2/1000)} sec.

373049.name: Indemnity
373049.description: Atonements granted by Power Word: Shield last an additional $s1 sec.

373054.name: Abyssal Reverie
373054.description: Atonement heals for $s1% more when activated by Shadow spells.

373180.name: Harsh Discipline
373180.description: Power Word: Radiance causes your next Penance to fire $s2 additional $Lbolt:bolts;, stacking up to $373183u charges.

373202.name: Mind Devourer
373202.description: Mind Blast has a $s1% chance to make your next Shadow Word: Madness cost no Insanity and deal $373204s2% additional damage.

373212.name: Insidious Ire
373212.description: While you have Shadow Word: Pain, Shadow Word: Madness, and Vampiric Touch active on the same target, your Mind Blast, Void Torrent, Mind Flay, and Void Volley deal $s1% more damage.

373223.name: Tithe Evasion
373223.description: Shadow Word: Death deals $s1% less damage to you.

373270.name: Lifebind
373270.description: Verdant Embrace temporarily bonds your life with an ally, causing your healing on either partner to heal the other for $s1% of the amount. Lasts $373267d.

373273.name: Idol of Yogg-Saron
373273.description:
After conjuring Shadowy Apparitions, gain a stack of Idol of Yogg-Saron. At $s1 stacks, you summon a Thing from Beyond that casts Void Spike at nearby enemies for $373277d.

$@spellicon373279 $@spellname373279
$@spelldesc373279

373280.name: Idol of N'Zoth
373280.description:
You create Horrific Visions when casting harmful spells on enemies.

At $s1 stacks of Horrific Visions, your target sees a nightmare, dealing $1243105s1 Shadow damage and granting you ${$1243113o1/100} Insanity over $1243113s2 sec.

At $s2 stacks, your target witnesses a vision of N'Zoth, dealing $1243106s1 Shadow damage and granting you ${$1243114o1/100} Insanity over $1243114s2 sec.

373310.name: Idol of Y'Shaarj
373310.description: While Shadowfiend, Mindbender, or Voidwraith are active, your haste is increased by $373316s1%.

373427.name: Inescapable Torment
373427.description: $?a137032[Penance, ][]Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death cause your Shadowfiend, Mindbender, and Voidwraith to teleport behind your target, slashing up to $s1 nearby enemies for $<value> Shadow damage and extending their durations by ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

373446.name: Translucent Image
373446.description: Fade reduces damage you take by $373447s1%.

373450.name: Light's Inspiration
373450.description: Increases the maximum health gained from Desperate Prayer by $s1%.

373456.name: Unwavering Will
373456.description: While above $s2% health, the cast time of your $?a137033[Flash Heal is]?a137032[Flash Heal and Smite are][Flash Heal, Prayer of Healing, and Smite are] reduced by $s1%.

373466.name: Twins of the Sun Priestess
373466.description:
Power Infusion also grants you its effect at $s1% value when used on an ally. 

If no ally is targeted, it will grant its effect at $s1% value to a nearby ally, preferring damage dealers.

373834.name: Call of Ysera
373834.description: Dream Breath healing increased by $s1%, and Living Flame healing increased by $s2%.

373861.name: Temporal Anomaly
373861.description:
Send forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing [Spell Power * 6 * (1 + Versatility)] damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 5 targets.

Applies Echo at 30% effectiveness on the first 5 allies it passes through.

373930.name: Proliferating Chill
373930.description: Chains of Ice affects $s1 additional nearby enemy.

374049.name: Suppression
374049.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by $s1%. When suffering a loss of control effect, this bonus is increased by an additional $454886s1% for $454886d.

374227.name: Zephyr
374227.description: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

374251.name: Cauterizing Flame
374251.description: Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for (350% of Spell Power) upon removing any effect.

374261.name: Unholy Bond
374261.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Runeforge effects by $s1%.

374277.name: Improved Death Strike
374277.description: Death Strike's cost is reduced by $?a137008[${$s5/-10}][${$s3/-10}], and its healing is increased by $?a137008[$s4%][$s1%].

374346.name: Overawe
374346.description: Oppressing Roar removes $372048s1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by ${$s3/-1000} sec.

374348.name: Renewing Blaze
374348.description: Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing $s1% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over $374349d.

374383.name: Assimilation
374383.description: The cooldown of Anti-Magic Zone is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec and its duration is increased by ${$s2/1000} sec.

374504.name: Brittle
374504.description: Your diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal $374557s1% increased damage for $374557d.

374574.name: Rune Mastery
374574.description: Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by $s1% for $374585d.

374598.name: Blood Draw
374598.description:
When you fall below $s1% health you drain $374606s1 health from nearby enemies, the damage you take is reduced by $454871s1% and your Death Strike cost is reduced by ${$454871s2/-10} for $454871d.

Can only occur every $374609d.

374715.name: Improved Bone Shield
374715.description: Bone Shield increases your Haste by $s1% and it can stack $s2 additional times.

374747.name: Perseverance of the Ebon Blade
374747.description: When Crimson Scourge is consumed, you gain $374748s1% Versatility for $374748d.

374968.name: Time Spiral
374968.description: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

375087.name: Dragonrage
375087.description:
Erupt with draconic fury and exhale Pyres at 3 enemies within 25 yds.

For 18 sec, Essence Burst's chance to occur is increased to 100% [Tyranny: and you gain the maximum benefit of Mastery: Giantkiller regardless of targets' health].

375406.name: Obsidian Bulwark
375406.description: Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.

375443.name: Clobbering Sweep
375443.description: Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-60000} min.

375510.name: Blast Furnace
375510.description: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts $s1 sec longer.

375528.name: Forger of Mountains
375528.description: Landslide's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec, and it can withstand $s2% more damage before breaking.

375542.name: Exuberance
375542.description: While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by $s1%.

375554.name: Enkindled
375554.description: Living Flame deals $s1% more damage and healing.

375556.name: Tailwind
375556.description: Hover increases your movement speed by ${$378105s1+$358267s2}% for the first $378105d.

375574.name: Foci of Life
375574.description: Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over $<newDur> sec.

375576.name: Divine Toll
375576.description:
Holy,  Protection
Instantly cast Holy Shock, Avenger's Shield, or Judgment on up to 5 targets within 30 yds.

 Retribution
Instantly cast Judgment on up to 5 targets within 30 yds.

Divine Toll's Judgment deals 100% increased damage.

375618.name: Arcane Intensity
375618.description: Disintegrate and Azure Strike deal $s1% more damage.

375721.name: Azure Essence Burst
375721.description: Azure Strike has a $s1% chance to cause an Essence Burst, making your next Disintegrate or Pyre cost no Essence.

375757.name: Eternity's Span
375757.description: Eternity Surge hits twice as many targets.

375767.name: Screams of the Void

375777.name: Causality
375777.description:
Disintegrate reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by ${$s1/-1000}.2 sec each time it deals damage.

Pyre reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by ${$s2/-1000}.2 sec per enemy struck, up to $<pyreCap> sec.

375783.name: Font of Magic
375783.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1.

375796.name: Hoarded Power
375796.description: Essence Burst has a $s1% chance to not be consumed.

375797.name: Animosity
375797.description:
Casting an empower spell extends the duration of Dragonrage by ${$s1/1000} sec.

Each time this occurs during Dragonrage, its effectiveness is reduced by $s2%.

375801.name: Burnout
375801.description: Fire Breath damage has $s1% chance to cause your next Living Flame to be instant cast, stacking $375802u times.

375888.name: Shadowy Insight
375888.description: Shadow Word: Pain periodic damage has a chance to cause your next Mind Blast to be instant and ignore its cooldown.

375901.name: Mindgames
375901.description:
Assault an enemy's mind, dealing [(300% of Spell Power) * 100 / 100] Shadow damage and briefly reversing their perception of reality.

For 7 sec, the next [(Shadow spell power * 1050 / 100) * (1 + Versatility) * 100 / 100] damage they deal will heal their target, and the next [(Shadow spell power * 1050 / 100) * (1 + Versatility) * 100 / 100] healing they deal will damage their target. [ Shadow: Generates 10 Insanity.]

375994.name: Mental Decay
375994.description: Increases the damage of Mind Flay by $s1%.

376079.name: Champion's Spear
376079.description:
Throw a spear at the target location, chaining all enemies in the area to the spear's location and dealing (239.25% of Attack Power) Physical damage instantly and an additional (326.25% of Attack Power) Physical damage over 6 sec. 

While the spear is active, activating this ability will cause you to leap to the spear, dealing (47% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all targets.

All damage dealt reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 10 Rage.

376138.name: Empath
376138.description: Empower spells increase your Essence regeneration rate by $370840s1% for $370840d.

376150.name: Spiritual Clarity
376150.description: Dream Breath's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

376164.name: Instinctive Arcana
376164.description: Your Magic damage done is increased by $s1%.

376179.name: Lifeforce Mender

376207.name: Delay Harm

376237.name: Nozdormu's Teachings

376239.name: Grace Period

376240.name: Timeless Magic

376251.description:
Increases your maximum Runic Power by ${$s1/10}.

Increases Rune regeneration rate by $s2%.

376743.name: Surge Forward

Flap forward a short distance, gaining speed.
Max 2 Charges

376744.name: Skyward Ascent
376744.description:

Max 1 Charge

376872.name: Ruby Essence Burst

376888.name: Tyranny

376930.name: Attuned to the Dream
376930.description: Your healing done and healing received are increased by $s1%.

Remorseless Winter deals $s1% increased damage to enemies it hits, stacking up to $376974u times.

377053.name: Seal of Reprisal

377056.name: Biting Cold

377065.name: Mental Fortitude
377065.description: Healing from Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Madness when you are at maximum health will shield you for the same amount. The shield cannot exceed $s1% of your maximum health.

377073.name: Frigid Executioner

377099.name: Spark of Insight

377100.name: Exhilarating Burst

377128.name: Golden Path

377190.name: Enduring Strength

377210.name: Ursoc's Fury

377349.name: Idol of C'Thun
377349.description:
Mind Flay has a chance to spawn a Void Tendril that channels Mind Flay or Void Lasher that channels Mind Sear at your target.

377440.name: Unholy Aura

377668.name: Everlasting Bond

377796.name: Natural Recovery

377835.name: Front of the Pack
377835.description:

377842.name: Ursine Vigor
377842.description: For $340541d after shifting into Bear Form, your health and armor are increased by $s1%.

377847.name: Well-Honed Instincts
377847.description: When you fall below $s2% health, you cast Frenzied Regeneration, up to once every $s1 sec.

377933.name: Astral Bulwark
377933.description: Astral Shift reduces damage taken by an additional $s1%.

378075.name: Thunderous Paws

378081.description: Your next healing or damaging Nature spell is instant cast and costs no mana.

378211.name: Refreshing Waters

378244.description: Cobra Shot Focus cost reduced by $s1. Cobra Shot damage increased by $s2%.

Ascendance summons a $?a117013[Primal][Greater] Fire Elemental to rain destruction on your enemies for $188592d.

378266.name: Flames of the Cauldron
378266.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Flame Shock and Voltaic Blaze by ${$s2/-1000}.1 sec.

Flame Shock deals damage ${100*(1/(1+$m1/100)-1)}% faster.

378270.name: Deeply Rooted Elements
378270.description:
$?a137039[Casting Riptide]?a137040[Each Maelstrom spent][Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon consumed] has a $?a137039[$s4]?a137040[${$s2/100}.2][${$s3/10}.1]% chance to activate Ascendance for ${$m1/1000}.1 sec.

$?a137039[$@spellicon114052 $@spellname114052
$@spelldesc114052]?a137040[$@spellicon114050 $@spellname114050
$@spelldesc114050][$@spellicon114051 $@spellname114051
Transform into an Air Ascendant for $114051d and unleash Doom Winds, reducing the cooldown and cost of Stormstrike by $114051s9%, and transforming your auto attack and Stormstrike into Wind attacks which bypass armor and have a $114089r yd range.]

378279.name: Gift of the Golden Val'kyr
378279.description:
Each enemy hit by Avenger's Shield reduces the remaining cooldown on Guardian of Ancient Kings by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec.

When you drop below $s2% health, you become infused with Guardian of Ancient Kings for $s3 sec. This cannot occur again for $337852d.

378405.description:
Word of Glory heals for an additional $s1% over $378412d.

378406.name: Wintertide
378406.description: Frozen Orb has a $s1% chance to grant Brain Freeze.

378425.name: Uther's Counsel
378425.description: Your Lay on Hands, Divine Shield, Blessing of Protection, and Blessing of Spellwarding have $s1% reduced cooldown.

378427.name: Nimble Fingers
378427.description: Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by $s1.

378436.name: Master Poisoner
378436.description: Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by $s1%.

378441.name: Time Stop
378441.description:
Freeze an ally's timestream for 5 sec. While frozen in time they are invulnerable, cannot act, and auras do not progress.

You may reactivate Time Stop to end this effect early.

378442.name: Wild Instincts
378442.description: When your primary pet uses Stomp, apply Barbed Shot to a target hit by that Stomp. This Barbed Shot will not cause an extra Stomp.

378443.name: Acid Rain
378443.description: Deal ${$378597s1*$s1} Nature damage every $378463t1 sec to up to $378597s2 enemies inside of your Healing Rain.

378448.name: Fractured Frost
378448.description: Ice Lance strikes $s1 additional $Ltarget:targets; at $s2% effectiveness, preferring enemies with more stacks of Freezing.

378457.name: Soaring Shield
378457.description: Avenger's Shield jumps to $s1 additional targets.

378743.name: Dire Command
378743.description: Kill Command has a $s1% chance to also summon a Dire Beast to attack your target for $120679s2 sec.

378762.name: Ferren Marcus's Fervor
378762.description: Avenger's Shield deals $s1% increased damage to its primary target.

378767.name: Focused Aim
378767.description: Consuming Precise Shots reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by ${$s1/1000}.2 sec.

378773.name: Greater Purge
378773.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 2 beneficial Magic effects.

378807.name: Shadowrunner
378807.description: While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move $s1% faster.

378845.name: Focused Enmity
378845.description: When Avenger's Shield strikes a single enemy, it deals $s1% additional Holy damage.

378848.name: Coldthirst
378848.description: Successfully interrupting an enemy with Mind Freeze grants ${$378849s1/10} Runic Power and reduces its cooldown by ${$378849s2/-1000} sec.

378913.name: Light Ammo
378913.description:
Trick Shots now causes Aimed Shot and Rapid Fire to ricochet to $s1 additional $Ltarget:targets;.

Aspect of the Hydra's damage bonus is increased by $s3%.

378919.name: Piercing Cold
378919.description: $?s431044[Frostfire Bolt][Frostbolt] and Flurry critical strike damage increased by $s1%.

378934.name: Lunge
378934.description:
The damage of your auto-attacks is increased by $s1%.

Your Agility is increased by $s2%, increased by an additional $s3% while dual-wielding.

378937.name: Explosives Expert
378937.description: Wildfire Bomb, Boomstick, and Flamefang Pitch damage increased by $s1%.

378947.name: Glacial Assault
378947.description:
Flurry has a $s1% chance each hit to call down an icy comet, crashing into your target and nearby enemies for $379029s1 Frost damage.

|CFFffffffApplies $s2 $lstack:stacks; of Freezing.|R

378955.name: Killer Companion
378955.description: All damage dealt by your pet is increased by $s1%.

378988.name: Lycara's Teachings
378988.description:
You gain $s1% of a stat while in each form:

No Form: Haste
Cat Form: Critical Strike
Bear Form: Versatility
Moonkin Form: Mastery

378996.name: Recuperator
378996.description: Slice and Dice heals you for up to $s1% of your maximum health per $426605t sec.

379005.name: Blackjack
379005.description: Enemies have $394119s1% reduced damage and healing for $394119d after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.

379021.name: Sanctuary
379021.description: While in your Consecration and for ${$s1/1000}.1 sec after leaving it, your damage taken is reduced by $s2%.

379022.name: Consecration in Flame
379022.description: Consecration lasts ${$s1/1000} sec longer and its damage is increased by $s2%.

379391.name: Quickened Invocation
379391.description: $?c1[Divine Toll's, Holy Armament's, and Holy Prism's][Divine Toll's] cooldown is reduced by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

379993.name: Flash Freeze
379993.description: Casting Glacial Spike has a $s1% chance to grant you Fingers of Frost.

380188.name: Crusader's Resolve
380188.description: Enemies hit by Avenger's Shield deal $383843s1% reduced melee damage to you for $383843d.

381542.name: Deadly Precision
381542.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by $s1%.

381543.name: Virulent Poisons
381543.description: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by $s1%.

381620.name: Improved Ambush
381620.description: $?s185438[Shadowstrike damage increased by $s2%][Ambush generates $s1 additional combo point].

381621.name: Tight Spender
381621.description: Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by $s1%.

381624.name: Improved Poisons
381624.description: Increases the application chance of your weapon poisons by $s1%.

381626.name: Bloody Mess
381626.description: Garrote and Rupture damage increased by $s1%.

381627.name: Internal Bleeding
381627.description: Kidney Shot and Rupture also apply Internal Bleeding, dealing up to ${5*$381628o1} Bleed damage over $381628d, based on combo points spent.

381629.name: Thrown Precision
381629.description: Fan of Knives has $s2% increased critical strike chance and its critical strikes always apply your weapon poisons.

381630.name: Intent to Kill
381630.description: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by $s1% when used on a target afflicted by your Garrote.

381631.name: Flying Daggers
381631.description: Fan of Knives has its radius increased to $?a196924[${$196924s1+$s4}][$s4] yds, deals $s5% more damage, and an additional $s1% when striking $s2 or more targets.

381632.name: Improved Garrote
381632.description: Garrote deals $s1% increased damage and has no cooldown when used from Stealth and for $392401d after breaking Stealth.

381637.name: Atrophic Poison

381640.name: Lethal Dose

381647.name: Planes Traveler
381647.description: Reduces the cooldown of Astral Shift by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

381650.name: Elemental Warding
381650.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by $s1%.

381652.name: Systemic Failure
381652.description: Garrote increases the damage of Ambush and Mutilate on the target by $s1%.

381655.name: Nature's Fury
381655.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature spells and abilities by $s1%.

381664.name: Amplifying Poison
381664.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy, dealing (8.14% of Attack Power) Nature damage and applying Amplifying Poison for 12 sec. Envenom can consume 10 stacks of Amplifying Poison to deal 35% increased damage. Max 20 stacks.

381673.name: Doomblade
381673.description: Mutilate deals an additional $s1% Bleed damage over ${$381672d+2} sec.

381689.name: Brimming with Life
381689.description:
Stamina increased by $s1%.
