381707.name: Swelling Maelstrom
381707.description:
Increases your maximum Maelstrom by $s1.

Increases Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake damage by $s2%.

381708.name: Eye of the Storm
381708.description:
Reduces the Maelstrom cost of Earth Shock and Earthquake by $s1.

Reduces the Maelstrom cost of Elemental Blast by $s3.

381726.name: Mountains Will Fall
381726.description:
Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake can trigger your Mastery: Elemental Overload at $s1% effectiveness.

Overloaded Earthquakes do not knock enemies down.

381782.name: Searing Flames
381782.description: Flame Shock damage has a chance to generate $s1 Maelstrom.

381797.name: Dashing Scoundrel
381797.description: Envenom's effect also increases the critical strike chance of your weapon poisons by $s1%, and their critical strikes generate $s2 Energy.

381798.name: Zoldyck Recipe
381798.description: Your Bleed, weapon poison, and other Nature damage is increased by $s1% against targets below $s2% health.

381799.name: Scent of Blood
381799.description: Each enemy afflicted by your Rupture increases your Agility by $S1%, up to a maximum of $394080u%.

381801.name: Dragon-Tempered Blades
381801.description: You may apply $s1 additional Lethal and Non-Lethal Poison to your weapons, but they have $s2% less application chance.

381828.name: Ace Up Your Sleeve
381828.description: Between the Eyes has a $s1% chance per combo point spent to grant $394120s1 combo points and reset its own cooldown.

381839.name: Sleight of Hand
381839.description: Roll the Bones has a $s1% increased chance of granting more powerful results.

381845.name: Audacity
381845.description:
Using Pistol Shot with Opportunity has a $279876s1% chance to make your next Ambush usable without Stealth.

Chance to trigger this effect matches the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

381846.name: Fan the Hammer
381846.description:
When you gain Opportunity, gain $m1 additional $Lcharge:charges;. Max ${$s2+1} charges.

Pistol Shot consumes $m1 additional $Lcharge:charges; of Opportunity to fire $m1 additional $Lbullet:bullets;. Additional shots deal $s3% reduced damage.

381867.name: Totemic Surge
381867.description: Reduces the cooldown of most totems by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

381878.name: Deft Maneuvers
381878.description: Blade Flurry's initial damage is increased by $s1% and generates $m2 $Lcombo point:combo points; per target struck, but its Energy cost is increased by $s3.

381885.name: Heavy Hitter
381885.description: Attacks that generate combo points deal $s1% increased damage.

381921.name: Ouroboros
381921.description: Casting Echo grants one stack of Ouroboros, increasing the healing of your next Emerald Blossom by $387350s1%, stacking up to $387350u times.

381922.name: Temporal Artificer
381922.description: Rewind's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

381930.name: Mana Spring
381930.description:
Your $?!s137041[Lava Burst][]$?s137039[ and Riptide][]$?s137041[Stormstrike][] casts restore $?a137040[$381931s1]?a137041[$404550s1][$404551s1] mana to you and $s1 allies nearest to you within $395192a1 yards.

Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

381936.name: Flash of Lightning
381936.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Lightning Bolt$?a454009[, Tempest,][] and Chain Lightning by $s1%.

381946.name: Wavespeaker's Blessing
381946.description: Increases Riptide's duration by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec and its healing over time by $s2%.

381988.name: Swift Slasher
381988.description: Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to $s2% of your Haste.

381989.name: Keep It Rolling
381989.description: Increase the remaining duration of your active Roll the Bones combat enhancement by 30 sec.

381990.name: Summarily Dispatched
381990.description: Dispatch deals $s1% increased damage and costs $s3 less Energy. This damage bonus is increased by $315341s4% while your damage is enhanced by your Between the Eyes.

382015.name: The Rotten
382015.description: After activating Shadow Dance, your next $@switch<$s1>[attack][$s1 attacks] that $@switch<$s1>[generates][generate] combo points $@switch<$s1>[deals][deal] $394203s3% increased damage.

382017.name: Veiltouched
382017.description: Your abilities deal $s1% increased magic damage.

382020.name: Earthen Harmony
382020.description: Earth Shield reduces damage taken by $s3% and its healing is increased by up to $s1% as its target's health decreases. Maximum benefit is reached below $s2% health.

382021.name: Earthliving Weapon
382021.description: Imbue your weapon with the element of Earth for 1 hour. Your Riptide, Healing Wave, and Chain Heal healing has a 20% chance to trigger Earthliving on the target, healing for (138.915% of Spell Power) over 6 sec.

382030.name: Water Totem Mastery
382030.description: Reduces the cooldown of Healing Stream Totem by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

382032.name: Echo Chamber
382032.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Elemental Overloads by $s1%.

382039.name: Flow of the Tides
382039.description: Chain Heal bounces an additional time and casting Chain Heal on a target affected by Riptide consumes Riptide, increasing the healing of your Chain Heal by $s1%.

382042.name: Surging Elements
382042.description: Casting Sundering grants you $s1% Haste for $382043d, and generates $s3 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon.

382045.name: Primal Tide Core
382045.description: Every $s1 casts of Riptide also applies Riptide to another friendly target near your Riptide target.

382194.name: Undercurrent
382194.description: For each Riptide active on an ally, your heals are ${$s2/10}.1% more effective.

382197.name: Ancestral Wolf Affinity
382197.description: Cleanse Spirit, Wind Shear, Purge, and totem casts no longer cancel Ghost Wolf.

382201.name: Totemic Focus
382201.description:
Increases the radius of your totem effects by $s3%.

Increases the duration of your Earthbind and Earthgrab Totems by ${$s1/1000} sec.

Increases the duration of your $?s157153[Cloudburst][Healing Stream], Tremor, Poison Cleansing, $?s137039[Ancestral Protection, Earthen Wall, ][]and Wind Rush Totems by ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

382215.name: Winds of Al'Akir
382215.description: Increases your movement speed by $s1% and the movement speed bonus of Ghost Wolf by an additional $s2%.

382238.name: Lethality
382238.description: Critical strike chance increased by $s1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by $s2%.

382245.name: Cold Blooded Killer
382245.description: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by $1264297s1%.

382268.name: Flow of Time
382268.description: The cooldowns of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

382293.name: Incantation of Swiftness
382293.description: $?s110959[Greater ][]Invisibility increases your movement speed by $s1% for $337278d.

382297.name: Quick Witted
382297.description: Counterspell's cooldown is reduced by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

382309.name: Ancestral Awakening
382309.description: When you heal with your Healing Wave or Riptide you have a $s2% chance to summon an Ancestral spirit to aid you, instantly healing an injured friendly party or raid target within 40 yards for $s1% of the amount healed. Critical strikes increase this chance to $s3%.

382310.name: Inspiring Presence
382310.description: Rallying Cry's duration is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec and it grants an additional $s3% maximum health.

382315.name: Improved Earthliving Weapon
382315.description:
Earthliving receives $s1% additional benefit from Mastery: Deep Healing.

Healing Wave always triggers Earthliving on its target.

382424.name: Winter's Protection
382424.description: The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

382482.name: Living Stream
382482.description: Healing Stream Totem heals for $s1% more, decaying over its duration.

382503.name: Quick Decisions
382503.description: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by $s3%, and its maximum range is increased by $s1%.

382504.name: Dark Brew
382504.description:
Your weapon poisons have $s8% increased application chance and now deal damage as Shadow instead of Nature.

Shadow damage increased by $s2%.

382505.name: The First Dance
382505.description: Remaining out of combat for $470677d increases the duration of your next Shadow Dance by ${$470678s1/1000} sec.

382506.name: Replicating Shadows
382506.description: Shadow Clones deal $s1% increased damage and your effects that have a chance to create them have $s2% additional chance to occur.

382507.name: Shrouded in Darkness
382507.description: Shroud of Concealment increases the movement speed of allies by $s1% and leaving its area no longer cancels the effect.

382508.name: Planned Execution
382508.description: Shadow Dance increases the critical strike damage bonus of your abilities by $185313s9%.

382511.name: Shadowed Finishers
382511.description: Eviscerate and Black Powder deal an additional $s1% damage as Shadow while Find Weakness is active.

382512.name: Improved Find Weakness
382512.description: Find Weakness causes your attacks to ignore an additional $s1% armor.

382514.name: Fade to Nothing
382514.description: Movement speed increased by $386237s1% and damage taken reduced by $386237s2% for $386237d after gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance.

382515.name: Cloaked in Shadows
382515.description: Vanish grants you a shield for $386165d, absorbing damage equal to $s1% of your maximum health.

382518.name: Perforated Veins
382518.description: $?s200758[Gloomblade][Backstab], Shuriken Storm, and Shadowstrike have $1264521s3% increased damage while Find Weakness is active.

382524.name: Lingering Shadow
382524.description: After Shadow Dance ends, $?s200758[Gloomblade][Backstab] deals an additional $s1% damage as Shadow, fading by ${$s1/$s3}.1% per sec.

382525.name: Finality
382525.description: Eviscerate and Black Powder have $s1% increased critical strike damage bonus.

382528.name: Danse Macabre
382528.description: While Shadow Dance is active, each different attack that generates or spends combo points lashes out at the target, dealing $1264397s1 Shadow damage.

382536.name: Sanctify
382536.description: Enemies hit by Divine Storm take $382538s1% more damage from Consecration and Divine Hammers for $382538d.

382549.name: Pain and Gain
382549.description:
When you take any damage, heal for ${$382551s1/10}.1% of your maximum health. 

This can only occur once every $proccooldown sec.

382550.name: Passing Seasons
382550.description: Nature's Swiftness's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

382552.name: Improved Ironbark
382552.description: Ironbark's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

382559.name: Unstoppable Growth
382559.description: Wild Growth's healing falls off $s1% less over time.

382732.name: Ancestral Reach
382732.description: Chain Heal bounces an additional time and its healing is increased by $s2%.

382764.name: Crushing Force
382764.description: $?c1[Mortal Strike]?c2[Bloodthirst][Shield Slam] deals an additional $?c1[$s1]?c2[$s3][$s5]% damage and deals $?c1[$s2]?c2[$s4][$s6]% increased critical strike damage.

382886.name: Fire and Ice
382886.description: Increases all Fire and Frost damage you deal by $s1%.

382888.name: Flurry
382888.description: Increases your attack speed by $382889s1% for your next $382889n melee swings after dealing a critical strike with a spell or ability.

382895.name: One-Handed Weapon Specialization
382895.description: While wielding one-handed weapons your damage is increased by $s1% and Leech increased by $s4%.

382896.name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
382896.description: While wielding two-handed weapons your damage is increased by $s1% and damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by $s4%.

382900.name: Dual Wield Specialization
382900.description: While dual wielding your damage is increased by $s1% and movement speed is increased by $s4%.

382939.name: Reinforced Plates
382939.description: Stamina increased by $s1% and Armor increased by $s2%.

382940.name: Endurance Training
382940.description: Stamina increased by $s1% and the duration of $?c1|c3[Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects on you is reduced by $s2%][movement impairing effects on you is reduced by $s6%].

382946.name: Wild Strikes
382946.description: Haste increased by $s1% and your auto-attack critical strikes increase your auto-attack speed by $s2% for $392778d.

382948.name: Piercing Challenge
382948.description: Champion's Spear's damage increased by $s1% and its Rage generation is increased by $s2%.

382953.name: Storm of Steel
382953.description: $?c3[Ravager's damage is reduced by $s1% but it now has $s4 charges and generates ${$s5/10} additional Rage each time it deals damage.][Bladestorm and Ravager's damage are reduced by $s1% but they now have $s4 charges and generate ${$s5/10} additional Rage each time they deal damage.]

382954.name: Cacophonous Roar
382954.description: Intimidating Shout can withstand $s1% more damage before breaking.

382956.name: Seismic Reverberation
382956.description: If Whirlwind $?c1[or Cleave ][]$?s436707[or Thunder Clap ][]$?a137048[or Revenge ][]hits $s1 or more enemies it hits them $s2 additional time for ${100+$s3}% damage.

383005.name: Chrono Loop
383005.description: Trap the enemy in a time loop for 5 sec. Afterwards, they are returned to their previous location and health. Cannot reduce an enemy's health below 20%.

383010.name: Elemental Orbit
383010.description:
Increases the number of Elemental Shields you can have active on yourself by 1.

You can have Earth Shield on yourself and one ally at the same time.

383013.name: Poison Cleansing Totem
383013.description: Summons a totem at your feet that removes all Poison effects from a nearby party or raid member within 30 yards every 1.5 sec for 6 sec.

383016.name: Improved Purify Spirit
383016.description: Purify Spirit additionally removes all Curse effects.

383082.name: Barbaric Training
383082.description: $?c1[Slam, Whirlwind, and Cleave deal $s1% more damage and $s2% increased critical strike damage.]?c2&s436707[ Thunder Clap, Whirlwind, and Raging Blow deal $s5% more damage and $s6% increased critical strike damage.]?c2[Whirlwind and Raging Blow deal $s5% more damage and $s6% increased critical strike damage.][Revenge deals $s7% more damage and $s8% increased critical strike damage.]

383103.name: Fueled by Violence
383103.description: You are healed for $s1% of the Bleed damage dealt by Rend and Deep Wounds.

383115.name: Concussive Blows
383115.description:
Cooldown of Pummel reduced by ${$s1/-1000}.1 sec. 

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by $383116s2% for $383116d.

383121.name: Mass Polymorph
383121.description:
Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 sec. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.

383154.name: Bloodletting
383154.description:
Rend and Deep Wounds' Bleed effects last $s1% longer and have a $s2% increased critical strike chance.

If you know Rend, Mortal Strike inflicts Rend on targets below $s3% health.

383155.name: Improved Sweeping Strikes
383155.description: Sweeping Strikes affects $s1 additional damaging single-target abilities.

383191.name: Regenesis
383191.description: Rejuvenation healing is increased by up to $s1%, and Tranquility healing is increased by up to $s2%, healing for more on low-health targets.

383195.name: Umbral Intensity
383195.description:
Solar Eclipse increases Wrath damage by an additional $s1%. 

Lunar Eclipse increases Starfire damage by an additional $s2%.

383197.name: Orbit Breaker
383197.description: Every $s1th Shooting Star calls down a Full Moon at $s2% effectiveness upon its target.

383222.name: Overflowing Shores
383222.description: $?a455630[Surging Totem][Healing Rain] instantly restores $383223s1 health to $s3 allies within its area, and its radius is increased by $s1 $Lyard:yards;.

383228.name: Swift Justice
383228.description: Reduces the cooldown of Judgment by ${$s1/-1000} sec and Crusader Strike by ${$s2/-1000} sec.

383281.name: Hidden Opportunity
383281.description: Ambush has a chance to grant Opportunity. Chance to trigger this effect is $s1% of the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

383287.name: Bloodborne
383287.description: Your Bleed effects deal $s1% increased damage and $s2% increased critical strike damage.

383295.name: Deft Experience
383295.description: Bloodthirst's critical strike chance increased by $s1% and if you are Enraged, Bloodthirst extends your Enrage by ${$s2/1000}.1 sec. This extension is doubled if Bloodthirst critically strikes your primary target.

383297.name: Critical Thinking
383297.description: Raging Blow's critical strike chance increased by $s1% and critical strike damage increased by $s2%.

383328.name: Final Verdict
383328.description:
Unleashes a powerful weapon strike that deals (404.408% of Attack Power) [Blades of Light: Holystrike / Holy] damage to an enemy target,

Final Verdict has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Judgment.

383341.name: Sharpened Blades
383341.description: Mortal Strike, Cleave, and Execute damage increased by $s1% and critical strike damage increased by $s2%.

383342.name: Holy Blade
383342.description: Blade of Justice generates $s1 additional Holy Power.

383344.name: Expurgation
383344.description: Your Blade of Justice causes the target to burn for $383346o1 $?s403665[Holy][Radiant] damage over $383346d. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

383352.name: Tireless Energy
383352.description: Maximum Energy increased by $s1 and Energy regeneration increased by $s2%.

383391.name: Feel the Burn
383391.description: Fire Blast increases your mastery by ${$383395s1}% for $383395d. Multiple applications may overlap.

383396.name: Tempest of the Lightbringer
383396.description: Divine Storm projects an additional wave of light, striking all enemies up to $s1 yds in front of you for $s2% of Divine Storm's damage.

383430.name: Impale
383430.description: Critical strike damage of your abilities is increased by $s1%.

383459.name: Swift Strikes
383459.description: Haste increased by $s1% and Raging Blow and Bloodthirst generate an additional ${$s2/10} Rage.

383468.name: Invigorating Fury
383468.description: Enraged Regeneration lasts ${$s1/1000} sec longer and instantly heals for $s2% of your maximum health.

383486.name: Focus in Chaos
383486.description: While Enraged, your auto-attacks can no longer miss.

383605.name: Frenzied Flurry
383605.description: Increases auto-attack damage with one-handed weapons by $s1% and your auto-attack critical strikes have a $s2% chance to Enrage you.

383634.name: Fiery Rush
383634.description: While Combustion is active, Fire Blast recharges $383637s1% faster.

383669.name: Controlled Destruction
383669.description: Damaging an enemy with Fireball, Pyroblast, or Flamestrike increases the damage it receives from Ignite by ${$s2/100}.1%. Stacks up to $453268u times.

383676.name: Impetus
383676.description: Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse generate an additional Arcane Charge.

383697.name: Sal'salabim's Strength
383697.description: When you use Keg Smash, the remaining cooldown on Breath of Fire is reset.

383698.name: Scalding Brew
383698.description: Keg Smash deals an additional $s1% damage to targets affected by Breath of Fire.

383700.name: Gai Plin's Imperial Brew
383700.description: Purifying Brew instantly heals you for $s1% of the |CFFffffffStaggered|R damage it clears.

383703.name: Fatality
383703.description: Mortal Strike has a $s1% chance to apply a Fatal Mark to your target, stacking up to $383704u times. Your next Execute on a target with a Fatal Mark causes the Fatal Mark to deal $383706s1 additional Physical damage per stack.

383707.name: Stormstout's Last Keg
383707.description: Keg Smash deals $m1% additional damage to its primary target, has $m2 additional $Lcharge:charges;, and its range is increased by $s3 yards.

383714.name: Training of Niuzao
383714.description: Gain up to ${$s1*$s3}% Mastery based on your current level of Stagger.

383762.name: Bitter Immunity
383762.description: Restores 20% health instantly and removes all diseases, poisons, and curses affecting you.

383785.name: Counterstrike
383785.description: Each time you dodge or an enemy misses you, your next Tiger Palm or Spinning Crane Kick deals $383800s1% increased damage.

383810.name: Fevered Incantation
383810.description: Each consecutive critical strike you deal increases critical strike damage you deal by $s1%, up to ${ $s1*$383811u}% for $383811d.

383848.name: Frenzied Enrage
383848.description: Enrage increases your haste by $184362s1% and your movement speed by $184362s2%.

383852.name: Spite
383852.description: Bloodthirst and Raging Blow damage increased by ${$s1/10}.1% and critical strike damage increased by ${$s2/10}.1%.

383854.name: Improved Raging Blow
383854.description: Raging Blow has ${$s1+1} charges and has a $85288s1% chance to instantly reset its own cooldown.

383877.name: Hack and Slash
383877.description: Rampage has a $h% chance to refund a charge of Raging Blow.

383885.name: Vicious Contempt
383885.description: Bloodthirst deals $s1% increased damage to enemies who are below $<threshold>% health.

383916.name: Annihilator
383916.description: Your auto-attacks deal an additional $383915s1 Physical damage and generate ${$383915s2/10} Rage.

383959.name: Cold Steel, Hot Blood
383959.description: Bloodthirst critical strikes generate ${$383978s1/10} additional Rage and inflict a Gushing Wound that deals $385042o Bleed damage over $385042d and heals you for the damage dealt.

383967.name: Slow Burn
383967.description:
Combustion grants mastery equal to $s1% of your Critical Strike stat.

Combustion causes your spells to apply Ignite at $s2% increased effectiveness.

383994.name: Dragonfire Brew
383994.description: Breath of Fire deals $s2% increased damage, and after using Breath of Fire, you breathe fire $s1 additional times, each dealing $387621s1 Fire damage.

384036.name: Brutal Vitality
384036.description:
$s1% of damage you deal adds to your active Ignore Pain or the next Ignore Pain you activate.

Your next Ignore Pain can be increased by up to ${$mhp*($190456s4/100)*($s2/100)}.

384041.name: Strategist
384041.description: Devastate, Thunder Clap, Revenge, and Execute have a $236279s2% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Shield Slam.

384060.name: Illuminated Thoughts
384060.description: Clearcasting has a $s1% increased chance to proc.

384063.name: Enduring Alacrity
384063.description: Increases Stamina by $s1% and your Haste by $s2%.

384067.name: Focused Vigor
384067.description: Increases Strength by $s1% and your critical strike chance by $s2%.

384072.name: Impenetrable Wall
384072.description: Shield Slam reduces the remaining cooldown of Shield Wall by $s1 sec.

384090.name: Titanic Throw
384090.description:
Throws your weapon at the enemy, causing (35% of Attack Power) Physical damage to it and 5 nearby enemies. 

Generates high threat.

384100.name: Berserker Shout
384100.description:
Go berserk, removing and granting immunity to Fear, Sap, and Incapacitate effects for 6 sec.

Also remove fear effects from group members within 12 yds.

384110.name: Wrecking Throw
384110.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy, causing (600% of Attack Power) Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

384124.name: Armored to the Teeth
384124.description: Gain Strength equal to $?c3[$s3][$s2]% of your Armor.

384143.name: Overflowing Maelstrom
384143.description:
Maelstrom Weapon can now stack $s1 additional times.

Each Maelstrom Weapon stacks consumed grants Overflowing Maelstrom, reducing the cast time of your next Healing Surge or Chain Heal by $s3%, and increasing their healing by $s4% up to $s5 times. This effect can be accumulated up to $410681u times.

384149.name: Raging Maelstrom
384149.description: Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning can consume up to $s1 Maelstrom Weapon stacks.

384174.name: Master of Flame
384174.description:
Ignite deals $s1% more damage when Combustion is not active.

Fire Blast now spreads an additional $s2% of your Ignite.

384277.name: Blood and Thunder
384277.description: Thunder Clap affects $s3 nearby targets with Rend, causing them to Bleed for $388539o1 damage over $388539d.

384318.name: Thunderous Roar
384318.description: Roar explosively, dealing (250.56% of Attack Power) Physical damage to enemies within 12 yds and cause them to bleed for (250.56% of Attack Power) physical damage over 8 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

384352.name: Doom Winds
384352.description:
Unleash a devastating storm around yourself, dealing (120% of Attack Power) Stormstrike damage every 1 sec to nearby enemies for 8 sec.

Increases your chance to activate Windfury Weapon by 100%, and the damage of Windfury Weapon by 20%.

384355.name: Elemental Weapons
384355.description: Each active weapon imbue increases all Fire, Frost, and Nature damage dealt by ${$s1/10}.1%.

384361.name: Bloodsurge
384361.description: Damage from Rend has a chance to generate ${$384362s1/10} Rage.

384363.name: Converging Storms
384363.description: Each target hit by Crash Lightning increases the damage of your next Stormstrike by $198300s1%, up to a maximum of $198300u stacks.

384404.name: Sidearm
384404.description: Your auto-attacks have a $H% chance to hurl weapons at your target and ${$384391i-1} other enemy in front of you, dealing $384391s1 Physical damage.

384411.name: Static Accumulation
384411.description: During Doom Winds or Ascendance, you generate $s1 Maelstrom Weapon $lstack:stacks; every $384437t1 sec.

384444.name: Thorim's Invocation
384444.description:
Doom Winds and Deeply Rooted Elements last ${$s5/1000} sec longer, and the cooldown of Ascendance is reduced by ${$s4/-1000} sec.

During Doom Winds or Ascendance, Stormstrike and Crash Lightning consume up to $s1 Maelstrom Weapon to discharge a Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning at $s2% effectiveness at your enemy, whichever you most recently used.

384450.name: Lightning Strikes
384450.description: Consuming $s2 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon increases the damage of your next Stormstrike or Lava Lash by $384451s1% and causes them to generate a stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

384452.name: Arcane Salvo
384452.description: Each wave of Arcane Missiles increases the damage of Arcane Barrage by $1242974s1%, up to ${$1242974s1*$1242974u}%.

384612.name: Prodigious Savant
384612.description: Arcane Charges increase the damage of Arcane Blast, Arcane Pulse, and Arcane Barrage by an additional $s1%.

384651.name: Charged Orb
384651.description: Arcane Orb gains $s1 additional charge. Arcane Orb damage increased by $s2%.

384665.name: Taste for Blood
384665.description: Ferocious Bite deals $s1% increased damage and an additional $s2% during Tiger's Fury.

384667.name: Sudden Ambush
384667.description: Finishing moves have a $s1% chance per combo point spent to increase the direct damage of your next Rake, Shred, or Swipe by $1244483s2% and make it critically strike.

384799.name: Hunter's Avoidance
384799.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by $s1%.

384815.name: Seal of Charity
384815.description: When you cast Word of Glory on someone other than yourself, you are also healed for $s1% of the amount healed.

384820.name: Sacrifice of the Just
384820.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Sacrifice by ${$m1/-1000} sec.

384858.name: Orb Barrage
384858.description: Arcane Barrage has a $s1% chance per stack of Arcane Salvo to launch an Arcane Orb in front of you at $s2% effectiveness.

384909.name: Improved Blessing of Protection
384909.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Protection$?c2[ and Blessing of Spellwarding][] by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

384914.name: Recompense
384914.description:
After your Blessing of Sacrifice ends, $s1% of the total damage it diverted is added to your next Judgment as bonus damage, or your next Word of Glory as bonus healing.

This effect's bonus damage cannot exceed $s3% of your maximum health and its bonus healing cannot exceed $s4% of your maximum health.

384969.name: Thunderous Words
384969.description: Increases the duration of Thunderous Roar's Bleed effect by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec and Thunderous Roar's Bleed effect causes enemies to take $397364s3% increased damage from all your bleeds.

385059.name: Odyn's Fury
385059.description:
Unleashes your power, dealing [(182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage and an additional (520% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 12 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enrages you and generates 20 Rage.

385167.name: Everlasting Frost
385167.description:
Casting Frozen Orb grants $s1 $Lstack:stacks; of Fingers of Frost.

Damaging one or more enemies with Frozen Orb has a $s2% chance to grant Fingers of Frost.

385414.name: Afterimage
385414.description: After you spend $s3 Holy Power, your next Word of Glory echoes onto a nearby ally at $s1% effectiveness.

385427.name: Obduracy
385427.description: Speed increased by $s3% and damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by $s2%.

385450.name: Seal of Might
385450.description: Mastery increased by $s2% and $?c1[Intellect][Strength] increased by $s1%.

385478.name: Shrouded Suffocation
385478.description: Garrote damage increased by $s1%. Garrote generates $s2 additional combo points when used from Stealth.

385515.name: Holy Aegis
385515.description: Armor and critical strike chance increased by $s2%.

385539.name: Rejuvenating Wind
385539.description: Exhilaration now also heals you for an additional ${$s1}.1% of your maximum health over $385540d.

385571.name: Improved Overpower
385571.description: Overpower has ${1+$s2} charges and deals $s1% more damage.

385627.name: Kingsbane
385627.description:
Release a powerful poison from your weapons and inject it into your target, dealing (172.81% of Attack Power) Nature damage instantly and an additional (203% of Attack Power) Nature damage over 14 sec. 

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to a target affected by Kingsbane, Kingsbane damage increases by 20%, up to 1000%.

Awards 1 combo point.

385633.name: Auras of the Resolute
385633.description:
Learn Concentration Aura, Devotion Aura, and Crusader Aura:

$@spellicon317920$@spellname317920:
$@spelldesc317920

$@spellicon465 $@spellname465:
$@spelldesc465

$@spellicon32223 $@spellname32223:
$@spelldesc32223

385696.name: Flow State
385696.description: Empower spells cause time to flow $s1% faster for you, increasing movement speed, cooldown recharge rate, and cast speed. Lasts $390148d.

385703.name: Bloodborne
385703.description: Bloodthirst causes your Bleeds to deal $1265406s1% additional damage for $1265406d.

385704.name: Bloodborne
385704.description: Your Deep Wounds and Rend deal $s1% increased damage.

385722.name: Silent Storm
385722.description: Gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance causes your next Shuriken Storm to have $385727s1% increased chance to critically strike.

385737.name: Bloody Claws
385737.description: Each stack of Mongoose Fury also increases the damage of Strike as One by $s1%.

385786.name: Matted Fur
385786.description: When you use Barkskin or Survival Instincts, absorb $<shield> damage for $385787d.

385810.name: Dire Frenzy
385810.description: Dire Beast lasts an additional ${$m1/1000} sec and deals $s2% increased damage.

385840.name: Thunderlord
385840.description:
Increases the radius of Demoralizing Shout by $s3 yards.

Each enemy hit by Thunder Clap reduces the remaining cooldown on Demoralizing Shout by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec, up to ${$s1*$s2/1000}.1 sec.

385881.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
385881.description:
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

|cFFFFFFFFImp|r: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target $386869s1% damage reduction for $386869d.

|cFFFFFFFFVoidwalker|r: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by ${$abs($s2/1000)} sec.

|cFFFFFFFFFelhunter|r: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by ${$abs($s3/1000)} sec.

|cFFFFFFFFSayaad|r: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by ${$abs($s4/1000)} sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.$?s137044[

|cFFFFFFFFFelguard|r: Reduces the cooldown of Pursuit by ${$abs($s6/1000)} sec and increases its maximum range by $s7 yards.][]

385888.name: Tough as Nails
385888.description:
Blocking an attack deals $385890s1 Physical damage to the attacker. Critical blocks deal double damage.

Generates high threat.

385899.name: Soulburn
385899.description:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

385952.name: Shield Charge
385952.description:
Charge to an enemy with your shield, granting you Shield Block and dealing (840% of Attack Power) Physical damage to it and (268.4% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies within 10 yards.

Also stuns the primary target for 4 sec.

Generates 20 Rage.

386011.name: Shield Specialization
386011.description: Increases Block chance by $s1% and your Block value by $s2%.

386030.name: Brace For Impact
386030.description: Using Shield Slam increases the damage of Shield Slam by $386029s1% and the block value of your shield by $386029s2% for $386029d. Stacking up to $386029u times.

386071.name: Disrupting Shout
386071.description: Taunts all enemies within 14 yds to attack you for 6 sec, interrupts all spellcasting within 14 yds and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec. Increases the threat you generate against the target by 800%.

386110.name: Fiendish Stride
386110.description: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by ${$abs($s1)}%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional $s2%.

386113.name: Fel Pact
386113.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

386124.name: Fel Armor
386124.description:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, $s1% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over $387847d.

Reduces damage taken by ${$s4/10}.1%.

386164.name: Battle Stance
386164.description:
A balanced combat state that increases the critical strike chance of your abilities by 3% and reduces the duration of movement impairing effects by 10%. 

Lasts until canceled.

386185.name: Demonic Knowledge
386185.description: Hand of Gul'dan has a $s1% chance to generate a charge of Demonic Core.

386194.name: Carnivorous Stalkers
386194.description: Your Dreadstalkers' attacks have a $s1% chance to trigger an additional Dreadbite.

386196.name: Berserker Stance
386196.description:
An aggressive combat state that increases the damage of your auto-attacks by 15% and reduces the duration of Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects on you by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

386208.name: Defensive Stance
386208.description:
Arms,  Fury
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15% and all damage you deal by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

 Protection
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15%.

Lasts until canceled.

386272.name: Titanic Wrath
386272.description: Essence Burst increases the damage of affected spells by ${$s1}.1%.

386283.name: Catalyze
386283.description: While channeling Disintegrate your Fire Breath on the target deals damage $s1% more often.

386284.name: Champion's Might
386284.description: The duration of Champion's Spear is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec. You deal $376080s5% increased critical strike damage to targets chained to your Spear.

386348.name: Onyx Legacy
386348.description: Deep Breath's cooldown is reduced by 1 min.

386394.name: Battle-Scarred Veteran
386394.description:
When your health is brought below $s1%, you take $386397s1% less damage for $386397d and healing you receive is increased by $386397s2%.

Cannot occur more than once every $456447d.

386405.name: Inner Radiance
386405.description: Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are $s1% more effective on yourself.

386477.name: Violent Outburst
386477.description: Every $s1 rage you spend triggers a Violent Outburst, causing your next Shield Slam to deal $386478s1% increased damage, generate $386478s2% more Rage and grant Ignore Pain.

386617.name: Demonic Fortitude
386617.description: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by $s1%.

386628.name: Unhinged
386628.description: Every $s1 strikes of Bladestorm, you automatically cast a $?c1[Mortal Strike][Bloodthirst] at your target or random nearby enemy, dealing $s2% of normal damage.

386630.name: Battlelord
386630.description: Overpower has a $h% chance to reset the cooldown of Mortal Strike and reduce the cost of your next Mortal Strike by $386631s1%.

386634.name: Executioner's Precision
386634.description: Execute increases the damage of your next Mortal Strike by $386633s1%, stacking up to $386633u times.

386648.name: Nightmare
386648.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by $s1%.

386653.name: Bulwark of Righteous Fury
386653.description: Avenger's Shield increases the damage of your next Shield of the Righteous by $386652s1% for each target hit by Avenger's Shield, stacking up to $386652u times, and increases its radius by $386652s3 yds.

386659.name: Dark Accord
386659.description: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

386664.name: Ichor of Devils
386664.description: Dark Pact sacrifices only $s3% of your current health for the same shield value.

386686.name: Frequent Donor
386686.description: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

386689.name: Pact of Gluttony
386689.description:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

$@spellicon452930 $@spellname452930
$@spelldesc452930 60 sec cooldown.

386763.name: Freezing Cold
386763.description:
Enemies hit by Cone of Cold are frozen in place for $386770d instead of snared.

When your roots expire or are dispelled, your target is snared by $394255s1%, decaying over $394255d.

386828.name: Energized Barriers
386828.description: Casting your barrier removes all snare effects.

386870.name: Brutal Companion
386870.description: Barbed Shot has a $s1% chance to cause your pet to use its special attack and deal $s2% bonus damage.

386937.name: Anvil and Stave
386937.description: Each time you dodge or an enemy misses you, the remaining cooldown on your Brews is reduced by ${$s1/10}.1 sec. Effect reduced by $s2% for each additional recent attacker, up to $s3.

386951.name: Soul Swap
386951.description:
Copies your damage over time effects and Haunt from the target, preserving their duration.

Your next use of Soul Swap within 10 sec will exhale a copy damage of the effects onto a new target.

386965.name: Charred Passions
386965.description: Your Breath of Fire ignites your right leg in flame for $386963d, causing your Blackout Kick and Spinning Crane Kick to deal $s1% additional damage as Fire damage and refresh the duration of your Breath of Fire on the target.

386976.name: Withering Bolt
386976.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul deal $s1% increased damage, up to ${$s1*$s2}%, per damage over time effect you have active on the target.

386986.name: Sacrolash's Dark Strike
386986.description: $?a445465[Wither][Corruption] damage is increased by $s1%, and each time it deals damage any of your Curses active on the target are extended by ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

387044.name: Fervent Flickering
387044.description: Fire Blast gains $s1 additional charge and its damage is increased by $s2%.

387046.name: Elusive Footwork
387046.description: Blackout Kick deals an additional $s3% damage. Blackout Kick critical hits grant an additional $m2 $Lstack:stacks; of Elusive Brawler.

387103.name: Ruin
387103.description: Increases the critical strike damage of your Destruction spells by $s1%.

387108.name: Conflagration of Chaos
387108.description: Conflagrate and Shadowburn have a $s1% chance to guarantee your next cast of either ability to critically strike, and increase its damage by your critical strike chance.

387166.name: Raging Demonfire
387166.description: Channel Demonfire fires an additional $s1 bolts. Each bolt increases the remaining duration of $?a445465[Wither][Immolate] on all targets hit by ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

387170.name: Empyrean Legacy
387170.description: Avenging Wrath empowers your next $?c3[damage dealing single target Holy Power ability to automatically activate Divine Storm][Word of Glory to automatically activate Light of Dawn] with $s2% increased effectiveness.

387173.name: Diabolic Embers
387173.description: Incinerate now generates $s1% additional Soul Shard Fragments.

387219.name: Walk with the Ox
387219.description: Your damaging abilities have $@switch<$s1>[a][an increased] chance to invoke Niuzao, causing him to charge to your target's location and Stomp, dealing $1242373s1 Physical damage to your target and reduced damage to secondary targets.

387230.name: Fluidity of Motion
387230.description: Blackout Kick's cooldown is reduced by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

387252.name: Ashen Remains
387252.description: Chaos Bolt, Shadowburn, and Incinerate deal $s1% increased damage to targets afflicted by $?a445465[Wither][Immolate].

387259.name: Flashpoint
387259.description:
When your $?a445465[Wither][Immolate] deals periodic damage to a target above $s2% health, gain $387263s1% Haste for $387263d.

Stacks up to $387263U times.

387275.name: Chaos Incarnate
387275.description: Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, and Shadowburn always gain at least $s1% of the maximum benefit from your Mastery: Chaotic Energies.

387276.name: Strength of Spirit
387276.description: Expel Harm's healing is increased by up to $s1%, based on your missing health.

387341.name: Walloping Blow
387341.description: Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.

387384.name: Backlash
387384.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by $s1%.

Physical attacks against you have a $s2% chance to make your next Incinerate instant cast. This effect can only occur once every $proccooldown sec.

387506.name: Mayhem
387506.description:
Your single target spells have a $s1% chance to apply $?a200546[Bane of Havoc below][Havoc to] a nearby enemy for ${$s3/1000}.1 sec.

$?a200546[$@spellicon200546 $@spellname200546
Curses the ground with a demonic bane, causing all of your single target spells to also strike targets marked with the bane for $80240s1% of the damage dealt. Lasts ${$s3/1000}.1 sec.][$@spellicon80240 $@spellname80240
Marks a target with Havoc for ${$s3/1000}.1 sec, causing your single target spells to also strike the Havoc victim for $80240s1% of the damage dealt.]

387625.name: Staggering Strikes
387625.description: When you Blackout Kick, your |CFFffffffStagger|R is reduced by $<reduc>, increased by up to $s3% based on your missing health.

387638.name: Shadowboxing Treads
387638.description: Blackout Kick's damage increased by $s2% and it strikes an additional $s1 $ltarget;targets.

387761.name: Panacea
387761.description: Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for $387763s1 when cast.

387781.name: Commanding Light
387781.description: Beacon of Light transfers an additional $s1% of the amount healed.

387786.name: Moment of Compassion
387786.description: Your Flash of Light heals for an additional $s1% when cast on a target affected by your Beacon of Light.

387791.name: Empyreal Ward
387791.description: Lay on Hands grants the target $387792s1% increased armor for $387792d and now ignores healing reduction effects.

387801.name: Echoing Blessings
387801.description: Blessing of Freedom increases the target's movement speed by $s3%. $?s204018[Blessing of Spellwarding][Blessing of Protection] and Blessing of Sacrifice reduce the target's damage taken by $s4%. These effects linger for $394454d after the Blessing ends.

387805.name: Divine Glimpse
387805.description: Holy Shock and Judgment have a $s1% increased critical strike chance.

387807.name: Time Manipulation
387807.description: The cooldown of your loss of control spells are reduced by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

387808.name: Divine Revelations
387808.description: While empowered by Infusion of Light, Flash of Light heals for an additional $s2% and Judgment refunds ${$s1/1000}.1% of your maximum mana.

387879.name: Breaking Dawn
387879.description: Increases Light of Dawn's healing by $s1%.

387991.name: Tear of Morning
387991.description:
Your $?s399491[Sheilun's Gift][Invigorating Mist] healing is increased by $?s399491[$s3%][$s1%] and your Enveloping Mist also heals allies with Renewing Mist for $s2% of its healing.

The duration of Enveloping Mist is increased by ${$322118s5/1000} sec while you have a celestial summoned.

388004.name: Slaughtering Strikes
388004.description: Raging Blow causes every strike of your next Rampage to deal an additional $393931s1% damage, stacking up to $393931u times.

388020.name: Resplendent Mist
388020.description: Gust of Mists has a $s2% chance to do $s1% more healing.

388031.name: Jade Bond
388031.description: Chi Cocoons now apply Enveloping Mist for ${$s2/1000} sec when they expire or are consumed, and Chi-Ji's Gusts of Mists healing is increased by $s1% and Yu'lon's Soothing Breath healing is increased by $s3%.

388038.name: Yu'lon's Whisper
388038.description: While channeling Mana Tea you exhale the breath of Yu'lon, healing up to $s1 allies within $388044a1 yards for $388044s1 every ${$388040t1}.1 sec.

388039.name: Lone Survivor
388039.description: The duration of Survival of the Fittest is increased by ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

388049.name: Raging Armaments
388049.description: Raging Blow gains an extra charge.

388106.name: Soulscar
388106.description: Throw Glaive causes targets to take an additional $s1% of damage dealt as Chaos over $390181d.

388107.name: Ragefire
388107.description:
Each time Immolation Aura deals damage, $s1% of the damage dealt by up to $s2 critical strikes is gathered as Ragefire.

When Immolation Aura expires you explode, dealing all stored Ragefire damage to nearby enemies.

388108.name: Initiative
388108.description:
Damaging an enemy before they damage you increases your critical strike chance by $391215s1% for $391215d.

Vengeful Retreat refreshes your potential to trigger this effect on any enemies you are in combat with.

388112.name: Chaotic Transformation
388112.description: When you activate Metamorphosis, the cooldowns of Blade Dance and Eye Beam are immediately reset.

388113.name: Isolated Prey
388113.description:
Chaos Nova, Eye Beam, and Immolation Aura gain bonuses when striking 1 target.

$@spellicon179057 $@spellname179057:
Stun duration increased by ${$s1/1000} sec.

$@spellicon198013 $@spellname198013:
Deals $s2% increased damage.

$@spellicon258920 $@spellname258920:
Always critically strikes.

388116.name: Shattered Destiny
388116.description: The duration of your active demon form is extended by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec per $s2 Fury spent.

388118.name: Know Your Enemy
388118.description: Gain critical strike damage equal to $s2% of your critical strike chance.

388212.name: Gift of the Celestials
388212.description: Reduces the cooldown of $?s325197[Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane][Invoke Yul'on, the Jade Serpent] by ${$s1/-60000} min, but decreases its duration to ${($s4+$s2)/1000} sec.

388218.name: Calming Coalescence
388218.description: The absorb amount of Life Cocoon is increased by $s1%.

388491.name: Secret Infusion
388491.description:
After using Thunder Focus Tea, your next spell gives $s1% of a stat. Only one stat increase may be active at once:
$@spellname124682: Critical strike
$@spellname115151: Haste
$@spellname107428: Versatility

388505.name: Quick Sip
388505.description: Purify $s1% of your Staggered damage each time you gain $s2 sec of Shuffle duration.

388511.name: Overflowing Mists
388511.description: Your Enveloping Mists heal the target for ${$388514s1*$s1} each time they take direct damage.

388548.name: Mists of Life
388548.description: Life Cocoon applies Renewing Mist and Enveloping Mist to the target.

388551.name: Uplifted Spirits
388551.description: The cooldown of $?s388615[Restoral][Revival] is reduced by ${$s2/-1000} sec and $?s388615[Restoral][Revival] healing increased by $s1%.

388593.name: Peaceful Mending
388593.description: Allies targeted by Soothing Mist receive $s1% more healing from your Enveloping Mist and Renewing Mist effects.

388615.name: Restoral
388615.description:
Heals all party and raid members within 40 yds for (5988.28% of Spell Power) and clears them of all harmful Poison and Disease effects. 

Castable while stunned.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

388681.name: Elusive Mists
388681.description: Reduces all damage taken by you and your target while channeling Soothing Mists by $s1%.

388682.name: Misty Peaks
388682.description: Renewing Mist's heal over time effect has a ${$s3}.1% chance to apply Enveloping Mist for $s2 sec.

388701.name: Dancing Mists
388701.description: Renewing Mist has a $s1% chance to immediately spread to an additional target when initially cast or when traveling to a new target.

388779.name: Way of the Crane
388779.description: Tiger Palms strike twice, Blackout Kicks strike an additional $s5 targets at $s6% effectiveness, and Spinning Crane Kick heals $s4 nearby allies for $s1% of the damage done.

388809.name: Fast Feet
388809.description: Rising Sun Kick deals $s1% increased damage. Spinning Crane Kick deals $s2% additional damage.

388812.name: Vivacious Vivification
388812.description:
After casting $?a137023[Keg Smash][Rising Sun Kick], your next $?s399491[Sheilun's Gift][Vivify] becomes instant cast.$?c1[

This effect also reduces the energy cost of Vivify by $392883s3%.]?c3[

This effect also reduces the energy cost of Vivify by $392883s3%.][]

388813.name: Expeditious Fortification
388813.description: Fortifying Brew cooldown reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

388814.name: Ironshell Brew
388814.description: Increases your maximum health by an additional $s1% and your damage taken is reduced by an additional $s2% while Fortifying Brew is active.

388827.name: Explosive Potential
388827.description: Reduces the cooldown of Conflagrate by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

388832.name: Scalding Flames
388832.description: Increases the damage of $?a445465[Wither][Immolate] by $s1% and its duration by ${$s3/1000} sec.

388847.name: Rapid Diffusion
388847.description: Rising Sun Kick and Enveloping Mist apply Renewing Mist for $s1 seconds to an ally within $r yds.

388848.name: Crane Vortex
388848.description: Spinning Crane Kick damage increased by $s1% and its radius is increased by $s2%.

388849.name: Rising Star
388849.description: Rising Sun Kick damage increased by $s1% and critical strike damage increased by $s2%.

388874.name: Improved Detox
388874.description: Detox additionally removes all Poison and Disease effects.

388903.name: Storm of Swords
388903.description:
Whirlwind has a ${$s1/1000}.1 sec cooldown, but deals $s3% increased damage. 

Slam has a ${$s2/1000}.1 sec cooldown and generates ${$s6/10} Rage, but deals $s4% increased damage.

388917.name: Fortifying Brew
388917.description:
Turns your skin to stone for $120954d, increasing your current and maximum health by $<health>% and reducing all damage you take by $<damage>%.
