410253.description: Breath of Eons reduces enemies' movement speed by $439606s1%, and reduces their attack speed by $439606s2%, for $439606d.

410260.name: Overlord
410260.description: $?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath] casts an Eruption at the first $s1 enemies struck. These Eruptions have a $s2% chance to create a Mote of Possibility.

410261.name: Inferno's Blessing
410261.description: Fire Breath grants the inferno's blessing for $410263d to you and a nearby ally, giving their damaging attacks and spells a high chance to deal an additional $<dmg> Fire damage.

410352.name: Stretch Time
410352.description: While flying during $?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath], $410355s1% of damage you would take is instead dealt over $410355d.

410598.name: Soul Rip
410598.description:
Fracture the soul of up to 3 target players within 20 yds into the shadows, reducing their damage done by 25% and healing received by 25% for 8 sec. Souls are fractured up to 20 yds from the player's location.

Players can retrieve their souls to remove this effect.

410643.name: Molten Blood
410643.description: When cast, Blistering Scales grants the target a shield that absorbs up to $<shield> damage for $410651d based on their missing health. Lower health targets gain a larger shield.

410685.name: Symbiotic Bloom
410685.description: Emerald Blossom increases targets' healing received by $s1% for $410686d.

410687.name: Prolong Life
410687.description: Your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Symbiotic Bloom.

410784.name: Echoing Strike
410784.description: Azure Strike deals $s2% increased damage and has a $s1% chance per target hit to echo, casting again.

411164.name: Event Horizon
411164.description: Eternity Surge's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

411165.name: Eye of Infinity
411165.description: Eternity Surge deals $s1% increased damage to your primary target.

411212.name: Font of Magic
411212.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level $s3% faster.

412710.name: Timelessness
412710.description:
Enchant an ally to appear out of sync with the normal flow of time, reducing threat they generate by 30% for 1 hour. Less effective on tank-specialized allies. 

May only be placed on one target at a time.

412713.name: Interwoven Threads
412713.description: The cooldowns of your spells are reduced by $s1%.

412723.name: Tomorrow, Today
412723.description: Time Skip channels for ${$s1/1000} sec longer.

412733.name: Unyielding Domain
412733.description: Upheaval cannot be interrupted, and has an additional $s1% chance to critically strike.

412774.name: Fate Mirror
412774.description: Prescience grants the ally a chance for their spells and abilities to echo their damage or healing, dealing $s1% of the amount again.

414073.name: Light's Conviction
414073.description: Holy Shock now has ${$s1+1} charges and it refunds $s2% of its mana cost when cast on an enemy.

414113.name: Righteous Judgment
414113.description:
Judgment has a $s1% chance to cast Consecration at the target's location.

The limit on Consecration does not apply to this effect.

414131.name: Yu'lon's Grace
414131.description: Find resilience in the flow of chi in battle, gaining a magic absorb shield for ${$s1/10}.1% of your max health every $t sec in combat, stacking up to $s2%.

414132.name: Dance of the Wind
414132.description: Your dodge chance is increased by $s1%.

414195.name: Awakening
414195.description:
While in combat, your Holy Power spenders have a $s1% chance to cause your next Judgment to deal $414193s1% increased damage and critically strike.

Activating Avenging Wrath activates Awakening.

414443.name: Shining Righteousness
414443.description:
$?s2812[Denounce][Shield of the Righteous] deals $414448s1 damage to its first target struck.

$?s2812[Denounce][Shield of the Righteous] now has a $s1% chance to activate Divine Purpose if talented.

414553.name: Epiphany
414553.description: Your Holy Words have a $s1% chance to cause your next cast of Prayer of Mending to ignore its cooldown.

414659.name: Ice Cold
414659.description: Ice Block now reduces all damage taken by $414658s8% for $414658d but no longer grants Immunity, prevents movement, attacks, or casting spells. Does not incur the Global Cooldown.

414664.name: Mass Invisibility
414664.description:
You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 sec. Taking any action will cancel the effect.

Does not affect allies in combat.

414720.name: Tirion's Devotion
414720.description: Lay on Hands' cooldown is reduced by $s1% and restores $415299s1% of your Mana.

414969.name: Dream of Spring
414969.description: Emerald Blossom no longer has a cooldown, deals $s4% increased healing, and increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by $s2 sec, but costs $s1 Essence.

415091.name: Shield of the Righteous
415091.description: Slams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (198% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and reducing the cooldown of Holy Shock by 2.0 sec and granting 3000 mana.

415364.name: Reclamation
415364.description: Holy Shock refunds up to $s1% of its Mana cost and deals up to $s2% more healing or damage, based on the target's missing health.

415416.name: Benevolence
415416.description: Increases the healing of your spells by $s1%.

416094.name: Fuel the Fire
416094.description:
Flamestrike has a chance equal to $s1% of your spell critical strike chance to build up to a Hot Streak.

Flamestrike deals $s2% increased damage for each enemy it damages, up to ${$s2*$s3}%.

416230.name: Imp-erator
416230.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Wild Imp's Fel Firebolt by $s1%.

416250.name: Gift of the Naaru
416250.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

416615.name: Xavius' Gambit
416615.description: Reduces the cast time of Unstable Affliction by ${$abs($s1)/1000}.2 sec and increases its damage by $s2%.

416714.name: Intensifying Flame
416714.description: While Ignite is on $s1 or fewer enemies it flares up dealing an additional $s2% of its damage to affected targets.

416719.name: Blast Zone
416719.description: Meteor's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

417234.name: Crashing Chaos
417234.description: Summon Infernal increases the damage of your next $s3 casts of Chaos Bolt by $s1% or your next $s3 casts of Rain of Fire by $s2%.

417467.name: Inflame
417467.description: Hot Streak increases the amount of Ignite damage from Pyroblast or Flamestrike by an additional $s1%.

417489.name: Winter's Blessing
417489.description:
Your Haste is increased by $s1%.

You gain $s2% more Haste from all sources of Haste.

417855.name: Awestruck
417855.description: Holy Shock, Holy Light, and Flash of Light critical healing increased by $s1%.

418101.name: Potent Mana
418101.description: Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by $s1%.

418359.name: Press the Advantage
418359.description:
Your main hand auto attacks reduce the cooldown on your Brews by ${$s2/1000}.2 sec and block your target's chi, dealing $418360s1 additional Nature damage.

After $418361u attacks, the next casts Tiger Palm at $418361s2% effectiveness.

418733.name: Splintering Ray
418733.description: Ray of Frost deals $s1% of its damage to $s2 nearby enemies.

419110.name: Seraphic Crescendo
419110.description: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Hymn by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

421432.name: Saber Jaws
421432.description: When you spend extra Energy on Ferocious Bite, the extra damage is increased by $s1%.

421453.name: Ultimate Penitence
421453.description:
Ascend into the air and unleash a massive barrage of Penance bolts, causing [(190% of Spell Power)> * 24] Holy damage to enemies or [(445% of Spell Power)> * 24] healing to allies over 6 sec.

While ascended, gain a shield for 100% of your health. In addition, you are unaffected by knockbacks or crowd control effects.

421975.name: Caustic Spatter
421975.description:
Envenom or Kingsbane apply Caustic Spatter for $421976d. Limit 1.

Caustic Spatter causes $421976s1% of your Nature damage dealt to splash onto other nearby enemies, reduced beyond $421976s2 targets.

422031.name: Energizing Brew
422031.description: Mana Tea now channels $s1% faster and generates $s2% more Mana.

423136.name: Sudden Demise
423136.description:
Bleed damage increased by $s1%.

Targets below $s3% health instantly bleed out and take fatal damage when the remaining Bleed damage you would deal to them exceeds $s2% of their remaining health.

423662.name: Stillshroud
423662.description: Shroud of Concealment has $s1% reduced cooldown.

423683.name: Featherfoot
423683.description: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional $s1% and has ${$s2/1000} sec increased duration.

423701.name: Superior Mixture
423701.description: Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional $s1%.

424058.name: Boundless Moonlight
424058.description:
$?a137010[$@spellicon204066 $@spellname204066
Lunar Beam now causes you to leech life equal to $425217s1% of all damage dealt to enemies within the beam.

$@spellicon202770 $@spellname202770
Fury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for $428682s1 Astral damage.]

[$@spellicon202770 $@spellname202770
Fury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for $428682s1 Astral damage.

$@spellicon274283 $@spellname274283
$@spelldesc424588]

424113.name: The Eternal Moon
424113.description:
Further increases the power of Boundless Moonlight.

$?a137010[$@spellicon204066 $@spellname204066
Lunar Beam increases Mastery by an additional ${$s5*$mas}%, deals $s6% increased damage, and lasts ${$s3/1000} sec longer.

$@spellicon202770 $@spellname202770
The flash of energy now generates  ${$428682s3/10} Rage and its damage is increased by $s1%.][$@spellicon202770 $@spellname202770
The flash of energy now generates ${$428682s2/10} Astral Power and its damage is increased by $s1%.

$@spellicon274283 $@spellname274283
New Moon and Half Moon now also call down $s2 Minor $LMoon:Moons;.]

424557.name: Savagery
424557.description: Kill Command damage is increased by $s1%. Barbed Shot lasts ${$m2/1000}.1 sec longer.

424558.name: Master Handler
424558.description: Each time Barbed Shot deals damage, the cooldown of Kill Command is reduced by ${$m1/1000}.2 sec.

424742.name: Battlefield Commander
424742.description:
Your Shout abilities have additional effects.

$@spellicon6673 $@spellname6673:
Grants you an additional $s6% attack power.

$@spellicon97462 $@spellname97462:
Grants an additional $s4% health and duration increased by ${$s5/1000} sec.

$@spellicon12323 $@spellname12323:
Radius increased by $s3%

$@spellicon384100 $@spellname384100:
Radius increased by $s1%.

$@spellicon5246 $@spellname5246:
Cooldown reduced by ${$s2/-1000} sec.

425518.name: Light's Deliverance
425518.description:
You gain a stack of Light's Deliverance when you call down an Empyrean Hammer.

While $?a137028[Divine Toll][Wake of Ashes] and Hammer of Light are unavailable, you consume $433674U stacks of Light's Deliverance, empowering yourself to cast Hammer of Light an additional time for free.

426115.name: Demoniac
426115.description:
Grants access to the following abilities:

$@spellicon264178 $@spellname264178
$@spelldesc264178

$@spellicon267102 $@spellname267102
$@spelldesc267102

426555.name: Warning Signs
426555.description: Shadow Dance increases attack speed by $185313s8%.

426591.name: Goremaw's Bite
426591.description:
Lashes out at the target, inflicting (326.7% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing your next 3 finishing moves to cost no Energy.

Awards 3 combo points.

426594.name: Shadowcraft
426594.description: While Shadow Dance is active, your Shadow Techniques triggers $s3% more frequently, stores $m2 additional combo $Lpoint:points;, and generates $s1 additional Energy.

426702.name: Liveliness
426702.description: Your damage over time effects deal their damage $s1% faster, and your healing over time effects heal $s2% faster.

426784.name: Call of the Elder Druid
426784.description:
When you cast Starsurge, Rake, Shred, or Frenzied Regeneration you gain Call of the Elder Druid for $s2 sec, once every $338643d.

$@spellicon319454 $@spellname319454
$@spelldesc319454

427445.name: Light's Guidance
427445.description:
$?a137028[Divine Toll][Wake of Ashes] is replaced with $@spellname427453 for $427441d after it is cast.

$@spellicon427453 $@spellname427453:
$@spelldesc427453
|cFFFFFFFFCosts 5 Holy Power.

427640.name: Inertia
427640.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat cause your next Fel Rush or Felblade to empower you, increasing damage by $427641s1% for $427641d.

427775.name: A Fire Inside
427775.description:
Immolation Aura has $m1 additional $Lcharge:charges;, has ${$s3/-1000} sec reduced cooldown, and deals Chaos damage instead of Fire.

You can have multiple Immolation Auras active at a time.

427776.name: Deflecting Dance
427776.description: You deflect incoming attacks while Blade Dancing, absorbing damage up to $s1% of your maximum health.

427794.name: Dash of Chaos
427794.description: For ${$427793D-($428160s1/10)} sec after using Fel Rush, activating it again will dash back towards your initial location.

428232.name: Scars of Suffering
428232.description: Increases Versatility by $s1% and reduces threat generated by ${$s2*-1}%.

428241.name: Demon Hide
428241.description: Magical damage increased by $s1%, and Physical damage taken reduced by $s2%.

428377.name: Precision Shot
428377.description: Between the Eyes and Pistol Shot have $s1 yd increased range and deal $s2% increased damage.

428387.name: Terrifying Pace
428387.description: Shuriken Storm increases your movement speed by $428389s1% for $428389d when striking $s1 or more enemies.

428394.name: Spiteful Reconstitution
428394.description: Increases Demonbolt damage by $s1% and consuming a Demonic Core has a chance to summon a Wild Imp.

428486.name: Exhilarating Execution
428486.description: Your finishing moves heal you for $s1% of damage done. At full health gain shielding instead, absorbing up to $s2% of your maximum health.

428492.name: Chaotic Disposition
428492.description: Your Chaos damage has a ${$s2/100}.2% chance to be increased by $s3%, occurring up to $m1 total $Ltime:times;.

428514.name: Diabolic Ritual
428514.description:
$?s137044[Spending a Soul Shard on a damaging spell grants Diabolic Ritual for $431944d. While Diabolic Ritual is active, each Soul Shard spent on a damaging spell reduces its duration by $s1 sec.][Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for $431944d. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by $s2 sec instead.]

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next $?s137044[Hand of Gul'dan][Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn] to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

428517.name: Cloven Souls
428517.description: Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by $434424s1% for $434424d.

428518.name: Secrets of the Coven
428518.description:
Mother of Chaos empowers your next $?s137044[Shadow Bolt][Incinerate] to become Infernal Bolt.

$@spellicon434506 $@spellname434506
$@spelldesc434506

428522.name: Ruination
428522.description:
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next $?s137044[Hand of Gul'dan][Chaos Bolt] to become Ruination.

$@spellicon434635 $@spellname434635
$@spelldesc434635

428544.name: Treants of the Moon
428544.description: Your $?a137013[Force of Nature treants][Grove Guardians] cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every $s1 sec.

428603.name: Ascending Flame
428603.description: Sigil of Flame damage increased by $s2%.

428607.name: Live by the Glaive
428607.description:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore $428608s2% of max health and $428608s1 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every $s1 sec.

428655.name: The Light of Elune
428655.description:
Moonfire damage has a chance to call down a Fury of Elune to follow your target for ${$s2/1000} sec.

$@spellicon202770 $@spellname202770
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy, dealing $<dmg> Astral damage over ${$s2/1000} sec within its area.

|cFFFFFFFFGenerates $?a137010[${$202770m4/$202770t4*$s2/10000} Rage][${$202770m3/$202770t3*$s2/10000} Astral Power] over its duration.|r

428731.name: Harmony of the Grove
428731.description: $?a137013[Each of your Force of Nature treants increases damage your spells deal by $428735s1% while active.][Each of your Grove Guardians increases your healing done by $428737s1% while active.]

428859.name: Power of Nature
428859.description: $?a137013[Your Force of Nature treants no longer taunt and deal $449001s1% increased melee damage.][Your Grove Guardians increase the healing of your Rejuvenation, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom by $428866s1% while active.]

428911.name: Soul-Etched Circles
428911.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

428937.name: Early Spring
428937.description: $?a137013[Force of Nature cooldown reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.][Swiftmend and Wild Growth cooldowns reduced by ${$s2/-1000} sec.]

429072.name: Annihilan's Bellow
429072.description: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec and range is increased by $s2 yds.

429115.name: Infernal Vitality
429115.description: Unending Resolve heals you for ${$434559s1*($434559d/$434559t1)}% of your maximum health over $434559d.

429130.name: Infernal Bulwark
429130.description: Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to $434561s1% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by $434561s1% for $434561d.

429211.name: Champion of the Glaive
429211.description: Throw Glaive has ${$s2+1} charges and $s1 yard increased range.

429215.name: Bounteous Bloom
429215.description: $?a137013[Force of Nature summons 4 Treants.][Your Grove Guardians' healing is increased by $s1%.]

429227.name: Durability of Nature
429227.description: $?c1[Your Force of Nature treants have $s1% increased health.][Grove Guardians last $s2% longer.]

429399.name: Expansiveness
429399.description: Your maximum mana is increased by $s2%$?a137013[ and your maximum Astral Power is increased by ${$s1/10}][].

429402.name: Grove's Inspiration
429402.description:
Wrath and Starfire damage increased by $s1%. 

Regrowth$?a137013[ and Wild Growth][, Wild Growth, and Swiftmend] healing increased by $s2%.

429420.name: Potent Enchantments
429420.description:
$?c1[Orbital Strike damage increased by $s3%, and damage of Stellar Flares it applies increased by $s2%.

Whirling Stars increases the haste you gain during ][]$?c1&s394013[Incarnation: Chosen of Elune]?c1[Celestial Alignment][]$?c1[ by an additional $s4%.][Reforestation grants Tree of Life for $s5 additional sec.]

429433.name: Blooming Infusion
429433.description:
Every $s1 Regrowths you cast makes your next Wrath, Starfire, or Entangling Roots instant and increases damage it deals by $429474s2%.

Every $s1 Starsurges $?a137013[or Starfalls ][]you cast makes your next Regrowth or Entangling roots instant.

429483.name: Warp
429483.description:
Hover now causes you to briefly warp out of existence and appear at your destination. Hover's cooldown is also reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

Hover continues to allow Evoker spells to be cast while moving.

429520.name: Moon Guardian
429520.description: $?a137013[Moonfire and Starfire generate ${$s1/10} additional Astral Power.][Free automatic Moonfires from Galactic Guardian generate ${$430581s1/10} Rage.]

429523.name: Lunar Calling
429523.description:
$?a137013[Starfire deals $s1% increased damage to its primary target.

Wrath no longer changes your Eclipse ability's mode to Solar Eclipse.][Thrash now deals Arcane damage and its damage is increased by $s2%.]

429530.name: Lunar Insight
429530.description:
Moonfire deals $s1% increased damage.$?a137010[

Red Moon deals $s3% increased damage.][]

429532.name: Atmospheric Exposure
429532.description: Enemies damaged by $?a137013[Full Moon or Fury of Elune][Lunar Beam or Fury of Elune] take $430589s1% increased damage from you for $430589d.

429533.name: Glistening Fur
429533.description: Bear Form and Moonkin Form reduce Arcane damage taken by $s2% and all other magic damage taken by $s1%.

429536.name: Astral Insight
429536.description:
$?a137013[Incarnation: Chosen of Elune][Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc] increases Arcane damage from spells and abilities by $102560s6% while active.

Increases the duration and number of spells cast by Convoke the Spirits by $s1%.

429538.name: Moondust
429538.description: Enemies affected by Moonfire are slowed by $164812s8%.

429539.name: Lunation
429539.description: $?a137013[Your Arcane abilities reduce the cooldown of Fury of Elune by ${$s1/-1000}.1 sec and the cooldown of New Moon, Half Moon, and Full Moon by ${$s2/-1000}.1 sec.][Your Arcane abilities reduce the cooldown of Lunar Beam by ${$s3/-1000}.1 sec.]

429540.name: Arcane Affinity
429540.description: All Arcane damage from your spells and abilities is increased by $s1%.

429581.name: Abyssal Dominion
429581.description: $?s137044[Summon Demonic Tyrant is empowered, dealing $s1% increased damage and increasing the damage of your demons by $s2% while active.][Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing $s3% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at $s4% effectiveness that lasts $456310d.]

429634.name: Colossal Might
429634.description:
Colossal Might increases damage dealt by your next Demolish by $440989s1%, stacking up to $440989u times.

$?c1[Mortal Strike][Shield Slam] grants a stack of Colossal Might and $?c1[Cleave][Revenge] grants a stack of Colossal Might when it strikes $s1 or more targets.

429636.name: Dominance of the Colossus
429636.description:
Colossal Might stacks up to 10 times. If you would gain a stack of Colossal Might and are at max stacks, the cooldown of Demolish is reduced by $s2 sec.

Enemies affected by Demolish take up to ${$447513s2*$447513u*0.1}% more damage from you and deal up to ${$447513s1*$447513u*-0.1}% less damage to you for $447513d based on the number of stacks of Colossal Might consumed by Demolish.

429637.name: One Against Many
429637.description: Shockwave$?c1[, Cleave,][] and $?c1[Whirlwind][Revenge] deal $s1% more damage per target affected up to $s2.

429638.name: Martial Expert
429638.description: Critical strike damage of your abilities is increased by $s1% and the amount of damage blocked by your critical blocks is increased by $s2%.

429639.name: Boneshaker
429639.description: Shockwave's stun duration is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec and reduces the movement speed of affected enemies by $458480s1% for $458480d after the stun ends.

429641.name: Tide of Battle
429641.description: Colossal Might increases the damage of your $?c1[Overpower][Revenge] by $?c1[$440989s3][$440989s4]% per stack.

429642.name: Mountain of Muscle and Scars
429642.description:
You deal $s1% more damage and take $s4% less damage.

Size increased by $s5%.

429644.name: No Stranger to Pain
429644.description: Damage prevented by each use of Ignore Pain is increased by $s1%.

429647.name: Practiced Strikes
429647.description:
$?c1[Mortal Strike and Slam damage increased by $s1%.

Cleave and Whirlwind damage increased by $s2%][Shield Slam damage increased by $s3%.

Revenge and Thunder Clap damage increased by $s4%].$?c3[

Shield Slam generates an additional ${$s5/10} Rage.][]

429657.name: Flames of Xoroth
429657.description: Fire damage increased by $s1% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by $s3%.

429668.name: Stellar Command
429668.description: $?a137013[Increases the damage of Fury of Elune by $s1% and the damage of Full Moon by $s2%.][Increases the damage of Lunar Beam by $s3% and Fury of Elune by $s1%.]

429893.name: Touch of Rancora
429893.description:
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next $?s137044[Hand of Gul'dan][Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn] by $s1% and reduces its cast time by $s2%.

$?s137044[][Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by $s3 additional sec.]

429899.name: Gloom of Nathreza
429899.description: $?s137044[Hand of Gul'dan deals $s1% increased damage for each Soul Shard spent.][Enemies marked by your Havoc take $s2% increased damage from your single target spells.]

429902.name: Cruelty of Kerxan
429902.description: $?s137044[Summon Demonic Tyrant][Summon Infernal] grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by ${$s1/1000} sec.

429917.name: Infernal Machine
429917.description: Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your $?s137044[Demonic Tyrant][Infernal] is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by ${$s1/1000} additional sec.

430709.name: Smoke Screen
430709.description:
Exhilaration grants you $s1 sec of Survival of the Fittest.

Survival of the Fittest activates Exhilaration at $s2% effectiveness.

430712.name: Dark Chains
430712.description: While in combat, Disengage will chain the closest target to the ground, causing them to move $442396s1% slower until they move $s1 yards away.

431044.name: Frostfire Bolt
431044.description: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing (259.4% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional (21.6% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage over 8 sec.

431066.name: Imbued Warding
431066.description: $?c2[Blazing Barrier also casts an Ice Barrier at $s1% effectiveness.]?c3[Ice Barrier also casts a Blazing Barrier at $s2% effectiveness.][]

431067.name: Elemental Affinity
431067.description: $?c2[The cooldown of Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than $s4 minutes is reduced by $s1%.]?c3[The cooldown of Fire spells is reduced by $s3%.][]

431095.name: Isothermic Core
431095.description:
$?a137019[Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing ${$438609s1*7} Frost damage to nearby enemies]?a137020[Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing $351140s1 Fire damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Damage from Meteor Shatters $1246769s5 stacks of Freezing][Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing ${$438609s1*7} Frost damage to nearby enemies.

Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing $351140s1 Fire damage to nearby enemies].

431112.name: Flame and Frost
431112.description:
$?a137020[Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells.]?a137019[Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than $s1 minutes when it activates.][Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells.

Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than $s1 minutes when it activates.]

431117.name: Thermal Conditioning
431117.description: Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by $s1%.

431131.name: Meltdown
431131.description:
You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time.

Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.

431166.name: Frostfire Infusion
431166.description:
$?a137020[Frostfire Bolt has an additional $s1% chance to grant Brain Freeze]?a137019[Frostfire Bolt's critical strike chance is increased by $s2%.][Frostfire Bolt has and additional $s1% chance to grant Brain Freeze and its critical strike chance is increased by $s2%].

The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by $s3%.

431176.name: Frostfire Empowerment
431176.description:
Casting Frostfire spells has a $s3% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal $431177s3% increased damage, explode for $s2% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond $s5 targets.$?c2[][

Damage from Frostfire Empowerment applies $s4 $Lstack:stacks; of Freezing.]

431178.name: Flash Freezeburn
431178.description:
$?a137020[Glacial Spike damage increased by $s1% and it now explodes on impact, dealing $s2% of its damage to up to $s3 nearby enemies.

Additionally, Glacial Spike now grants Frostfire Empowerment][Meteor's damage is increased by $s4%.

Meteor now grants Frostfire Empowerment].

431189.name: Severe Temperatures
431189.description: Frostfire Empowerment stacks $s1 additional $Ltime:times; and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional $s2% of its damage.

431377.name: Dawnlight
431377.description:
Casting $?c1[Holy Prism or Divine Toll]?c3[Wake of Ashes][] causes your next $s1 Holy Power spending abilities to apply Dawnlight on your target, dealing $431380o1 Radiant damage or $431381o1 healing over $431380d.

$431581s1% of Dawnlight's damage and healing radiates to nearby allies or enemies, reduced beyond $431581s2 targets.$?c1[

Dawnlight's healing does not transfer to Beacon of Light.][]

431402.name: Luminosity
431402.description: $?c1[Critical Strike chance of Holy Shock and Light of Dawn increased by $s1%.]?c3[Critical Strike chance of Hammer of Wrath and Divine Storm increased by $s2%.][]

431406.name: Will of the Dawn
431406.description:
Movement speed increased by $431462s1% while above $s1% health.

When your health is brought below $s3%, your movement speed is increased by $431752s1% for $431752d. Cannot occur more than once every $456779d.

431407.name: Lingering Radiance
431407.description: Dawnlight leaves an Eternal Flame for ${$s1/1000} sec on allies or a Greater Judgment on enemies when it expires or is extended.

431413.name: Sun Sear
431413.description: $?c1[Holy Shock and Light of Dawn critical strikes cause the target to be healed for an additional $431415o1 over $431415d.]?c3[Hammer of Wrath and Divine Storm critical strikes cause the target to burn for an additional $431414o1 Radiant damage over $431414d.][]

431423.name: Illumine
431423.description: Dawnlight reduces the movement speed of enemies by $431380s3% and increases the movement speed of allies by $431381s3%.

431425.name: Sun's Avatar
431425.description: You link to your Dawnlights within $s8 yds, causing $431911s1 Radiant damage to enemies or $431939s1 healing to allies that pass through the beams, reduced beyond $?c3[$s9][$s6] targets.

431442.name: Chrono Flame
431442.description: Living Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating $?c2[$s1%][$s3%] of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last $s2 sec as Arcane, up to $?s1260647[$<cap2>][$<cap>].

431463.name: Zealous Vindication
431463.description: Hammer of Light instantly calls down $s1 Empyrean Hammers on your target when it is cast.

431474.name: Second Sunrise
431474.description: $?c1[Light of Dawn and Holy Shock have a $s1% chance to cast again at $s2% effectiveness.]?c3[Divine Storm and Hammer of Wrath have a $s1% chance to cast again at $s2% effectiveness.][]

431480.name: Gleaming Rays
431480.description: Your Holy Power spenders deal $s1% additional damage and healing.

431482.name: Morning Star
431482.description:
Every ${$t1}.1 sec, your next Dawnlight's damage or healing is increased by $431539s1%, stacking up to $431539u times.

Morning Star stacks twice as fast while out of combat.

431484.name: Instability Matrix
431484.description: Each time you cast an empower spell, unstable time magic reduces its cooldown by up to $s1 sec.

431533.name: Shake the Heavens
431533.description: After casting Hammer of Light, you call down an Empyrean Hammer on a nearby target every $431536T sec, for $431536d.

431548.name: Precise Might
431548.description: $?c1[Mortal Strike][Shield Slam] critical strikes grant an additional stack of Colossal Might.

431551.name: Wrathful Descent
431551.description:
When Empyrean Hammer critically strikes, $s2% of its damage is dealt to nearby enemies.

Enemies hit by this effect deal $431625s3% reduced damage to you for $431625d.

431615.name: Reverberations
431615.description: $?c2[Verdant Embrace heals for an additional $s1% over $409895d.][Upheaval deals $s2% additional damage over $431620d.]

431657.name: Primacy
431657.description: For each $?c2[healing over time effect from Verdant Embrace][damage over time effect from Upheaval], gain $s1% haste, up to $s2%.

431687.name: Higher Calling
431687.description: $?a137028[Crusader Strike, Hammer of Wrath and Judgment][Crusader Strike, Hammer of Wrath and Blade of Justice] extend the duration of Shake the Heavens by $s1 sec.

431695.name: Temporal Burst
431695.description: Tip the Scales overloads you with temporal energy, increasing your haste, movement speed, and cooldown recovery rate by ${$431698u*$431698s1}%, decreasing over $431698d.

431715.name: Nozdormu Adept
431715.description: $?c2[Temporal Anomaly mana cost reduced by $s1% and cooldown reduced by ${$s2/-1000} sec.][Prescience cooldown reduced by ${$s3/-1000} sec and it grants $s4% additional critical strike chance.]

431730.name: Sacrosanct Crusade
431730.description:
$?a137028[Divine Toll][Wake of Ashes] surrounds you with a Holy barrier for $?a137028[$s1][$s4]% of your maximum health.

Hammer of Light heals you for $?a137028[$s2][$s5]% of your maximum health, increased by $?a137028[$s3][$s6]% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead.

431873.name: Temporality
431873.description: Warp reduces damage taken by ${$s1/-1}%, starting high and reducing over $431872d.

431874.name: Double-time
431874.description: $?c2[When Dream Breath or Fire Breath critically strike, their duration is extended by $s1 sec, up to a maximum of ${$s1*6} sec.][Ebon Might and Prescience gain a chance equal to your critical strike chance to grant $s2% additional stats.]

431875.name: Afterimage
431875.description: Empower spells send up to $s1 Chrono Flames to your targets.

431984.name: Time Convergence
431984.description:
Non-defensive abilities with a $s1 second or longer cooldown grant $431991s1% Intellect for $431991d.

Essence spells extend the duration by $s2 sec.

432008.name: Motes of Acceleration
432008.description: Warp leaves a trail of Motes of Acceleration. Allies who come in contact with a mote gain 20% increased movement speed for 30 sec.

432181.name: Dance of the Wind
432181.description: Your physical damage taken is reduced by $s2% and an additional $432180s2% every $t1 sec until you receive a physical attack.

432459.name: Holy Bulwark
432459.description:
Protection
Will the Light to coalesce and become manifest as a Holy Armament, wielded by your friendly target.

 Holy Bulwark:

While wielding a Holy Bulwark, gain an absorb shield for 15.0% of your max health and an additional 2.0% every 2 sec. Lasts 20 sec.

Becomes Sacred Weapon after use.

 Holy
Will the Light to coalesce and become manifest as a Holy Armament, wielded by your friendly target.

 Holy Bulwark:

While wielding a Holy Bulwark, gain an absorb shield for 15.0% of your max health and an additional 2.0% every 2 sec. Lasts 20 sec.

Becomes Sacred Weapon after use.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

432463.name: Hammerfall
432463.description:
$?a137028[Shield of the Righteous and Word of Glory]?s383328[Final Verdict][Templar's Verdict]$?a137027[ and Divine Storm][] calls down an Empyrean Hammer on a nearby enemy.

While Shake the Heavens is active, this effect calls down an additional Empyrean Hammer.

432615.name: Endless Wrath
432615.description: Empyrean Hammer has a $s1% increased chance to critically strike.

432626.name: Undisputed Ruling
432626.description: Hammer of Light $?a137028[grants Shield of the Righteous, erupts a Consecration beneath its target][applies Judgment to its targets], and increases your Haste by $432629s1% for $432629d.

432802.name: Solidarity
432802.description:
If you bestow an Armament upon an ally, you also gain its benefits.

If you bestow an Armament upon yourself, a nearby ally also gains its benefits.

432804.name: Forewarning
432804.description: The cooldown of Holy Armaments is reduced by $s1%.

432821.name: Shared Resolve
432821.description: The effect of your active Aura is increased by $432496s1% on targets with your Armaments.

432866.name: Laying Down Arms
432866.description: When an Armament fades from you, the cooldown of Lay on Hands is reduced by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec and you gain $?a137028[Shining Light][Infusion of Light].

432919.name: Valiance
432919.description: Consuming $?a137028[Shining Light][Infusion of Light] reduces the cooldown of Holy Armaments by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec.

432929.name: Divine Hammer
432929.description:
Divine Toll summons Divine Hammers that spin around you for $198034d.

$@spellicon198034$@spellname198034
$@spelldesc198034

432964.name: Divine Inspiration
432964.description: Your spells and abilities have a chance to manifest a Holy Armament for a nearby ally.

432977.name: Sanctification
432977.description:
Casting Judgment increases the damage of Empyrean Hammer by $433671s1% for $433671d.

Multiple applications may overlap.

432990.name: Unrelenting Charger
432990.description: Divine Steed lasts ${$s1/1000} sec longer and increases your movement speed by an additional $442221s1% for the first $442221d.

432992.name: Bonds of Fellowship
432992.description: You receive 20% less damage from Blessing of Sacrifice and each time its target takes damage, you gain 4% movement speed up to a maximum of 40%.

433011.name: Blessing of the Forge
433011.description: Avenging Wrath summons an additional Sacred Weapon, and during Avenging Wrath your Sacred Weapon casts spells on your target and echoes the effects of your Holy Power abilities.

433015.name: Blessed Assurance
433015.description: Casting a Holy Power ability increases the damage and healing of your next $?s204019[Blessed Hammer]?s53595[Hammer of the Righteous]?s137029[Holy Shock][Crusader Strike] by $433019s1%.

433106.name: Divine Guidance
433106.description: For each Holy Power ability cast, your next Consecration deals $?a137029[$<holy>][$<prot>] damage or healing immediately, split across all enemies and allies.

433568.name: Rite of Sanctification
433568.description:
Protection
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 2%.

Lasts 1 hour.

 Holy
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 5%.

Lasts 1 hour.

433583.name: Rite of Adjuration
433583.description:
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your Stamina by 3% and causing your Holy Power abilities to sometimes unleash a burst of healing around a target.

Lasts 1 hour.

433718.name: Hammer and Anvil
433718.description: Judgment critical strikes cause a shockwave around the target, $?c1[healing to up to $s3 injuried allies for $433722s1][dealing $433717s1 damage to enemies within $433717a1 yards. Damage reduced above $s4 targets].

433748.name: Protective Growth
433748.description: Your Regrowth protects you, reducing damage you take by $s1% while your Regrowth is on you.

433831.name: Dream Surge
433831.description: $?a137013[Force of Nature grants $s1 charges of Dream Burst, causing your next Wrath or Starfire to explode on the target, dealing ${$433850s1*(1+$393014s3/100)} Nature damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced above $433850s2 targets.][When Grove Guardians are summoned, they grow Dream Petals on your target, healing up to $s2 nearby allies for $434141s1.]

433871.name: Maneuverability
433871.description:
$?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath] can now be steered in your desired direction.

In addition, $?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath] burns targets for $441172o1 Volcanic damage over $441172d.$?c1[

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.][]

433901.name: Vampiric Strike
433901.description:
Your Death Coil$?a137007[, Epidemic][] and Death Strike have a $s1% chance to make your next $?a137008[Heart Strike]?s207311[Clawing Shadows][Scourge Strike] become Vampiric Strike.

Vampiric Strike heals you for $?a137008[$434422s2][$434422s3]% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by ${$433925s1/10}.1%, up to ${$433925s1*$433925u/10}.1% for $433925d.

433905.name: Prophet's Will
433905.description: $?a137032[Your Flash Heal and Power Word: Shield are $s1%][Your Flash Heal and Holy Word: Serenity are $s1%] more effective when cast on yourself.

433934.name: Newly Turned
433934.description: Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to $s2% of your maximum health.

434028.name: Vampiric Speed
434028.description:
Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by $s1%.

Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases $434029s2 nearby allies movement speed by $434029s1% for $434029d.

434033.name: Blood-Soaked Ground
434033.description: While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by ${$434034s1*-1}% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by $s2%.

434075.name: Frenzied Bloodthirst
434075.description: Essence of the Blood Queen stacks $s1 additional times and increases the damage of your $?s137008[Death Coil and Death Strike by $s2%][Death Coil and Death Strike by $s2%, and Epidemic by $s3%] per stack.

434100.name: Vampiric Aura
434100.description:
Your Leech is increased by $s1%.

While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by $434105s1%, and it affects $s2 allies within 12 yds.

434136.name: Bloody Fortitude
434136.description:
Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional $s1% based on your missing health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by $s2 sec.

434143.name: Infliction of Sorrow
434143.description: When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your $?a137008[Blood Plague][plagues], it extends the duration of the $?a137008[disease][plagues] by $?c1[${$s3/1000}.1][${$s5/1000}.1] sec$?c1[, and deals $s2% of the remaining damage to the enemy.][, and erupts them with $s6% increased effectiveness.]

434151.name: Incite Terror
434151.description:
Vampiric Strike and $?a137008[Heart Strike]?s207311[Clawing Shadows][Scourge Strike] cause your targets to take $458478s1% increased Shadow damage, up to ${$458478s1*$458478U}% for $458478d.

Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at $s2% effectiveness.

434152.name: Gift of the San'layn
434152.description:
While $?a137008[Dancing Rune Weapon][Dark Transformation] is active you gain Gift of the San'layn.

Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by $?a137007[$434153s1][$434153s4]%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your $?a137008[Heart Strike]?s207311[Clawing Shadows][Scourge Strike] for the duration.

434157.name: Visceral Strength
434157.description: When $?a137008[Crimson Scourge][Sudden Doom] is consumed, you gain $?a137008[$461130s1][$434159s1]% Strength for $?a137008[$461130d][$434159d].

434220.name: Power of the Dream
434220.description: $?a137013[Force of Nature grants an additional stack of Dream Burst.][Dream Surge heals $s2 additional $Lally:allies;.]

434249.name: Control of the Dream
434249.description:
Time elapsed while your major abilities are available to be used or at maximum charges is subtracted from that ability's cooldown after the next time you use it, up to $s1 seconds.

Affects $?a137012[Nature's Swiftness, Incarnation: Tree of Life,][Force of Nature,] $?a137012[]?a394013[Incarnation: Chosen of Elune, ][Celestial Alignment, ]and Convoke the Spirits.

434260.name: The Blood is Life
434260.description:
$?a137008[Dancing Rune Weapon]?s275699[Apocalypse][Dark Transformation] summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for $434237d.

Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing $?a137007[$s2][$s1]% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond $s3 targets.

434261.name: Pact of the San'layn
434261.description: You store $s1% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

434263.name: Sanguine Scent
434263.description: Your Death Coil$?a137007[, Epidemic][] and Death Strike have a $s2% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below $s1% health.

434300.name: Bombardments
434300.description:
$?c1[Mass Disintegrate][Mass Eruption] marks your primary target for destruction for the next $434473d.

You and your allies have a chance to trigger a Bombardment when attacking marked targets, dealing $<dmg> Volcanic damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

434774.name: Transcendence: Linked Spirits
434774.description: Transcendence now tethers your spirit onto an ally for $434763d. Use Transcendence: Transfer to teleport to your ally's location.

434905.name: Grim Reaper
434905.description:
Reaper's Mark initial strike grants $?a137008][$s3 charges of Bone Shield][Killing Machine].

Reaper's Mark explosion deals up to $s1% increased damage based on your target's missing health.

434969.name: Lightning Strikes
434969.description:
Damaging enemies with Thunder Clap, $?a137048[Revenge, ][Raging Blow, ]or Execute has a $s1% chance to also strike one with a lightning bolt, dealing $435791s1 Nature damage$?s436152[ and generating ${$436152s3/10} Rage][].

Lightning Strikes occur $s2% more often during Avatar.

434970.name: Steadfast as the Peaks
434970.description:
Stamina increased by $s1%.

$?s202168[Impending Victory][Victory Rush] increases your maximum health by $437152s3% for $437152d. When this health increase expires, you heal for any amount of the original $?s202168[Impending Victory][Victory Rush] that healed you in excess of your full health.

435005.name: Smothering Offense
435005.description:
Your auto attack damage is increased by $s2%. 

This amount is increased for each stack of Icy Talons you have and it can stack up to $s1 additional times.

435010.name: Icy Death Torrent
435010.description: Your auto attack critical strikes have a chance to send out a torrent of ice dealing $439539s1 Frost damage to enemies in front of you.

435607.name: Thunder Blast
435607.description:
Shield Slam and Bloodthirst have a $s1% chance to grant you Thunder Blast, stacking up to 2 charges.

$@spellicon435222|cFFFFFFFF$@spellname435222|r
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals $435222s1 Stormstrike damage and generates ${$435222s4/10} Rage.

436148.name: Ground Current
436148.description: Lightning Strikes also deal $460670s1 Nature damage to enemies near their target. Damage reduced beyond $460670s2 targets.

436152.name: Thorim's Might
436152.description:
Lightning Strikes generate ${$s1/10} Rage.

$?a137048[Revenge][Raging Blow] and Execute damage increased by $s2%.

436162.name: Storm Bolts
436162.description: Storm Bolt also hits $s1 additional nearby $Ltarget:targets;, stunning them for $s2 sec, but its cooldown is increased by ${$s3/1000} sec.

436201.name: Gathering Clouds
436201.description: Your attacks trigger Lightning Strikes $s1% more often.

436335.name: Mass Disintegrate
436335.description: Empower spells cause your next Disintegrate to strike up to $s1 targets. When striking fewer than $s1 targets, Disintegrate damage is increased by $s2% for each missing target.

436344.name: Azerite Surge
436344.description:
Draw upon your inner strength. Release to invoke the power of Azerite to harm your foes and aid your allies.

Empowering has the following effects:

I: Deals [Attack Power * 2 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Fire damage.

II: Heals allies for [Attack Power * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)].

III: Deals [Attack Power * 0.75 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] additional Fire damage to the highest health enemy.

436358.name: Demolish
436358.description:
Unleash a series of precise and powerful strikes against your target, dealing [(531.455% of Attack Power) + (531.455% of Attack Power) + (1232.36% of Attack Power)] damage to it, and (1232.36% of Attack Power) damage to enemies within 10 yds of it. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

While channeling Demolish, you take 10% less damage and are immune to stuns, knockbacks, and forced movement effects.

You can block, parry, dodge, and use certain defensive abilities while channeling Demolish.

436687.name: Dark Talons
436687.description:
$?a137008[Marrowrend and Heart Strike have][Consuming Killing Machine or Rime has] a $s1% chance to grant $s2 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec.

Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active.

436707.name: Crashing Thunder
436707.description:
Stormstrike or Nature damage your abilities deal is increased by $s1%. Stormstrike damage ignores Armor.

Thunder Clap damage increased by $s4%$?a137050[, no longer costs Rage, and now generates ${$s5/10} Rage][].$?a137050[

Improved Whirlwind, Meat Cleaver, and Barbaric Training affect Thunder Clap in addition to Whirlwind.][]

437068.name: Strength of the Mountain
437068.description:
Shield Slam damage increased by $s1%.$?a137048[

Demoralizing Shout reduces damage enemies deal to you by an additional ${-$s2}%.][

Bloodthirst and Rampage damage increased by $s4%.]

437079.name: Flashing Skies
437079.description: Thunder Blast calls down a Lightning Strike on an enemy it hits.

437118.name: Burst of Power
437118.description: Lightning Strikes have a $h% chance to make your next $s1 $?a137048[Shield Slams][Bloodthirsts] have no cooldown$?a137050[, deal $437121s2% increased damage, and generate ${$437121s3/10} additional Rage][].

437122.name: Death's Messenger
437122.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Lichborne and Raise Dead by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

437134.name: Avatar of the Storm
437134.description:
Casting Avatar grants you $s1 charges of Thunder Blast and resets the cooldown of Thunder Clap.

While Avatar is not active, Lightning Strikes have a $s2% chance to grant you Avatar for $s3 secs.

$@spellicon435222|cFFFFFFFF$@spellname435222|r
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals Stormstrike damage.

437161.name: Soul Rupture
437161.description: When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals $?a137008[$s1][$s2]% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies.

438439.name: Dance of Chi-Ji
438439.description: Your spells and abilities have a chance to make your next Spinning Crane Kick deal an additional $s1% damage.

438587.name: Mass Eruption
438587.description: Empower spells cause your next Eruption to strike up to $s1 targets. When striking less than $s1 targets, Eruption damage is increased by $s2% for each missing target.

438590.name: Keep Your Feet on the Ground
438590.description:
Physical damage taken reduced by $s2%.

Thunder Blast reduces damage you take by $438591s1% for $438591d.

438597.name: Storm Shield
438597.description: Intervening a target grants them a shield for $438598d that absorbs magic damage equal to $s1 times your Armor.

439528.name: Thriving Growth
439528.description:
Rip and Rake damage has a chance to cause Bloodseeker Vines to grow on the victim, dealing $439531o1 Bleed damage over $439531d.

$?a137011[Wild Growth and Regrowth][Wild Growth, Regrowth, and Efflorescence] healing has a chance to cause Symbiotic Blooms to grow on the target, healing for $439530o1 over $439530d.

Multiple instances of these can overlap.

439760.name: Aurora
439760.description:
After you cast $?c1[Holy Prism or Divine Toll]?c3[Wake of Ashes][], gain Divine Purpose.

$?c1[$@spellicon223819 $@spellname223819
$@spellaura223819]?c3[$@spellicon408458 $@spellname408458
$@spellaura408458][]

439843.name: Reaper's Mark
439843.description:
Frost
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (312% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (40.4853% of Attack Power) damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

 Blood
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (368.55% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (45.348% of Attack Power) damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

439851.name: Wave of Souls
439851.description:
Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing $?a137008[$435802s1][$435802s2] Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path.

Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take $443404s1% increased Shadowfrost damage for $443404d, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

439868.name: Hunt Beneath the Open Skies
439868.description:
Damage and healing while in Cat Form increased by $s1%.

Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by $s4%.

439880.name: Resilient Flourishing
439880.description:
Bloodseeker Vines and Symbiotic Blooms last ${$s1/1000} additional sec.

When a target afflicted by Bloodseeker Vines dies, the vines jump to a valid nearby target for their remaining duration.

439882.name: Root Network
439882.description:
Each active Bloodseeker Vine increases the damage your abilities deal by 2%.

Each active Symbiotic Bloom increases the healing of your spells by 2%.

439890.name: Strategic Infusion
439890.description:
$?a137011[Tiger's Fury and attacking from Prowl increase][Attacking from Prowl increases] the chance for Shred, Rake, and $?s202028[Brutal Slash][Swipe] to critically strike by $439891s1% for $439891d.

Your periodic heals have a $s1% increased chance to critically heal.

439895.name: Entangling Vortex
439895.description: Enemies pulled into Ursol's Vortex are rooted in place for ${$s1/1000} sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

439901.name: Flower Walk
439901.description: During Barkskin your movement speed is increased by $s1% and every second flowers grow beneath your feet that heal up to $439902s2 nearby injured allies for $439902s1.

439926.name: Wildstalker's Power
439926.description:
Rip and Ferocious Bite damage increased by $s1%.

Rejuvenation$?a137012[, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom][] healing increased by $s3%.

439929.name: Bond with Nature
439929.description: Healing you receive is increased by $s1%.

439948.name: Expelling Shield
439948.description: When an enemy deals direct damage to your Anti-Magic Shell, their cast speed is reduced by $440739s1% for $440739d.

440006.name: Purify Disease
440006.description: Removes all Disease effects from a friendly target.

440012.name: Cleanse Spirit
440012.description: Removes all Curse effects from a friendly target.

440013.name: Cleanse Toxins
440013.description: Cleanses a friendly target, removing all Poison and Disease effects..

440015.name: Remove Corruption
440015.description: Nullifies corrupting effects on the friendly target, removing all Curse and Poison effects.

440031.name: Bind in Darkness
440031.description:
$?a137008[Blood Boil deals $s3% increased damage][Rime empowered Howling Blast deals $s4% increased damage to its main target], and is now Shadowfrost.

Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike.

440040.name: Xalan's Cruelty
440040.description: Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by $s3% and your Shadow spells gain $s1% more critical strike chance from all sources.

440043.name: Blackened Soul
440043.description:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by $s1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every $445731t1 sec to deal $445736s1 Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

440044.name: Xalan's Ferocity
440044.description: Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by $s1% and your Fire spells gain $s4% more critical strike chance from all sources.

440045.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
440045.description:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by $s1%. 

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

440046.name: Mark of Xavius
440046.description:
$?s980[Agony damage increased by $s1%.][Wither damage increased by $s2%.]

Blackened Soul deals $s3% increased damage per stack of Wither.

440048.name: Hatefury Rituals
440048.description: Wither deals $s1% increased periodic damage but its duration is $s2% shorter.

440051.name: Bleakheart Tactics
440051.description: Wither damage increased $s1%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

440055.name: Seeds of Their Demise
440055.description:
After Wither reaches $s1 stacks or when its host reaches $s2% health, Wither deals $445736s1 Shadowflame damage to its host every $445731t1 sec until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain $?s137046[$s3 stacks of Flashpoint][Shard Instability].

440057.name: Curse of the Satyr
440057.description:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

$@spellicon442804 $@spellname442804
$@spelldesc442804

440059.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
440059.description: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within $449587a1 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at $s1% effectiveness.

440065.name: Zevrim's Resilience
440065.description: Dark Pact heals you for $108416s5 every $108416t5 sec while active.

440070.name: Illhoof's Design
440070.description: Sacrifice $s1% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional $s2% of your maximum health.

440116.name: Harmonious Constitution
440116.description: Your Regrowth's healing to yourself is increased by $s1%.

440117.name: Twin Sprouts
440117.description: When Bloodseeker Vines or Symbiotic Blooms grow, they have a $s1% chance to cause another growth of the same type to immediately grow on a valid nearby target.

440118.name: Implant
440118.description: $?a137011[When you gain or lose Tiger's Fury, your next single-target melee ability causes a Bloodseeker Vine to grow on the target for ${$s1/1000} sec.][Casting Swiftmend or Wild Growth causes a Symbiotic Bloom to grow on a target for ${$s2/1000} sec.]

440119.name: Vigorous Creepers
440119.description:
Bloodseeker Vines increase the damage your abilities deal to affected enemies by $s1%.

Symbiotic Blooms increase the healing your spells do to affected targets by $s2%.

440120.name: Bursting Growth
440120.description:
When Bloodseeker Vines expire or you use Ferocious Bite on their target they explode in thorns, dealing $440122s1 physical damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

When Symbiotic Blooms expire or you cast Rejuvenation on their target flowers grow around their target, healing them and up to $440121s2 nearby allies for $440121s1.

440282.name: Rune Carved Plates
440282.description: Each Rune spent reduces the magic damage you take by ${$abs($440290s1/10)}.1% and each Rune generated reduces the physical damage you take by ${$abs($440289s1/10)}.1% for $440289d, up to $440290u times.

440476.name: Pact of the Deathbringer
440476.description:
When you suffer a damaging effect equal to $s1% of your maximum health, you instantly cast Death Pact at $s3% effectiveness. May only occur every $s2 min.

When a Reaper's Mark explodes, the cooldowns of this effect and Death Pact are reduced by $s4 sec.

440662.name: Preventive Measures
440662.description:
$?a137032[Power Word: Shield absorbs $s2% additional damage.

All damage dealt by Penance, Smite and Holy Nova increased by $s3%.][Increases the healing done by Prayer of Mending by $s1%.

All damage dealt by Smite, Holy Fire and Holy Nova increased by $s4%.]

440669.name: Save the Day
440669.description: For $458650d after casting Leap of Faith you may cast it a second time for free, ignoring its cooldown.

440670.name: Divine Feathers
440670.description:
Your Angelic Feathers increase movement speed by an additional $s2%.

When an ally walks through your Angelic Feather, you are also granted $s1% of its effect.

440671.name: Preemptive Care
440671.description: $?a137032[Increases the duration of Atonement by ${$s1/1000} sec.][Increases the duration of your Renew by $s2%.]

440681.name: Waste No Time
440681.description: Reduces the cooldown of $?a137032[Power Word: Shield by ${$s2/-1000}.1 sec.][Prayer of Mending by ${$s1/-1000}.1 sec.]

440738.name: Foreseen Circumstances
440738.description: $?a137032[Pain Suppression reduces damage taken by an additional $s1%.][Guardian Spirit lasts an additional ${$s2/1000} sec.]

440742.name: Twinsight
440742.description: $?a137031[An additional $s1 stacks of Prayer of Mending is placed on a second ally within $A2 yards when casting Prayer of Mending.][$s3 additional Penance bolts are fired at an enemy within $A2 yards when healing an ally with Penance, or fired at an ally within $A2 yards when damaging an enemy with Penance.]

440766.name: Assured Safety
440766.description:
$?a137032[Power Word: Shield casts apply $s1 $Lstack:stacks; of Prayer of Mending to your target.

$@spellicon33076 $@spellname33076
$@spelldesc33076][Casting Prayer of Mending applies Power Word: Shield to your target.

$@spellicon1246768 $@spellname1246768
$@spelldesc1246768]

440992.name: Earthquaker
440992.description: Shockwave also knocks enemies into the air and its cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

440993.name: Veteran Vitality
440993.description:
When your health is brought below 35%, you gain a Second Wind, healing you for ${$441387s1*$441387t1*$441387d}% of your max health over $441387d.

This effect cannot occur more than once every $proccooldown sec.

440995.name: Arterial Bleed
440995.description: Colossal Might increases the damage of your Rend and Deep Wounds by $440989s2% per stack.

441146.name: Unseen Blade
441146.description:
$?a137036[Sinister Strike]?s200758[Gloomblade][Backstab] and $?a137036[Ambush][Shadowstrike] now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing $441144s1 damage. Targets struck are Fazed for $441224d.

Fazed enemies take $441224s1% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every $459485d.

441176.name: Melt Armor
441176.description:
$?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath] causes enemies to take $s2% increased damage from Bombardments and Essence abilities for $441172d.$?c1[

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.][]

441180.name: Hardened Scales
441180.description: Obsidian Scales reduces damage taken by an additional ${$s1/-1}%.

441181.name: Menacing Presence
441181.description: Knocking enemies up or backwards reduces their damage done to you by $s1% for $441201d.

441206.name: Wingleader
441206.description: Bombardments reduce the cooldown of $?c1[Deep Breath by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec for each target struck, up to ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.][Breath of Eons by ${$s3/1000}.1 sec for each target struck, up to ${$s4/1000}.1 sec.]

441212.name: Extended Battle
441212.description: Essence abilities extend Bombardments by $s1 sec.

441219.name: Diverted Power
441219.description: Bombardments have a chance to generate Essence Burst.

441245.name: Onslaught
441245.description: Entering combat grants a charge of Burnout, causing your next Living Flame to cast instantly.

441246.name: Unrelenting Siege
441246.description: For each second you are in combat, Azure Strike, Living Flame, and $?c1[Disintegrate][Eruption] deal $s1% increased damage, up to $s2%.

441247.name: Smoke
441247.description: You take $s1% reduced damage from Fazed targets.

441250.name: Mirrors
441250.description: Feint reduces damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by an additional $s1%

441253.name: Nimble Flyer
441253.description: While Hovering, damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by ${$s1/-1}%.

441257.name: Slipstream
441257.description: $?s403631[Breath of Eons][Deep Breath] resets a charge of Hover.

441263.name: Devious Distractions
441263.description: $?a137036[Killing Spree][Secret Technique] applies Fazed to any targets struck.

441273.name: Surprising Strikes
441273.description: Attacks that generate combo points deal $s1% increased critical strike damage to Fazed targets.

441274.name: Disorienting Strikes
441274.description: $?a137036[Killing Spree][Secret Technique] has $s1% reduced cooldown and allows your next $s2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.

441321.name: Flawless Form
441321.description: Unseen Blade and $?a137036[Killing Spree][Secret Technique] increase the damage of your finishing moves by $441326s1% for $441326d. Max $441326u stacks.

441346.name: Thousand Cuts
441346.description: Slice and Dice grants $s1% additional attack speed and gives your auto-attacks a chance to refresh your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

441359.name: Flickerstrike
441359.description:
Taking damage from an area-of-effect attack while Feint is active or dodging while Evasion is active refreshes your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

This effect may only occur once every $proccooldown sec.

441367.name: Nimble Flurry
441367.description: $?a137036[Blade Flurry damage is increased by $s1%][Your auto-attacks, Unseen Blade, and Coup de Grace also strike up to $s2 nearby enemies for $s3% of normal damage] while Flawless Form is active.

441378.name: Exterminate
441378.description:
After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next $s3 $?a137008[$LMarrowrend:Marrowrends;][$LObliterate:Obliterates; or $LFrostscythe:Frostscythes;] cost $s4 $LRune:Runes; and summon $s1 $Lscythe:scythes; to strike your enemies.

The first scythe strikes your target for $?a137008[$441424s1][$441424s2] Shadowfrost damage $?c2[and has a $s6% chance to grant Killing Machine,][and] the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for $?a137008[$441426s1][$441426s2] Shadowfrost damage$?(a441894&a137008)[ and applies Blood Plague]?(a441894&$a137006)[ and applies Frost Fever][]. Deals reduced damage beyond $s5 targets.

441398.name: No Scruples
441398.description: Finishing moves have $s1% increased chance to critically strike Fazed targets.

441403.name: So Tricky
441403.description: Tricks of the Trade's threat redirect duration is increased to $m1 $Lhour:min;.

441415.name: Don't Be Suspicious
441415.description:
Blind and Shroud of Concealment have $s1% reduced cooldown.

Pick Pocket and Sap have $s2 yd increased range.

441423.name: Coup de Grace
441423.description: After $441786s1 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next $?a137036[Dispatch][Eviscerate] will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed $s3 additional combo points, and granting you $s2 stacks of Flawless Form.

441429.name: Cloud Cover
441429.description:
Activating $?a137036[Adrenaline Rush][Shadow Blades] creates a cloud of smoke for $441587d, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to $441640m2 additional $Ltime:times;.

Effect persists for $?a137036[${$s1/1000}][${$s2/1000}] sec after leaving the cloud.

441583.name: Ravage
441583.description:
Your auto-attacks have a chance to make your next $?a137010[Maul][Ferocious Bite] become Ravage.

$?a137010[$@spellicon441605|cFFFFFFFF$@spellname441605|r
$@spelldesc441605]$?a137011[$@spellicon441591|cFFFFFFFF$@spellname441591|r
$@spelldesc441591]

441675.name: Fount of Strength
441675.description:
Your maximum Energy and Rage are increased by $s1.

Frenzied Regeneration also increases your maximum health by $s3%.

441678.name: Wildshape Mastery
441678.description:
Ironfur and Frenzied Regeneration persist in Cat Form.$?!c3[

When transforming from Bear to Cat Form, you retain $441685s1% of your Bear Form armor and health for $441685d.][]

For $441686d after entering Bear Form, you heal for $441686s1% of damage taken over $441688d.

441689.name: Empowered Shapeshifting
441689.description:
Frenzied Regeneration can be cast in Cat Form for $s2 Energy.

Bear Form reduces magic damage you take by ${-$s4}%.

Shred and $?s202028[Brutal Slash][Swipe] damage increased by $s5%. Mangle damage increased by $s6%.

441691.name: Wildpower Surge
441691.description: $?s202028[Shred and Brutal Slash]?a137011[Shred and Swipe][]$?a137011[ grant Ursine Potential. When you have $441695s1 stacks, the next time you transform into Bear Form, your next Mangle deals $441698s1% increased damage or your next Swipe deals $441698s2% increased damage. Either generates ${$442562s1/10} extra Rage.][Mangle grants Feline Potential. When you have $441701s1 stacks, the next time you transform into Cat Form, gain $441704s1 combo points and your next Ferocious Bite or Rip deals $441702s1% increased damage for its full duration.]

441809.name: Dreadful Wound
441809.description:
Ravage also inflicts a Bleed that causes $?a137011[$441812s1][$451177s1] damage over $441812d and saps its victims' strength, reducing damage they deal to you by $?a137011[$441812s2][$451177s2]%.

Dreadful Wound is not affected by Circle of Life and Death. $?a137011[If a Dreadful Wound benefiting from Tiger's Fury is re-applied, the new Dreadful Wound deals damage as if Tiger's Fury was active.][]

441814.name: Ruthless Aggression
441814.description: Ravage increases your auto-attack speed by $441817s1% for $441817d.

441824.name: Killing Strikes
441824.description:
Ravage increases your Agility by $441825s1% and the armor granted by Ironfur by $441825s2% for $441825d.

Your first $?a137011[Tiger's Fury][Mangle] after entering combat makes your next $?a137011[Ferocious Bite][Maul] become Ravage.

441829.name: Aggravate Wounds
441829.description: Every $?a137010[Maul, Raze, Mangle,  Thrash, or Swipe]$?a137011[attack with an Energy cost that] you cast extends the duration of your Dreadful Wounds by $?a137010[${$s1/1000}.1][${$s2/1000}.1] sec, up to $s3 additional sec.

441835.name: Claw Rampage
441835.description: During Berserk, $?c3[Mangle, Thrash][Shred], and $?s202028[Brutal Slash][Swipe] have a $s1% chance to make your next $?a137010[Maul][Ferocious Bite] become Ravage.

441841.name: Bestial Strength
441841.description: $?a137011[Ferocious Bite and Rampant Ferocity damage increased by $s1% and Primal Wrath's direct damage increased by $s2%.][Maul and Raze damage increased by $s3%.]

441844.name: Pack's Endurance
441844.description: Stampeding Roar's duration is increased by $s1%.

441845.name: Strike for the Heart
441845.description:
$?c2[Shred, Swipe, and Rake damage increased by $s1% and their critical strike chance is increased by $s3%.][Mangle damage increased by $s4% and its critical strike chance is increased by $s5%.]

$?c3[Mangle heals you for $458724s1% of maximum health.][]

441846.name: Tear Down the Mighty
441846.description: $?c2[Damage dealt by Chomp and ][]$?(c2&!s1243807)[Feral Frenzy]?c2[Frantic Frenzy][]$?c2[ increased by $s2%][The cooldown of Sundering Roar is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec].

441894.name: Wither Away
441894.description: $?a137008[Blood Plague][Frost Fever] deals its damage $?a137008[$s5][$s6]% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies $?a137008[Blood Plague][Frost Fever].

442290.name: Art of the Glaive
442290.description:
Consuming $?a212612[$s1][$s2] Soul Fragments or casting $?a212612[The Hunt][Sigil of Spite] converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive.

$@spellicon442294 $@spellname442294: 
$@spelldesc442294

442502.name: Warblade's Hunger
442502.description:
Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next $?a212612[Chaos Strike]?s263642[Fracture][Shear] to deal $442507s1 additional Physical damage.$?a212612[

Felblade consumes up to $s2 nearby Soul Fragments.][]

442679.name: Reaver's Mark
442679.description:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, $?a212612[Chaos Strike]?s263642[Fracture][Shear] applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take $442624s1% increased damage for $442624d. Max $442624u stacks.

Applies $m2 additional $Lstack:stacks; of Reaver's Mark If cast after $?a212612[Blade Dance][Soul Cleave].

442683.name: Aldrachi Tactics
442683.description: The second enhanced ability in a pattern shatters an additional Soul Fragment.

442686.name: Thrill of the Fight
442686.description: After consuming both enhancements, gain Thrill of the Fight, increasing the damage of your next Reaver's Glaive by $442695s1% and increasing Haste by $442688s1% for $442688d.

442687.name: Xuen's Guidance
442687.description:
Teachings of the Monastery has a $s1% chance to refund a charge when consumed. 

The damage of Tiger Palm is increased by $s2%.

442714.name: Army Unto Oneself
442714.description: Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by $442715s1% for $442715d.

442718.name: Fury of the Aldrachi
442718.description:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, $?a212612[Blade Dance][Soul Cleave] casts $s2 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond $444806s2 targets.

If cast after $?a212612[Chaos Strike]?s263642[Fracture][Shear], cast $?a1236360[${($s2*($s1/100+1))+$1236360s1}][${$s2*($s1/100+1)}] slashes instead.

442719.name: Restore Balance
442719.description: $?c2[Healing increased by $322118s8% while Chi-Ji, the Red Crane or Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent is active.]?c3[Damage increased by $123904s4% while Xuen, the White Tiger is active.][]

442736.name: Incorruptible Spirit
442736.description: Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional $s1% of the amount healed.

442743.name: Temple Training
442743.description: $?c2[The healing of Enveloping Mist, Vivify, and Sheilun's Gift is increased by $s1%.]?c3[Fists of Fury and Spinning Crane Kick deal $s2% more damage.][]

442747.name: Niuzao's Protection
442747.description: Fortifying Brew grants you an absorb shield for $442749s2% of your maximum health.

442806.name: Wounded Quarry
442806.description: Expose weaknesses in the target of your $@spellname442624, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal $s1% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

443028.name: Celestial Conduit
443028.description:
Brewmaster,  Windwalker
The August Celestials empower you, causing you to radiate [(220% of Attack Power) * 5] Nature damage onto enemies and [(1100% of Spell Power) * 5] healing onto up to 5 injured allies within 15 yds over 4 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

You may move while channeling, but casting other healing or damaging spells cancels this effect.

 Mistweaver
The August Celestials empower you, causing you to radiate [(1100% of Spell Power) * 5] healing onto up to 5 injured allies and [(220% of Attack Power) * 5] Nature damage onto enemies within 20 yds over 4 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

You may move while channeling, but casting other healing or damaging spells cancels this effect.

443046.name: Elune's Grace
443046.description: Using Wild Charge while in Bear Form or Moonkin Form incurs a $s1 sec shorter cooldown.

443059.name: Jade Sanctuary
443059.description:
You heal for $s2% of your maximum health instantly when you activate Celestial Conduit and receive $s1% less damage for its duration. 

This effect lingers for an additional $448508d after Celestial Conduit ends.

443087.name: Courage of the White Tiger
443087.description:
$?c2[Tiger Palm, Vivify, and Sheilun's Gift have a chance to cause Xuen to claw a nearby enemy for $457917s1 Physical damage, healing a nearby ally for $s2% of the damage done.]?c3[Tiger Palm has a chance to cause Xuen to claw your target for $457917s1 Physical damage, healing a nearby ally for $s2% of the damage done.][Xuen claws your target for $457917s1 Physical damage, healing a nearby ally for $s2% of the damage done.]

$?c2[Invoke Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent or Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane]?c3[Invoke Xuen, the White Tiger][Invoking a celestial] guarantees your next cast activates this effect.

443110.name: Strength of the Black Ox

|cFFFFFFFFMograine|R

444088.description:
$?c1[Disintegrate damage consumes ${$s2/1000}.1 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for $s4% of the amount consumed.

Pyre damage consumes ${$s3/1000} sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for $s7% of the amount consumed.][Verdant Embrace healing consumes ${$s5/1000} sec of Dream Breath from allies it heals, detonating it and healing them for $s6% of the amount consumed.

444097.description: $?a137006[Obliterate and Frostscythe]?s207311[Clawing Shadows][Scourge Strike] $?a137006[shatter][shatters] Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing $444834s2 Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by $444834s1% for $444834d. $?a137041[|cFFFFFFFFAir:|r $@spelldesc453409

$?a137041[Increases the critical strike chance of Flametongue Weapon by $s1%, and its critical strike damage by $s2%.][Learn a new weapon imbue, Tidecaller's Guard.

$@spellicon457481 $@spellname457481
$@spelldesc457481 ]

445200.name: Blessing of An'she

445625.description: Living Flame $?c1[and Azure Strike have $s1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when they critically strike.][has $s1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when it critically strikes.]

446085.description: Your next $?c1[Mortal Strike][Rampage] after Bladestorm ends deals $?c1[$446918s1][$446918s2]% additional damage.

446326.description: Renewing Mist's heal over time has a chance to cause your next $?s399491[Sheilun's Gift][Vivify] to also trigger a Zen Pulse on its target and all allies with Renewing Mist, healing them for $198487s1 increased by $s1% per Renewing Mist active, up to $s2%.

446663.name: Burn to Ash

When Truth's Wake critically strikes, its duration is extended by $s1 sec.

447985.name: Light of the Martyr

448040.description:
Light of the Martyr's health threshold is reduced to ${$s4+$s1}% and increases Holy Shock's healing by an additional $448087s1% for every $t2 sec Light of the Martyr is active, stacking up to $448087u times.

448601.name: Spellfire Spheres

$?c1[Casting a damaging spell][Consuming Hot Streak] has a $s1% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere.

$@spellicon448604 $@spellname448604
$@spelldesc448604

448658.name: Invocation: Arcane Phoenix
448658.description:
When you cast $?c1[Arcane Surge][Combustion], summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.

$@spellicon448659  $@spellname448659

449182.name: Ursoc's Spirit
449182.description:
Stamina increased by $s1%.
