449184.name: Instincts of the Claw
449184.description: Ferocious Bite and Maul damage increased by $s1%.

449185.name: Lore of the Grove
449185.description: Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by $s1%.

449191.name: Oakskin
449191.description: Survival Instincts and Barkskin reduce damage taken by an additional $s1%.

449193.name: Fluid Form
449193.description:
Shred, Rake, and Skull Bash can be used in any form and shift you into Cat Form, if necessary. 

Mangle can be used in any form and shifts you into Bear Form. 

Wrath and Starfire shift you into Moonkin Form, if known.

449293.name: Mana Cascade
449293.description: $?c1[Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Barrage][Consuming Hot Streak] grants you $?c1[${$449322s2/10}.1][${$449314s2/10}.1]% Haste for $449322d1. Stacks up to $449314u times. Multiple instances may overlap.

449330.name: Merely a Setback
449330.description:
The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional $?c1[$449336d][$1246023d] after your Barrier is removed.$?c1[][

Additionally, Cauterize no longer deals damage to you.]

449349.name: Sunfury Execution
449349.description: $?c2[Pyroclasm's damage bonus is increased by $s1% and Meteor grants Pyroclasm if talented.][Arcane Barrage deals $s2% increased damage to enemies affected by your Touch of the Magi.]

449382.name: Codex of the Sunstriders
449382.description:
When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres.

Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during $?c1[Arcane Surge][Combustion] by $?c1[$s1][$s2]% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration.

449394.name: Glorious Incandescence
449394.description:
$?c2[Generating a Spellfire Sphere causes your next cast of Fire Blast to call down a storm of $s1 Meteorites on its target.][Arcane Barrage summons $s6 $LMeteorite:Meteorites; for every $s4 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed.]

$@spellicon449559 $@spellname449559
$@spelldesc449559

449412.name: Savor the Moment
449412.description: When you cast $?c1[Arcane Surge][Combustion], its duration is extended by ${$s1/1000}.1 sec for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

449537.name: Coiled to Spring
449537.description: If you generate a combo point in excess of what you can store, your next Ferocious Bite or Primal Wrath deals $449538s1% increased direct damage.

449582.name: Lighter Than Air
449582.description: Roll causes you to become lighter than air, allowing you to double jump to dash forward a short distance once within $449609d, but the cooldown of Roll is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec.

449596.name: Rondurmancy
449596.description: Spellfire Spheres can now stack up to $s2 times.

449614.name: Demonic Soul
449614.description:
A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing $449801s1 Shadow damage to all enemies within $449801a1 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

449619.name: Memory of Al'ar
449619.description:
During $?c1[Arcane Surge][Combustion], you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade.

When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting $?c1[Arcane Soul][Hyperthermia] for $?c1[${$s1/1000}.1][${$s2/1000}.1] sec.

$?c1[$@spellicon451038$@spellname451038:
$@spelldesc451038][$@spellicon383874 $@spellname383874:
$@spellaura383874]

449620.name: Necrolyte Teachings
449620.description: $?s137043[Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul damage increased by $s2%. Nightfall increases the damage of Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul by an additional $s1%.][Shadow Bolt damage increased by $s2%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional $s3%.]

449624.name: Soul Anathema
449624.description:
Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing $450538o1 Shadow damage over $450538d.

If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

449627.name: Lessons in Debilitation
449627.description: Your Arcane Phoenix has picked up a few tricks, and will Spellsteal when it is summoned and when it expires.

449629.name: Demoniac's Fervor
449629.description: Your demonic soul deals $s1% increased damage to $?s137043[targets affected by your Unstable Affliction.][the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.]

449631.name: Wicked Reaping
449631.description:
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by $s1%.

Consuming $?s137043[Nightfall][Demonic Core] feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal $?s137043[$449826s1][${$449826s1*($s2/100)}] Shadow damage to your target.

449634.name: Quietus
449634.description:
Soul Anathema damage increased by $s1% and is dealt $s2% faster.

Consuming $?s137043[Nightfall][Demonic Core] activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

449637.name: Sataiel's Volition
449637.description: $?s137043[Corruption deals damage $s1% faster and Haunt grants Nightfall.][Wild Imp damage increased by $s2% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional $s3% chance to grant a Demonic Core.]

449638.name: Shadow of Death
449638.description: Your $?s137043[Dark Harvest spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant ${$s2} Soul Shard that each contain a Succulent Soul every 1 sec while channeled.][Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant ${$449858s1/10} Soul Shards that each contain a Succulent Soul.]

449645.name: Savage Fury
449645.description: Tiger's Fury increases your Haste by $449646s1% and Energy recovery rate by $449646s2% for $449646d.

449701.name: Gorebound Fortitude
449701.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

449703.name: Friends In Dark Places
449703.description: Dark Pact now shields you for an additional $s1% of the sacrificed health.

449704.name: Shared Fate
449704.description:
When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for $450591d. This effect inflicts $450593s1 Shadow damage to enemies within $450593a1 yds every $450591t1 sec.

Deals reduced damage beyond $s1 targets.

449706.name: Feast of Souls
449706.description: When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

449707.name: Eternal Servitude
449707.description: Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

449806.name: Divine Halo
449806.description: Halo now centers around you and returns to you after it reaches its maximum distance, healing allies and damaging enemies each time it passes through them.

449874.name: Energy Compression
449874.description: Halo damage and healing is increased by $s1%.

449880.name: Voidheart
449880.description: While Entropic Rift is active, your $?c3[Shadow damage is increased by $s1%] [Atonement healing is increased by $s2%].

449912.name: Darkening Horizon
449912.description: Void Blast increases the duration of Entropic Rift by $?c1[${$s1}.1][${$s3}.1] sec, up to a maximum of $s2 sec.

450138.name: Void Empowerment
450138.description: Summoning an Entropic Rift $?c1[extends the duration of your $s4 shortest Atonements by $s1 sec][grants you Shadowy Insight].

450154.name: Rushing Reflexes
450154.description: Your heightened reflexes allow you to react swiftly to the presence of enemies, causing you to quickly lunge to the nearest enemy in front of you within $450156r yards after you Roll.

450212.name: Stellar Amplification
450212.description: Starsurge increases the damage the target takes from your periodic effects and Shooting Stars by $450214s1% for $450214d. Reapplying this effect extends its duration, up to ${$s1/1000} sec.

450335.name: Crashing Momentum
450335.description: Targets you Roll through are snared by $450342s1% for $450342d.

450347.name: Nature's Grace
450347.description: When Eclipse ends or when you enter combat, enter a Dreamstate, reducing the cast time of your next $450346u Starfires or Wraths by $450346s1%.

450356.name: Touch the Cosmos
450356.description:
Casting Wrath has a $s1% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

Casting Starfire has a $s2% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

450373.name: Don't Look Back
450373.description: Consuming Sentinel's Mark grants you an absorb shield equal to ${$s1}.1% of your maximum health.

450379.name: Invigorating Pulse
450379.description:
$?c2[Steady Shot][Kill Command] grants an additional $s1 Focus and its damage is increased by $s4%. 

Maximum Focus increased by $s2.

450391.name: Chi Wave
450391.description: Every $t1 sec, your next $?a137023[Keg Smash][Rising Sun Kick] or $?s399491[Sheilun's Gift][Vivify] releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing $132467s1 Nature damage or $132463s1 healing. Bounces up to $115098s1 times to targets within $132466a2 yards.

450405.name: Void Blast
450405.description:
Entropic Rift upgrades $?c3[Mind Blast][Smite] into Void Blast while it is active.

$?c1[$@spellname450215:
$@spelldesc450215][$@spellname450983:
$@spelldesc450983]

450426.name: Chi Proficiency
450426.description: Magical damage done increased by $s1% and healing done increased by $s2%.

450427.name: Martial Instincts
450427.description: Increases your Physical damage done by $s1% and Avoidance increased by $s2%.

450432.name: Pressure Points
450432.description: Paralysis now removes all Enrage effects from its target.

450448.name: Peace and Prosperity
450448.description: Reduces the cooldown of Ring of Peace by ${$s1/-1000} sec and Song of Chi-Ji's cast time is reduced by ${$s2/-1000}.1 sec.

450503.name: Quick Footed
450503.description: The duration of snare effects on you is reduced by $s1%.

450508.name: Aspect of Harmony
450508.description:
Store vitality from $?a137023[$s1%][$s2%] of your damage dealt and $?a137023[$s3%][$s4%] of your $?a137023[effective ][]healing.$?a137024[ Vitality stored from overhealing is reduced.][]

For $450711d after casting $?a137023[Celestial Brew or Celestial Infusion][Thunder Focus Tea] your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal $s6% additional $?a137023[damage over $450763d][healing over $450769d].

450514.name: Wind's Reach
450514.description:
The range of Disable is increased by $s1 yds.
 
The duration of Crashing Momentum is increased by ${$s3/1000} sec and its snare now reduces movement speed by an additional $s2%.

450520.name: Bounding Agility
450520.description: Roll and Chi Torpedo travel a small distance further.

450529.name: Coalescence
450529.description:
When Aspect of Harmony $?a450870[deals damage or heals]?a137023[deals damage][heals], it has a chance to spread to a nearby $?a450870[target]?a137023[enemy][ally]. When you directly $?a450870[attack or heal]?a137023[attack][heal] an affected target, it has a chance to intensify, withdrawing additional vitality to increase its effect by up to $450508s9%.

$?a137023[Keg Smash][Vivify] no longer contributes vitality. While Aspect of Harmony is not active, $?a137023[Keg Smash][Vivify] instead draws on available vitality to deal an additional $s2% $?a137023[damage over $1292919d][healing over $1292922d].

Vitality stored by other abilities is increased by $s3%.

450553.name: Jade Walk
450553.description: While out of combat, your movement speed is increased by $450552s1%.

450558.name: Harmony of the Heavens
450558.description: Starsurge or Starfall increase your current Eclipse's Arcane or Nature damage bonus by an additional $s1%, up to $s2%.

450560.name: Healing Winds
450560.description: Transcendence: Transfer immediately heals you for $450559s1% of your maximum health.

450569.name: Flow of Chi
450569.description:
You gain a bonus effect based on your current health.

Above $s1% health: Movement speed increased by $450574s1%. This bonus stacks with similar effects.

Between $s1% and $s2% health: Damage taken reduced by $450572s1%.

Below $s2% health: Healing received increased by $450571s1%.

450595.name: Spirit's Essence
450595.description: Transcendence: Transfer snares targets within $450596A2 yds by $450596s1% for $450596d when cast.

450598.name: Astral Communion
450598.description: Increases maximum Astral Power by ${$s1/10}. Entering Eclipse reduces the Astral Power cost of your next Starsurge or Starfall by ${$450599s1/-10}.

450612.name: Void Infusion
450612.description: $?c1[While Entropic Rift is active, Atonement healing with Void Blast and Penance is $s2% more effective.][Void Blast generates ${$s1/100} additional Insanity.]

450615.name: Flurry Strikes
450615.description: Your auto attacks have a chance to generate $s1-$s2 Flurry Charges. When you cast $?c3[Fists of Fury][Keg Smash], unleash all Flurry Charges, dealing $450617s1 Physical damage per charge.

450622.name: Swift Art
450622.description: Roll removes a snare effect once every $proccooldown sec.

450631.name: Energy Transfer
450631.description: Successfully interrupting an enemy reduces the cooldown of Paralysis and Roll by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

450638.name: Celestial Determination
450638.description: While your Celestial is active, you cannot be slowed below $s2% normal movement speed.

450746.name: Scald
450746.description:
Fireball always critically strikes enemies below $s3% health.

When Fireball or Scorch damage an enemy below $1254311s2% health, Fireball deals $s1% increased damage and Scorch deals $s2% increased damage.

450831.name: Fire's Ire
450831.description:
Your spell critical strike chance is increased by ${$s3/1000}.1%.

Combustion increases your critical strike damage by ${$s3/1000}.1%.

450867.name: Purified Spirit
450867.description: When Aspect of Harmony ends, any remaining vitality is expelled as $?a137023[damage over $450820d][healing over $450805d], split among nearby targets.

450870.name: Harmonic Gambit
450870.description: During Aspect of Harmony, $?a137023[Expel Harm and Vivify withdraw vitality to heal for an additional $s1% over $450769d][Rising Sun Kick, Blackout Kick, and Tiger Palm also withdraw vitality to damage enemies for an additional $s2% over $450763d].

450875.name: Manifestation
450875.description: $?c1[Chi Burst and Chi Wave deal][Chi Wave deals] $s1% increased damage and healing.

450889.name: Balanced Stratagem
450889.description: Casting a Physical spell or ability increases the damage and healing of your next Fire or Nature spell or ability by $451508s1%, and vice versa. Stacks up to $451508U.

450892.name: Endless Draught
450892.description: $?a137023[Celestial Brew and Celestial Infusion have][Thunder Focus Tea has] $s1 additional charge.

450912.name: Path of Resurgence
450912.description: $?a450391[Chi Wave][Chi Burst] increases vitality stored by $451084s1% for $451084d.

450925.name: Lightning Volley
450925.description: The stormrook unleashes lightning bolts capable of seeking targets.

450965.name: Way of a Thousand Strikes
450965.description: $?a137023[][Rising Sun Kick, ]Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm contribute $s1% additional vitality.

450979.name: Pride of Pandaria
450979.description: Flurry Strikes have $s1% additional chance to critically strike.

450982.name: High Impact
450982.description: Enemies who die within $451037d of being damaged by a Flurry Strike explode, dealing $451039s1 physical damage to uncontrolled enemies within $451039a1 yds.

450988.name: One Versus Many
450988.description:
Auto attack critical strikes generate double the amount of Flurry Charges.

$?c3[Fists of Fury damage increased by $s2%.][
Keg Smash damage increased by $s3%.]

450989.name: Efficient Training
450989.description:
Energy spenders deal an additional $s1% damage.
The cooldown of $?c1[Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox is reduced by ${$s6/-1000} sec][Zenith is reduced by ${$s4/-1000} sec].

450991.name: Whirling Steel
450991.description:
When your health drops below $s1%, summon Whirling Steel, increasing your parry chance and avoidance by $451214s1% for $451214d.

This effect can not occur more than once every $proccooldown sec.

450992.name: Predictive Training
450992.description: When you dodge or parry an attack, reduce all damage taken by $451230s1% for the next $451230d.

450993.name: Vigilant Watch
450993.description: Blackout Kick deals an additional $s1% critical damage.

451017.name: Clarity of Purpose
451017.description: Casting $?a137023[Purifying Brew][Enveloping Mist] stores $<value> additional vitality.

451018.name: Dark Energy
451018.description: $?c3[Void Torrent can be used while moving. ][]While Entropic Rift is active, you move $s1% faster.

451024.name: Overwhelming Force
451024.description: $?a137023[][Rising Sun Kick, ]Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm deal $s1% additional damage to enemies in a line in front of you. Damage reduced above $s2 targets.

451029.name: Mantra of Tenacity
451029.description: $?a137023[Fortifying Brew applies a Chi Cocoon, absorbing $<value> damage][Fortifying Brew grants $s1% Stagger].

451035.name: Burden of Power
451035.description:
$?c1[Arcane Blast damage increased by $s3%.

Arcane Pulse damage increased by $s4%][Pyroblast damage increased by $s1%.

Flamestrike damage increased by $s2%].

451036.name: Mantra of Purity
451036.description: $?a137023[Purifying Brew removes $s1% additional Stagger and causes you to absorb up to $<value> incoming Stagger][When cast on yourself, your single-target healing spells heal for $s2% more and restore an additional $451452o1 health over $451452d].

451041.name: Tiger's Vigor
451041.description: Casting Tiger's Lust reduces the remaining cooldown on Roll by ${$s1/1000} sec.

451043.name: Roar from the Heavens
451043.description: Tiger's Lust grants $452701s1% movement speed to up to $452701i allies near its target.

451204.name: No Escape
451204.description: Entropic Rift slows enemies by up to $s1%, increased the closer they are to its center.

451211.name: Starlight Conduit
451211.description:
Wrath, Starsurge, and Starfire damage increased by $s1%. $?!a137013[

Starsurge's cooldown is reduced by ${-$s2/1000} sec and its mana cost is reduced by $s3%.][]

451234.name: Voidwraith
451234.description:
When Entropic Rift ends, a Voidwraith is summoned from the collapsed rift for $451235d.

$@spellicon451235$@spellname451235
$@spelldesc451235

451294.name: Momentum Boost
451294.description:
Fists of Fury's damage is increased by $s1% of your haste and Fists of Fury does $451297s1% more damage each time it deals damage, resetting when Fists of Fury ends.

Your auto attack speed is increased by $451298s1% for $451298d after Fists of Fury ends.

451311.name: Void Leech
451311.description: Every $t1 sec siphon an amount equal to $s1% of your health from an ally within $s3 yds if they are higher health than you.

451466.name: Pyromaniac
451466.description:
Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike while Hot Streak is active has a $s1% chance to repeat the spell cast at $s2% effectiveness.

This effect counts as consuming Hot Streak.

451485.name: Brawler's Intensity
451485.description: The cooldown of Rising Sun Kick is reduced by ${$s1/-1000}.1 sec and the damage of Blackout Kick is increased by $s2%.

451498.name: Energy Burst
451498.description: When you consume Blackout Kick!, you have a $s1% chance to generate $s2 Chi.

451515.name: Sequenced Strikes
451515.description: You have a $s1% chance to gain Blackout Kick! after consuming Dance of Chi-Ji.

451524.name: Revolving Whirl
451524.description: Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch have a $s1% chance to activate Dance of Chi-Ji.

451529.name: Knowledge of the Broken Temple
451529.description:
Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch grant $s1 stacks of Teachings of the Monastery.

Teachings of the Monastery can now stack up to $s4 times.

451569.name: Embrace the Shadow
451569.description: You absorb $s3% of all magic damage taken. Absorbing Shadow damage heals you for $s2% of the amount absorbed.

451573.name: Singularly Focused Jade
451573.description: Jadefire Stomp now strikes $s4 target, but deals $s2% increased damage and healing.

451576.name: Communion With Wind
451576.description: Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch have their cooldowns reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec and their damage is increased by $s2%.

451823.name: Dual Threat
451823.description: Your auto attacks have a $s1% chance to instead kick your target dealing $451839s1 Physical damage. Damage increased while using a two-handed weapon.

451840.name: Devour Matter
451840.description: Shadow Word: Death consumes absorb shields from your target, dealing $32379s1 extra damage to them and granting you $?c3[$s3 Insanity][$s2% mana] if a shield was present.

451875.name: Spontaneous Combustion
451875.description: Casting Combustion refreshes up to $s1 $Lcharge:charges; of Fire Blast.

452137.name: Flurry of Xuen
452137.description:
Your spells and abilities have a chance to activate Flurry of Xuen, unleashing a barrage of deadly swipes to deal ${$452130s1*$s1} Physical damage in a $452130A1 yd cone, damage reduced beyond $s2 targets.

Invoking Xuen, the White Tiger activates Flurry of Xuen.

452198.name: Eureka
452198.description: When a spell consumes Clearcasting, its damage is increased by $s1%.

452402.name: Demonsurge
452402.description:
$?a212612[][Void ]Metamorphosis now also $?a212612[causes Demon Blades to generate $162264s10 additional Fury][greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash].

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a $?a212612[Demonsurge][Voidsurge], causing you to explode with $?a212612[Fel][Void] energy, dealing $?a212612[$452416s1 Chaos][$1246160s1 Cosmic] damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond $452416s3 targets.

452403.name: Wave of Debilitation
452403.description: $?c1[Chaos][Void] Nova slows enemies by $453263s1% and reduces attack and cast speed by $453263s2% for $453263d after its stun fades.

452404.name: Pursuit of Angriness
452404.description: Movement speed increased by $s1% per $s2 Fury.

452405.name: Focused Hatred
452405.description:
$?a212612[Demonsurge][Voidsurge] deals $s1% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by $s2%.

452406.name: Set Fire to the Pain
452406.description:
$s2% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over $453286d.

Fire damage taken reduced by $S3%.

452407.name: Improved Soul Rending
452407.description: Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by $s1% and an additional $s2% while $?a212612[][Void ]Metamorphosis is active.

452408.name: Burning Blades
452408.description:
$?a212612[Your blades burn with Fel energy, causing the damage from Chaos Strike, Throw Glaive, Blade Dance's First Blood, and auto-attacks to burn for an additional $s1% damage as Fire over $453177d][Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional $s2% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by $s3%].

452409.name: Violent Transformation
452409.description:
$?a212612[When you activate Metamorphosis, reset the cooldown of Immolation Aura][Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals $s2% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation].

452410.name: Enduring Torment
452410.description: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing $?a212612[Chaos Strike and Blade Dance damage by $453314s2%, and Haste by $453314s1%][Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by $453314s4%].

452411.name: Untethered Fury
452411.description:
Maximum Fury increased by $?a212612[$s1][$s2].$?c3[

Void Ray damage increased by $s3%.][]

452412.name: Student of Suffering
452412.description: $?a212612[Eye Beam][Void Ray] applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by ${$453239s1*$mas}.1% and granting $453236s1 Fury every $453239t2 sec, for $453239d.

452413.name: Flamebound
452413.description: $?a212612[Immolation Aura][Hungering Slash] has $s1 yd increased radius and $s2% increased critical strike damage bonus.

452414.name: Monster Rising
452414.description:
$?a212612[Agility][Intellect] increased by $?a212612[$452550s1][$452550s2]% while not in demon form.$?c3[

Collapsing Star damage increased by $s2%.][]

452415.name: Demonic Intensity
452415.description:
Activating $?a212612[][Void ]Metamorphosis greatly empowers $?a212612[Eye Beam, Immolation Aura][The Hunt].

$?a212612[Demonsurge][Voidsurge] damage is increased by $?a212612[${$452416s2}][${$1246160s2}]% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

452494.name: Fight Through the Flames
452494.description: Defensive Stance additionally reduces magic damage you take by $s1%.

452536.name: Hand of Fate
452536.description:
Flip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes $s1 or more combo points. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by ${$452923s4+$452923s1}%, lasting $452923d or until you flip Tails. Tails deals $452538s1 Cosmic damage to your target.

For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional $452923s1% and Tails increases its damage by $452917s1%.

452902.name: Swift Artifice
452902.description: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by $s1%.

452997.name: Energized Familiar
452997.description:
During Arcane Surge, your Familiar fires $s1 bolts instead of 1.

Damage from your Arcane Familiar has a $s2% chance to grant you up to $454020s1% of your maximum mana.

452999.name: Siphon Life
452999.description: $?a445465[Wither][Corruption] deals $s1% increased damage and its periodic damage heals you for $s2% of the damage dealt.

453080.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
453080.description: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by $s1% and increases its damage by $s2%.

453087.name: Malediction
453087.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Agony, $?a445465[Wither][Corruption], and Unstable Affliction by $s1%.

453096.name: Contagion
453096.description: Increases critical strike damage dealt by Agony, $?a445465[Wither][Corruption], and Unstable Affliction by $s1%.

453105.name: Summoner's Embrace
453105.description: Increases the damage dealt by your spells and your demon by $s1%.

453109.name: Power Surge
453109.description: Casting Halo also causes you to create a Halo around you at $s1% effectiveness every $453112t sec for $453112d.

453172.name: Cunning Cruelty
453172.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul have a chance to trigger a Shadow Bolt Volley, dealing $<damage> Shadow damage to $s1 enemies within $453176a1 yards of your current target.

474746.description: Your pet damage is increased by $s1% and your pet is $474751s1% larger.

474750.name: Symbiotic Relationship
474750.description: Form a bond with an ally. Your self-healing also heals your bonded ally for 10% of the amount healed. Your healing to your bonded ally also heals you for 8% of the amount healed.

1213597.name: Perfectly-Honed Instincts
1213597.description: Well-Honed Instincts can trigger up to once every ${$382912d+$s1} sec.

1214442.name: Demonfire Infusion
1214442.description:
Periodic damage from $?a445465[Wither][Immolate] has a $s1% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at $s3% increased effectiveness.

Incinerate has a $s2% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at $s3% increased effectiveness.

1214467.name: Rain of Fire
1214467.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire upon your target, dealing [(45.9162% of Spell Power) * 8] Fire damage over 8 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at your target.

1214909.name: Roll the Bones
1214909.description:
Roll the dice of fate, providing a combat enhancement of random power for 30 sec.

1 set or better: Add 20% increased chance to gain Opportunity.

2 sets or better: Add increased combo point generation.

3 sets or better: Add 30% bonus to Restless Blades' effect.

Jackpot: Add 10% increased critical strike chance.

1215241.name: Divinity
1215241.description:
Your healing is increased by $s1% while Apotheosis is active.

Casting Apotheosis causes your next $1216314U Prayer of Healing casts to be instant and heal for $1216314s2% more.

1215245.name: Eternal Sanctity
1215245.description: Increases the duration of Apotheosis by ${$s1/1000} sec.

1215265.name: Dispersing Light
1215265.description: $s1% of healing done with Flash Heal is replicated to $s2 injured allies within $1215266A2 yards.

1215275.name: Holy Celerity
1215275.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Holy Words by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

1215617.name: Predator's Thirst
1215617.description:
Consume damage increased by $s1%.

Consume generates a Soul Fragment.

1216953.name: Freezing Winds
1216953.description: Shattering enemies inside your Blizzard increases Shatter's area damage by $s1%.

1217413.name: Slicing Winds
1217413.description:
Envelop yourself in razor-sharp winds, then lunge forward dealing (448% of Attack Power) Nature damage to enemies in your path. Damage reduced beyond 5 enemies.

Hold to increase lunge distance.

1217524.name: Dire Cleave
1217524.description: When summoned, Dire Beasts gain Beast Cleave at $s1% effectiveness for ${$s2/1000}.1 sec.

1217605.name: Void Metamorphosis
1217605.description:
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

1217622.name: Therazane's Resilience
1217622.description: Earth Shield $?c3[and Water Shield no longer lose charges and are][no longer loses charges and is] ${100+$s1}% effective.

1217941.name: Lifetreading
1217941.description: Efflorescence healing increased by $s1%, and it now automatically grows beneath your Lifebloom target's feet.

1218047.name: Primordial Storm
1218047.description:
Sundering transforms into a single use Primordial Storm for $1218125d after it is cast.

$@spellicon1218047$@spellname1218047
Devastate nearby enemies with a Primordial Storm dealing $1218113s1 Flamestrike, $1218116s1 Froststrike, $1218118s1 Stormstrike damage, and unleashing a Lightning Bolt or a Chain Lightning at $s2% effectiveness. Deals reduced damage beyond $s3 targets.

|cFFFFFFFFConsumes Maelstrom Weapon for increased damage.|r

1218447.name: Fulminous Roar
1218447.description: $?c1[Fire Breath deals its damage][Fire Breath and Dream Breath deal their damage and healing] $s1% more often.

1219723.name: Azure Celerity
1219723.description: Disintegrate deals damage $s1% more often, but deals $s2% less damage.

1220506.name: Screaming Brutality
1220506.description: Blade Dance automatically triggers Throw Glaive on your primary target for $s3% damage and each slash has a $s2% chance to Throw Glaive an enemy for $s1% damage.

1221167.name: Collapsing Star
1221167.description:
While in Void Metamorphosis, every $s1 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star.

$@spellicon1221150 $@spellname1221150
$@spelldesc1221150

1223171.name: Guile
1223171.description: The cast range of Voidblade, Consume Magic, and Disrupt are increased by $s1 yds.

1223323.name: Unbreakable Bond
1223323.description:
Regain access to Call Pet.

While outdoors, your pet deals $s1% increased damage and takes $s2% reduced damage.

1223798.name: Intuition
1223798.description: Upon reaching maximum stacks of Arcane Salvo, your next Arcane Barrage deals $s1% increased damage.

1223918.name: Waste Not
1223918.description: Damage from Void Ray has a $s1% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

1226019.name: Reap
1226019.description:
Cut a hole in the fabric of reality, sending a concentrated bolt of cosmic matter towards your target, dealing (673.2% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

Reap gathers up to 4 nearby souls.

1226033.name: Eradicate
1226033.description:
Fully channeling Void Ray upgrades your Reap to Eradicate.

$@spellicon1225826 $@spellname1225826
$@spelldesc1225826

1226140.name: Grove Guardians
1226140.description: Casting Swiftmend or Wild Growth summons a Treant that casts Nourish on that target or a nearby ally periodically, healing for ${$422090m1}. Lasts $102693d.

1227280.name: Tentacle Slam
1227280.description:
Summons a massive shadowy appendage to slam the ground, dealing (68.7926% of Spell Power) Shadow damage in front of you and 8 yds around your target.

Applies Vampiric Touch to up to 6 enemies, prioritizing ones without Vampiric Touch.

Generates 6 Insanity.

1227707.name: Impending Apocalypse
1227707.description: Each Collapsing Star you cast increases the damage of your next Collapsing Star by $1227338s1%.

1228516.name: Subservient Shadows
1228516.description: Summoned minions last $s2% longer and deal an additional $s1% damage.

1229376.name: Single-Button Assistant
1229376.description:
Casts damaging abilities for use in combat, rotating through them based on priority.

The global cooldown of abilities used through the Single-Button Assistant is 25% longer.

1230153.name: Killing Streak
1230153.description:
Obliterate and Frostscythe consume all Killing Machines to deal $s2% increased critical strike damage and grant ${$1230916s1/10}.1% Haste for $1230916d for each stack consumed.

Multiple applications may overlap.

1230223.name: Howling Blades
1230223.description: Rime empowered Howling Blast unleashes $s2 icy blades at its target that deal $1231083s1 Frost damage and have $s1% chance to grant Killing Machine.

1230272.name: Icy Onslaught
1230272.description:
Frost Strike and Glacial Advance now cause your next Frost Strike and Glacial Advance to deal $1230273s1% increased damage and cost ${$1230273s2/10} more Runic Power. 

This effect stacks until the next Runic Empowerment.

1230284.name: Northwinds
1230284.description:
Howling Blast now hits an additional target with maximum effectiveness. 

Rime increases Howling Blast damage done by an additional $s1%.

1230301.name: Frostreaper
1230301.description:
Obliterate deals $s4% increased damage and has a chance to tether the souls of its target and a nearby enemy to yours.

Frost Strike severs the tethers, dealing $1233619s1 Shadowfrost damage to both foes.

1230339.name: Mindbender
1230339.description:
Casting Voidform summons a Mindbender for $200174d.

$@spellicon200174 $@spellname200174
Summons a shadowy fiend to attack your target.

|cFFFFFFFFGenerates ${$200010s1/100} Insanity each time the Mindbender attacks.|r

1231346.name: Ancient Madness
1231346.description:
Casting Shadow Word: Madness increases the duration of Voidform by ${$228260s2/1000}.1 sec.

Each time this occurs during Voidform, its effectiveness is reduced by $s3%.

1232616.name: Pillars of Light
1232616.description:
$@spellicon156910 $@spellname156910:
Allies with Beacon of Light or Beacon of Faith are healed for $53563s5 every $53563t5 sec.

$@spellicon200025 $@spellname200025:
Beacon of Virtue instantly heals allies for $1232617s1.

1232739.name: Wildspeaker
1232739.description:
Dire Beasts will now obey your Kill Command, dealing its damage at $s1% effectiveness.

Bestial Wrath now sends your Dire Beasts into a rage, increasing their damage dealt by $1235388s1% for $186254d. Dire Beasts summoned during a Bestial Wrath will benefit at a reduced duration.

1232897.name: Lycara's Inspiration
1232897.description:
You gain a bonus while in each form inspired by the breadth of your Druidic knowledge:

No Form: $378989s2% Magic Damage
Cat Form: $378990s2% Stamina
Bear Form: $378991s2% Movement Speed
Moonkin Form: $378992s2% Area damage taken reduction

1232955.name: Unmatched Precision
1232955.description: The damage bonus of Precise Shots is increased by an additional $s1%.

1233429.name: Price of Progress
1233429.description: You sacrifice 1% of your health every 1 sec and in exchange you cannot be slowed below 90% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks. Lasts until canceled.

1233448.name: Dark Transformation
1233448.description:
Corrupt and evolve your Ghoul into a Monstrosity, greatly empowering its abilities for 15 sec.

Death Coil and Epidemic extends the duration of this effect by 1.0 sec.

1234195.name: Void Nova
1234195.description: Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing (27.4816% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.

1234559.name: Desecrate
1234559.description: Death and Decay deals its damage ${(1/(1+($s1/100))-1)*100}% faster.

1234796.name: Shift
1234796.description: Shift through the void, reappearing at your targeted destination.

1235022.name: Hunker Down
1235022.description: Damage you take from area of effect attacks is reduced by $s1%. Spell Reflection reduces magic damage taken by an additional $s2%.

1235023.name: Spellbreaker
1235023.description: You have a $s2% chance to disrupt magic damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by $s3%.

1235047.name: Unyielding Stance
1235047.description: Defensive Stance reduces damage taken by an additional $s1%.

1235088.name: Heavy Handed
1235088.description: Execute hits up to $s1 additional $Ltarget:targets; for $s2% damage.

1235113.name: Whirling Blade
1235113.description: Your attacks have a chance to target a nearby enemy with Ravager for ${$s1/1000} sec.

1235211.name: Shadow Tap
1235211.description: Mind Blast deals $s2% increased damage, but costs $s1% more mana.

1235397.name: Umbral Reach
1235397.description:
Bleak Powder now applies Black Arrow's periodic effect to all enemies it damages.

If Bleak Powder damages $s2 or more enemies, gain $?c1[Beast Cleave][Trick Shots] if talented.

1237270.name: Feast of Souls
1237270.description: Soul Fragments grant $1232310s1% increased damage for $1232310d. Multiple applications may overlap.

1237885.name: Thorn Bloom
1237885.description:
Command powerful thorns to assault 8 enemies and heal 8 allies within 10 yds of the target area.

Enemies are dealt [Attack Power * 0.5 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Nature damage and an additional [(Attack Power * 0.125 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)) * 12] Nature damage over 12 sec. Allies are healed for [Attack Power * 0.65 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] and an additional [(Attack Power * 0.15 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)) * 12] over 12 sec.

1237978.name: Tempo Charged
1237978.description: Bronze healing and absorption increased by $s1%.

1238488.name: Moment of Craving
1238488.description: After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to $1238495s1 additional Soul Fragments.

1238680.name: Frostbound Will
1238680.description: Consuming Rime reduces the cooldown of Empower Rune Weapon by ${$s1/-1000} sec.

1238739.name: Soulshaper
1238739.description: Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by $s1%.

1238900.name: Grave Mastery
1238900.description: Critical strike damage of your minions is increased by $1238902s1%

1239519.name: Hungering Slash
1239519.description:
After dealing damage with The Hunt or Voidblade, Voidblade is replaced with Hungering Slash for $1239525d.

$@spellicon1239123 $@spellname1239123
$@spelldesc1239123

Hungering Slash grants a temporary charge of Vengeful Retreat and causes your next Vengeful Retreat within $1223157d to deal an additional $1239526s1 Cosmic damage.

1239581.name: Unshakable
1239581.description: Your empower spells are $s1% more effective. While charging a healing empower spell, you cannot be knocked back.

1239669.name: Eclipse
1239669.description:
You may draw the sun and moon into alignment for $48517d, empowering either your Nature or Arcane spells. Casting Wrath or Starfire changes what mode of Eclipse will be entered, and the two modes of Eclipse share a button and $?a1240188[${$s1+$1240188s1/1000}][$s1] sec cooldown.

$@spellicon48517 $@spellname48517
Nature spells deal $48517s1% additional damage and Wrath damage is increased by $48517s3%.

$@spellicon48518 $@spellname48518
Arcane spells deal $48518s1% additional damage and Starfire damage is increased by $48518s3%.

1240185.name: Celestial Fire
1240185.description: Moonfire, Sunfire, and Shooting Stars damage increased by $s1%.

1240188.name: Sculpt the Stars
1240188.description: The cooldowns of Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse are reduced by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

1240189.name: Master Summoner
1240189.description: Increases Mastery by $s2% and reduces the cast time of your Summon Demonic Tyrant and Summon Felguard by ${$s1/-1000}.1 sec.

1240201.name: Devourer's Bite
1240201.description: Damage from Voidblade and the Hunt increases the damage your target takes from you by $1241532s1% for $1241532d. Multiple applications may overlap.

1240202.name: Voidglare Boon
1240202.description: After fully channeling Void Ray, gain $1241922s1 Fury.

1240203.name: Focused Ray
1240203.description: Void Ray deals $s1% more damage when damaging $s2 $Ltarget:targets;.

1240206.name: Total Eclipse
1240206.description: Entering any Eclipse has a $s1% chance to grant the benefits of both Lunar and Solar Eclipse.

1240283.name: Elune's Challenge
1240283.description: When you exit Eclipse with less than ${$s1/10} Astral Power, Wrath and Starfire's cast times are reduced by $1240285s1% for $1240285d or until you enter an Eclipse.

1240364.name: Death's Torment
1240364.description: Shadow Word: Death deals damage $s1 additional $Ltime:times; at $s2% effectiveness.

1240388.name: Dark Thoughts
1240388.description: Increases the chance for Shadowy Insight to occur by $s2%. When consuming Shadowy Insight, Mind Blast generates ${$s1/100} additional Insanity.

1240394.name: Madness Weaving
1240394.description: The damage bonus from your Mastery: Shadow Weaving gains $s1% additional benefit from Shadow Word: Madness.

1240906.name: Improved Eclipse
1240906.description: Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse have one additional charge.

1240907.name: Meteorites
1240907.description: Every time Starfall drops a wave of stars, a meteorite also falls on up to $s1 targets in its range, each dealing $1240913s1 Astral damage.

1241059.name: Celestial Infusion
1241059.description: A strong herbal brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 30% of incoming damage, up to [(Attack Power * 22.68) * (1 + Versatility)] total.

1241097.name: Niuzao's Resolve
1241097.description: Healing Spheres now heal over $1241109d, and their healing is increased by up to $s1% based on your missing health.

1241136.name: Zen State
1241136.description: The effectiveness of your Stagger is increased by up to $s1%, based on your missing health.

1241275.name: Tyr's Deliverance
1241275.description:
Activating Avenging Wrath releases the Light within yourself, healing $200652s2 injured allies instantly and an injured ally every $200652t1 sec within $200653A1 yds for $200654s1.

Allies healed also receive $200654s2% increased healing from your Holy Light, Flash of Light, and Holy Shock spells for $200654d.

1241288.name: Hammer of Wrath
1241288.description:
During Avenging Wrath, Judgment is empowered into Hammer of Wrath.$?c3[

$@spellicon24275$@spellname24275
$@spelldesc24275][

$@spellicon1241413 $@spellname1241413
$@spelldesc1241413]

1241358.name: Empyrean Legacy
1241358.description: Judgment critical strikes empower your next Word of Glory to automatically activate Light of Dawn at $s2% effectiveness.

1241462.name: Arcane Pulse
1241462.description:
A pulse of Arcane magic erupts from underneath your target, dealing (91% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to all enemies within 2 yds. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Each Arcane Charge increases damage by 60%, radius by 2 yds, and mana cost by 100%. [ Arcane (Level 10): Generates 1 Arcane Charge.]

1241511.name: Call of the Righteous
1241511.description:
Avenging Wrath's cooldown is reduced by ${$s1/-1000} sec, but its duration is reduced by ${$s2/-1000}.1 sec.

Avenging Crusader's cooldown is reduced by ${$s3/-1000}.1 sec, but its duration is reduced by ${$s4/-1000}.1 sec.

1241542.name: Ringing of the Heavens
1241542.description: Activating Aura Mastery also casts a Divine Toll at $s1% effectiveness.

1241567.name: Clawing Shadows
1241567.description:
Shadows guide your strikes, increasing the damage of your Scourge Strike by $s1%, and causing it to grant you Clawing Shadows up to $1241569u times.

For each stack of Clawing Shadows, your Scourge Strike chains to an additional enemy. Each subsequent chain deals $s3% reduced damage.

1241669.name: Dream Simulacrum
1241669.description: Verdant Embrace healing is increased by $s1%. In addition, it no longer causes you to leap to your target, instead sending forth a Dream Simulacrum.

1241704.name: Wings of Liberty
1241704.description: Verdant Embrace gains an additional charge.

1241705.name: Outnumber
1241705.description:
Each Lesser Ghoul increases the damage of your permanent Ghoul by $s1%, and Dark Transformation additionally empowers the Claw attacks of your Lesser Ghouls to Sweeping Claws.

$@spellicon91778$@spellname91778
$@spelldesc91778

1241714.name: Seraphic Barrier
1241714.description: Word of Glory and Light of Dawn now convert $s2% of their healing into an absorb shield instead.

1241805.name: Glistening Radiance
1241805.description: While at maximum health, targets with Beacon of Light generate an absorb shield equal to $s1% of their health every $53563t6 sec, up to a maximum of $s2%.

1241858.name: Unholy Devotion
1241858.description:
Putrefy causes your permanent Ghoul to go on an unholy frenzy, increasing its attack speed and energy regeneration by $1270491s1% for $1270491d.

Multiple applications may overlap.

1241937.name: Soul Immolation
1241937.description: Light your soul aflame, healing yourself for (4 * 6)% of your maximum health, generating 30 Fury and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec.

1241945.name: Blessing of Dusk
1241945.description: Damage taken reduced by up to $s1%, increasing as your health decreases.

1241958.name: Vengeful Wrath
1241958.description: Hammer of Wrath deals up to $s1% additional damage based on its target's health. Lower health targets receive more damage.

1242008.name: Hand of Divinity
1242008.description: Activating Avenging Wrath calls upon the Light to empower you, causing your next $?s216331[Holy Light][$s1 Holy Lights] to be instant cast and cost $414273s2% less mana.

1242031.name: Twin Echoes
1242031.description: Casting Emerald Blossom causes your next Echo to cast on an additional ally within $s1 yards at $s2% effectiveness. Stacks up to $1242759u charges.

1242147.name: Summon Gargoyle
1242147.description:
Army of the Dead now summons a Gargoyle into the battlefield to bombard your enemies for $61777d.

The Gargoyle gains $211947s1% increased damage for every $49206s4 Runic Power you spend and always critically strikes.

1242158.name: Forbidden Knowledge
1242158.description:
Army of the Dead siphons the power of the fallen, transforming Death Coil and Epidemic into Necrotic Coil and Graveyard for $1242223d.

$@spellicon1242174$@spellname1242174
$@spelldesc1242174

$@spellicon383269$@spellname383269
$@spelldesc383269

1242492.name: Emptiness
1242492.description: Every soul consumed in Void Metamorphosis grants ${$s1/100}.2% haste, up to $s1%.

1242495.name: Calamitous
1242495.description: Your damaging critical strikes deal ${200+$s1}% damage instead of the usual 200%.

1242604.name: Scourging
1242604.description:
Scourge Strike now causes your Plagues to erupt at ${$s2+$s1}% effectiveness.

Clawing Shadows can now stack $s3 additional times.

1242608.name: Raise Abomination
1242608.description: Army of the Dead now raises an Abomination for $288853d to attack enemies while emitting a disease cloud, dealing $1244347s1 Plague damage to nearby enemies every $s1 sec.

1242745.name: Inner Flame
1242745.description: Casting Dream Flight or Stasis increases your healing over time by $1242747s1% and causes Living Flame and Reversion to have a $1242747s2% increased chance to grant Essence Burst. Lasts $?s359816[$s2][$s3] sec.

1242768.name: Sweet Release
1242768.description: Your chance to shatter a Soul Fragment from enemies you damage is increased by $s1%.

1242779.name: Phantom Menace
1242779.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Shadowy Apparitions by $s1% and their critical strike damage by $s2%.

1242862.name: Instilled Doubt
1242862.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Pain by $s1% and their critical strike damage by $s2%.

1242910.name: Jade Infusion
1242910.description: Thunder Focus Tea summons a Jade Serpent Statue at your location. When you channel Soothing Mist, the statue will also begin to channel Soothing Mist on your target, healing for $198533o1 over $198533d.

1243155.name: Way of the Serpent
1243155.description: $?s399491[Sheilun's Gift][Vivify] healing increased by $s1% and Renewing Mist's healing is increased by $s2%.

1243287.name: Diffuse Magic
1243287.description: Activating Fortifying Brew transfers all currently active harmful magical effects on you back to their original caster if possible.

1243307.name: Aether Attunement
1243307.description: Arcane Missiles now damages ${$s2} additional targets at $s1% effectiveness.

1243435.name: Orb Mastery
1243435.description:
Casting Arcane Orb while you have Clearcasting causes you to fire $s1 additional Arcane $lOrb:Orbs; at $s2% effectiveness.

Casting Arcane Orb now consumes Clearcasting.

1243507.name: Aegwynn's Technique
1243507.description: Casting Touch of the Magi grants Clearcasting.

1243542.name: Overflowing Insight
1243542.description: The damage of Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse are increased by $s1%, but their mana costs are increased by $s2%.

1243557.name: Expanded Mind
1243557.description:
Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Pulse grants $s1 $Lstack:stacks; of Arcane Salvo.

Casting Arcane Orb grants $s2 $Lstack:stacks; of Arcane Salvo.

1243659.name: Last Stand
1243659.description: Activating Shield Wall increases your maximum health by $12975s1% for $12975d and instantly heals you for that amount.

1243660.name: Resonant Voice
1243660.description: The effects of your shouts last $s1% longer.

1243807.name: Frantic Frenzy
1243807.description:
Unleash a furious frenzy, flickering to nearby targets in front of you 5 times and clawing all enemies around them for (15.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage and an additional [(31.08% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 5 combo points.

1244001.name: Arcane Singularity
1244001.description:
Arcane Salvo damage bonus increased by $s1%.

$@spellicon1242974 $@spellname1242974:
Increases the damage of your next Arcane Barrage by $1242974s1%.

1244019.name: Undying Embers
1244019.description: You are healed for $s1% of the damage dealt by Refining Fire.

1244025.name: Improved Conjuration
1244025.description: Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by ${-$s1/1000} sec.

1244069.name: Improved Ice Barrier
1244069.description: Ice Barrier reduces your physical damage taken by ${-$s1}% and absorbs an additional $s2% of your maximum health.

1244070.name: Searing Sunlight
1244070.description: Casting Avenger's Shield causes Consecration to deal its damage and healing again immediately at $s1% effectiveness.

1244087.name: Time Walk
1244087.description: Alter Time resets the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer when you return to your original location.

1244088.name: Interpose
1244088.description: Run at high speed toward a target location near your allies, taking 30% of all damage dealt to allies within 3 yards for 8 sec or until you take at least [(0.2) * Total Health] damage from this effect.

1244090.name: Temporal Realignment
1244090.description: Upon dropping below $s1% health, your past self corrects your timeline, casting Alter Time and instantly returning $1244092s1% of your maximum health.

1244105.name: Charm of Aegwynn
1244105.description: The critical strike damage of your spells is increased by $s1%.

1244110.name: Glacial Bulwark
1244110.description: Ice Block and Ice Barrier now have an additional charge.

1244220.name: Voidpurge
1244220.description: Void Ray's cooldown during Void Metamorphosis is reduced by ${-$s1/1000}.1 sec.

1244222.name: Devourer's Edge
1244222.description: Reap and Consume damage increased by $s1%.

1244237.name: Rolling Torment
1244237.description: When Void Metamorphosis expires, for each unused Soul you harvested, gain $s1 Fury and increase your damage by ${$s1/10}.2% for $1244235d.

1244258.name: Chomp
1244258.description:
Chomp your target, causing (900% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Chomp critical strikes deal 3 times normal damage.

Chomp can only be used when you fall below 30% Energy or for 2 seconds afterward.

1244295.name: Sweet Suffering
1244295.description:
The duration of Feast of Souls is increased by ${$s1/1000} sec.

$@spellicon1237270 $@spellname1237270
$@spelldesc1237270

1244310.name: Roaring Blaze
1244310.description:
Increases Conflagrate damage by $s1%. 

Conflagrate now erupts the target's $?a445465[Wither][Immolate], spreading it up to $s2 nearby enemies.
